name: Chuck Schumer
subject: Friend, you really stand out -
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the DSCC | PO Box 96047, Washington, DC 20090 | **[dscc
body:
| | | It's Sen. Schumer.

I'm between meetings, so I'll make this quick: Your name is on our list of inactive Democratic memberships for February, and I need to make sure you activate your membership by tonight’s mid-month fundraising deadline.

If we want to save the Senate and stop Mitch McConnell **_again_** in 2024, we need to begin laying the groundwork immediately. Voting rights, reproductive justice, President Biden's judicial nominees, and our ultra-slim Democratic majority are all on the line. We can't afford for anyone to sit on the sidelines!

**Your membership has never been more critical. Please, use this custom link to activate right now:**

**[www.dscc.org/202302members/#dpwillis67@gmail.com](https://go.dscc.org/go/11833?amount=5&t=4&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-FD-20230215-ChuckSchumer-SchumerShortMembershipRF-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-FD-20230215-ChuckSchumer-SchumerShortMembershipRF-Pros-sl1&akid=9859%2E9716520%2EG98IWz)**

Thanks for taking action to activate your DSCC membership,

Chuck Schumer

[](https://go.dscc.org/go/11833?amount=5&t=5&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-FD-20230215-ChuckSchumer-SchumerShortMembershipRF-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-FD-20230215-ChuckSchumer-SchumerShortMembershipRF-Pros-sl1&akid=9859%2E9716520%2EG98IWz)

Peter, I need your help to protect election integrity!
**The spread of Ranked Choice Voting in the United States is a direct threat to our election system. In Alaska, we have already seen Ranked Choice Voting****cannot be audited or verified, leads to voter suppression, and undermines the integrity of our elections.**
I recently appeared on Steve Bannon's War Room to discuss the dangers of Ranked Choice Voting and the importance of protecting election integrity. I invite you to watch the discussion below:
---
---
[](https://u21094568.ct.sendgrid.net/ls/click?upn=60-2BjHbupYa9XZQcRI8CzLQs3xz1ZNwQbuvw7ALSGCHZLO-2FKfleM3u-2BDcfEHhCXTHz4MBsDXtt43QI7QVejLM1V2g2l0RvXkYRWMXLRxFIci31zmcmlsMG8mUShxd7kScY-Az_XwU9lPq5-2Bze3gI64ohlV0cQwWAuBAU7ADIvj2CS7ymhuTI2jG3IYR5NWbV52qgmdAiGhBklNQsRXTWl4rWtz6V26ifmsOhc2lTNkdXy-2F5FFomLfxGZOGa3bZcww1pfz6Av7ciulNOfUDD4F43sRhUFO0GtExInRuo4MJOImU0YCdJfCL16vTZapBzL3cOILU5ly2PfL59RpK22bMUZABBGYeuPWVUXQ2GMnJ6nh72De5iLlnVd-2Bn9ptORl0eMNPACT6X0ruYzPayQxIcs688v5iZfX7PkkqUcO8URKeyU2Hy9pb-2Fsvx2lbnZVg4grjPlLChS-2BslLMQ6o19snltvd2LDkbfJeicP7-2FYBmUZcpb3UxB05-2FqJz4vAVcdqXs6QfRiI-2FO2BK9s5PWQHBIFsYk5PpeTTNdRUzTkSIWdkv-2BeJcdp61Yw9VMzHQPL9pAt7rcb0pOu7Sz-2FY-2BbDeYYsENdZhnn-2B82mIwdmdvaiMQeeOZXfc3ObwH3UxluygI3wz41hnZGqaRjdfnL0lq0vBlKDcCLjWMHCgDJww9wjGUJ50ZVoc-2FWKnyNxdQ6zE1Vf7hdioJ4aIKAnE8oCFT6V0eQL7wzeyu11Nvu4EUB-2F6w1XbexjNfUFVv7tX-2F1lJFAezl-2FGprcGBTc-2FhU1iIbzZ891J2XPegnEAg0D9EeoKlWgsPo419bcSDD8iyTI0o9qyUxRHgc9EsbyE6clfqoU2yumKZxM9ZZCKV6yZaKZXx3jOxFVfi5ZSW-2F-2BX8zab-2FcOMi-2BV9vtFmRIkDcv1dZWuC65HQy-2BJdQaC0dy0-2Fsm0eA2yu9tc8e6evrXLsbaBwyEuLAeqRkniprL1upMcWz3-2FktAlyO2uTgBv21CkNUu9V1dsp5GPWZ-2BZEtj7GSVjiYzwT6q2txag0psP1-2FwnXnTzHNpHD5QaSYDqaqr4mp1spMOeBl6UrR9TUCWpBK8HCvO-2FpWBPq70R-2B0oQjvadBmQO6hckJRoau2KsKziXOk9cACNw6FF96eqx0Tyhegm9xj4sNkul0)

I'm reaching out to you because I believe that _we must act now_ to protect democracy and preserve the sanctity of our elections. This is a pivotal moment in our nation's history, and I am counting on you to help spread the word and take a stand.
_**With your help, we can educate the public and advocate for election integrity. You can make a contribution to fund this critical initiative and put a stop to Ranked Choice Voting.**_

clean_body: | | | | I spoke with Steve Bannon about... Peter, I need your help to protect election integrity! The spread of Ranked Choice Voting in the United States is a direct threat to our election system. In Alaska, we have already seen Ranked Choice Votingcannot be audited or verified, leads to voter suppression, and undermines the integrity of our elections. I recently appeared on Steve Bannon's War Room to discuss the dangers of Ranked Choice Voting and the importance of protecting election integrity. I invite you to watch the discussion below: I'm reaching out to you because I believe that we must act now to protect democracy and preserve the sanctity of our elections. This is a pivotal moment in our nation's history, and I am counting on you to help spread the word and take a stand. With your help, we can educate the public and advocate for election integrity. You can make a contribution to fund this critical initiative and put a stop to Ranked Choice Voting. | I cannot stress enough how critical this issue is. Our future depends on the integrity of our elections, and we must act now to preserve it! I hope you will join me in this effort and make a contribution today. Thank you, | | Kelly Tshibaka Preserve Democracy | =

name: Alexandria and Team AOC
subject: Green New Deal, Voting Rights, and Medicare for All
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress
body:
There were the top three priorities from our 2023 Priorities Survey.
# [](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/143?refcode=em20230215-3895-header&t=1&akid=3895%2E2526796%2EdKytBk)
At the beginning of this year, we asked you to take our **2023 Priorities Survey** to ensure our movement’s goals continue to be aligned with yours. We’re happy to say that they are.
**The top three priorities from thousands of respondents were:**
1. Addressing climate change and the Green New Deal
2. Protecting voting rights
3. Passing Medicare for All

**60% of respondents selected addressing climate change and passing the Green New Deal as a top priority for the year.** Last term, Alexandria reintroduced the Green New Deal, with a record 104 co-sponsors in the House, and fought to pass the Inflation Reduction Act — our largest investment ever with $369 billion in funding to fight climate change. The Green New Deal also served as a guiding framework for over 60 federally-funded community projects – spanning Hawaii to Vermont – which will create green jobs, increase renewable energy, and strengthen our climate resiliency.
**57% selected voting rights as a top priority.** When Republicans and obstructionist Democrats like Senators Manchin and Sinema stood behind the racist filibuster last cycle — effectively blocking two voting rights bills that would not only protect Americans right to vote, but also expand access to vote-by-mail and advance automatic voter registration — Alexandria didn’t wait to call them out.
[](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20230215.0TyDQh&refcode=em20230215-3895-P_FND_ANO_GRM&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=3895%2E2526796%2EdKytBk)
And **53% of survey respondents selected passing Medicare for All as a top priority.** Alexandria has highlighted how vast, systemic inequalities that were growing pre-COVID only became worse during the pandemic, saying: “We have long been taking about how healthcare should be treated as a human right in the United States, why we need Medicare for All, and this is one huge case study as to why this is so important.” Since starting her 3rd term in January, she has already introduced legislation to expand Medicare to include dental, hearing, and vision care, as well as a bill to require federal healthcare to cover access to abortion services.
Alexandria's dedication to protecting voting rights, taking urgent action to stop the climate crisis, and guarantee healthcare to all has never waivered. This year, our campaign is focused on growing the grassroots, on-the-ground work needed to keep up pressure on Congress and the Biden administration to pass urgent legislation that protects working people and families.
[If you’re able to, will you make a $3 donation right now to power our work and help Alexandria keep fighting for our communities?](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20230215.0TyDQh&refcode=em20230215-3895-P_FND_ANO_GRM&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=3&akid=3895%2E2526796%2EdKytBk)
**[Contribute $3](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20230215.0TyDQh&refcode=em20230215-3895-P_FND_ANO_GRM&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=22&akid=3895%2E2526796%2EdKytBk)**
We can’t slow down, and we won’t.
Thank you,
Team AOC

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20230215?refcode=em20230215-3895-P_FND_ANO_GRM&t=23&refcode2=3895_2526796_dKytBk&akid=3895%2E2526796%2EdKytBk)** | **[Merch](https://shop.ocasiocortez.com/?utm_source=em-footer-20230215-3895-P_FND_ANO_GRM&t=24&akid=3895%2E2526796%2EdKytBk)**
---|---
[](https://www.facebook.com/OcasioCortez/?t=25&akid=3895%2E2526796%2EdKytBk) | [](https://twitter.com/AOC?t=26&akid=3895%2E2526796%2EdKytBk) | [](https://www.instagram.com/aoc/?t=27&akid=3895%2E2526796%2EdKytBk)
---|---|---
Email us: [speak@ocasiocortez.com](mailto: speak@ocasiocortez.com)
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, PO Box 680080, Corona, NY 11368.

name: Aleena Starks, Working Families Party
subject: East Palestine, Ohio
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Working Families Party National PAC (77 Sands St
body:
| | | Hi, Peter — I’m Aleena, the Political Director with the Ohio Working Families Party. My state is living through a slow-motion crisis right now. A 150-car freight train derailed in East Palestine, Ohio on February 3rd, releasing tons of toxic chemicals including the carcinogen vinyl chloride into our air, water, and soil. **In the two weeks since, we’ve already seen severe health and environmental consequences.** This crisis was fully avoidable. It is the direct result of corporate greed, government negligence, and the dehumanization of working people. And right now, people in our communities need all of our leaders to do everything in their power to protect our families and make sure this never happens again. **Will you join us in demanding that Ohio Governor Mike DeWine and Secretary of Transportation Pete Buttigieg take all necessary action to deliver for the people of East Palestine and surrounding communities?**[**Sign our petition and make sure our voices are heard.**](https://an.workingfamilies.org/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXdJUvH8Ygu3R43gD0WUPlZ7Yl-PXXQPMqy-j9GzfFX3w20H4kGCxheZ9LAL0_1z2VKaOTWOxYyecNd9JsmDzi1HRTvOSd-ZjT7UtcUwYugNLcBTM7srun_c5ybsrJXS-F8ef329hGVyco2MrcVxUhF6FtMxIrIsosOlbm2MRRax4gO7ScW5AYN8ZIStW5ZPTm99v7qulLqpQYoXM_ZafMWZeGSXhvUk3KwhoiSGmSPwTdcGksAGkhWxl4P8M6WoojiFh5yaEsPhKMNo4sJ4SLeZvFhWkDfpzgqUJiGaO4vWLqz85DxkDuq8klEqAAqfNlw/3tr/g5c2YkC3TRutVldapMvErg/h0/mnjTu9sQNOrxc3dLddnVPwFrnI5NzX4R6I-HK2bOq-E) **[Tell Gov. DeWine and Sec. Buttigieg to help East Palestine](https://an.workingfamilies.org/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXdJUvH8Ygu3R43gD0WUPlZ7Yl-PXXQPMqy-j9GzfFX3w20H4kGCxheZ9LAL0_1z2VKaOTWOxYyecNd9JsmDzi1HRTvOSd-ZjT7UtcUwYugNLcBTM7srun_c5ybsrJXS-F8ef329hGVyco2MrcVxUhF6FtMxIrIsosOlbm2MRRax4Trfa881OAxRDH8RYosHxfh1sS5CSWgIMhd62kLrN6VfH8FnMtjZ7yTCm_jiqMIYIpirv5QOZ5J8WFse9hY2jm8YQRreU5leChJYafqWGndU604gihfZ9LFgy1ELZaW-8rD4FM8ny6-zz3_oESrTdpw/3tr/g5c2YkC3TRutVldapMvErg/h1/DUn-gM8tURYHjD0ZZd2-MBl9o_HoAP6cfGebwg1oPbc)** After the derailment, authorities decided to perform a “controlled release” of the spilled chemicals, including the carcinogenic vinyl chloride — burning them and releasing a plume of black smoke and odor spreading for miles.1 [](https://an.workingfamilies.org/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXdJUvH8Ygu3R43gD0WUPlZ7Yl-PXXQPMqy-j9GzfFX3w20H4kGCxheZ9LAL0_1z2VKaOTWOxYyecNd9JsmDzi1HRTvOSd-ZjT7UtcUwYugNLcBTM7srun_c5ybsrJXS-F8ef329hGVyco2MrcVxUhF6FtMxIrIsosOlbm2MRRax4Ni-FBFH4kM_8O2qCWDnkyY5q7qvpDWkfsEZYxYUx5r_qmWHnpRJcZaI924ax_AN6cNUVRVCPiQdT0PpJxoR3Fvjwvo4bYG90KAmIC2Dy1y4D_vm4xWjUxkmr396xM7aNscVQ-U1NkgSlON4O6TOfSw/3tr/g5c2YkC3TRutVldapMvErg/h2/tp77ezSpkO92DwsfB2eu-2-Sj-fvXSlKMWfT6744Lck) Residents have already reported sore throats, burning eyes, rashes, numbness, and more after even short contact with the fumes. Family pets and farm animals have dropped dead. And thousands of fish have reportedly died due to chemicals in the Ohio River.2 The harm this is all causing was predictable — and avoidable. For years, corporations like Norfolk Southern, the company responsible for the East Palestine derailment, have lobbied the federal government to weaken transportation safety rules. In 2017, after donating more than $6 million to Republican campaigns, the rail industry was successful in getting the Trump administration to rescind part of an existing rule that required better braking systems on rail cars carrying hazardous materials.3 **Yet almost two weeks after the derailment here in Ohio, the U.S. Department of Transportation has made no effort to reinstate or strengthen that rule. 4****** Meanwhile, Governor DeWine has refused to request an emergency declaration from President Biden, which would provide federal assistance programs through FEMA to help residents with recovery now and improve public infrastructure to prevent future disasters. **The residents of East Palestine and neighboring communities have been failed by their government so far. But it’s not too late for leaders like Gov. DeWine and Sec. Buttigieg to take action.** [**Sign our petition urging Gov. DeWine and Sec. Buttigieg to deliver for the people of East Palestine and everyone affected by this crisis, and work to prevent future disasters.**](https://an.workingfamilies.org/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXdJUvH8Ygu3R43gD0WUPlZ7Yl-PXXQPMqy-j9GzfFX3w20H4kGCxheZ9LAL0_1z2VKaOTWOxYyecNd9JsmDzi1HRTvOSd-ZjT7UtcUwYugNLcBTM7srun_c5ybsrJXS-F8ef329hGVyco2MrcVxUhF6FtMxIrIsosOlbm2MRRax4jR-IRhao8y6Gaq4KYhRbB0AYOUSWGIRdYc3wtDS8I4LU0xc6uQYOWSN6OkSl_dSX1m-GmKJkE5PUImz_nQMj7yaT9df_4PBBg0--q-2XcYCHDVBaFJpjlCaGiIf40K5Ab0QaGCaS6c6IS9dgue0F5Q/3tr/g5c2YkC3TRutVldapMvErg/h3/kbP1rpc1PLXTVgAxFZzDfJgA4UoSf18hA4_P6EC-LTk) **[Tell Gov. DeWine and Sec. Buttigieg to help East Palestine](https://an.workingfamilies.org/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXdJUvH8Ygu3R43gD0WUPlZ7Yl-PXXQPMqy-j9GzfFX3w20H4kGCxheZ9LAL0_1z2VKaOTWOxYyecNd9JsmDzi1HRTvOSd-ZjT7UtcUwYugNLcBTM7srun_c5ybsrJXS-F8ef329hGVyco2MrcVxUhF6FtMxIrIsosOlbm2MRRax4FcNB1AOdb1gCcTU7hMaKfQLTJqPcuW3_MgsggP4w0ArmU1czZ6rJpAxZ8NPeae4ZBRHRFd_rMbhpcfoG4dXlMagi7NXmWGhaf3xEGxMNntpPMmJhjDx4c-LDzyykFWnGyxQzKjQMUY5tkXsxumveJA/3tr/g5c2YkC3TRutVldapMvErg/h4/gJoXtpQUf6XmhK2Xk7m5yc_ikMpCRtNESsDWenof9Ag)** In solidarity, Aleena Starks
Political Director
Ohio Working Families Party P.S. clean_body: | | | Hi, Peter — I’m Aleena, the Political Director with the Ohio Working Families Party. My state is living through a slow-motion crisis right now. A 150-car freight train derailed in East Palestine, Ohio on February 3rd, releasing tons of toxic chemicals including the carcinogen vinyl chloride into our air, water, and soil. In the two weeks since, we’ve already seen severe health and environmental consequences. This crisis was fully avoidable. It is the direct result of corporate greed, government negligence, and the dehumanization of working people. And right now, people in our communities need all of our leaders to do everything in their power to protect our families and make sure this never happens again. Will you join us in demanding that Ohio Governor Mike DeWine and Secretary of Transportation Pete Buttigieg take all necessary action to deliver for the people of East Palestine and surrounding communities? After the derailment, authorities decided to perform a “controlled release” of the spilled chemicals, including the carcinogenic vinyl chloride — burning them and releasing a plume of black smoke and odor spreading for miles.1 Residents have already reported sore throats, burning eyes, rashes, numbness, and more after even short contact with the fumes. Family pets and farm animals have dropped dead. And thousands of fish have reportedly died due to chemicals in the Ohio River.2 The harm this is all causing was predictable — and avoidable. For years, corporations like Norfolk Southern, the company responsible for the East Palestine derailment, have lobbied the federal government to weaken transportation safety rules. In 2017, after donating more than $6 million to Republican campaigns, the rail industry was successful in getting the Trump administration to rescind part of an existing rule that required better braking systems on rail cars carrying hazardous materials.3 Yet almost two weeks after the derailment here in Ohio, the U.S. Department of Transportation has made no effort to reinstate or strengthen that rule. 4** Meanwhile, Governor DeWine has refused to request an emergency declaration from President Biden, which would provide federal assistance programs through FEMA to help residents with recovery now and improve public infrastructure to prevent future disasters. The residents of East Palestine and neighboring communities have been failed by their government so far. But it’s not too late for leaders like Gov. DeWine and Sec. Buttigieg to take action. In solidarity, Aleena Starks Political Director Ohio Working Families Party P.S. If you or a loved one is in need of assistance in Ohio, or want to support affected residents in other ways, Sources: 1\. New York Times, February 15, 2023 2\. , The New Republic, February 13, 2023 3\. , The Lever , February 8, 2023 4\. , The Lever, February 10, 2023 Thoughts? Feedback? We want to hear it. Reply directly to this email and let us know. This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If you received this email as a forward and want to get the latest updates from the Working Families Party directly, The Working Families Party is the party of the multiracial working class, fighting for a nation that cares for all of us. Wanna learn more? And if you need to update your contact information, Other political groups have corporate donors. But we can pool our resources too. ** Paid for by Working Families Party National PAC (77 Sands St. #6, Brooklyn, NY, 11201). | | Sent via . body:
| | | Peter,
---
| | This is a HUGE deal.

We have just _**HOURS**_ to go until our mid-month deadline ENDS.

name: Dan Kildee
subject: My heart goes out to the Spartan community
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Dan Kildee
body:
| My heart goes out to the Spartan community after the tragic mass shooting at Michigan State University.

Schools and universities should be a safe place—a place where our children do not have to shelter in place or fear gun violence. It’s hard to fathom another Michigan school, so soon after the Oxford High School tragedy, becoming another site of a horrific mass shooting. We mourn the loss of life and keep those critically injured in our thoughts.

If you are a MSU student, faculty or community member struggling, free crisis counseling is available 24/7. Students can call CAPS at (517) 355-8270 and press “1′′ to speak with a crisis counselor. Community Health Counselors are available at (517) 346-8460.

Thank you to the law enforcement officers and first responders who acted quickly to respond to this tragedy.

**Like every American, I’m exhausted by another instance of mass gun violence. We are not helpless and have it in our power to act to prevent additional mass shootings.**

The American people, including the majority of law-abiding gun owners, support common-sense gun reform. Last Congress, I was proud to support the first bipartisan gun reform bill in decades to become law. But there is more we can do, including strengthening red flag laws, expanding safe storage, and universal background checks for all gun purchases. No one law will prevent every tragedy, but we can—and should—act to protect our communities from violence.

Sincerely,

Dan

---

* * *
**[Click here to unsubscribe from Dan's email list.](https://go.dankildee.com/p/GtS1XDhiKEaKvsmtIZ8RfQ2?unsubscribedata=22Alc8d1WRBoCREaiggqz0NLyynWPLt2%2B79v72zAXwAz9WrLlR%2B18w4j%2FVCwwYka%2B4G%2BFaX4AApYP%2FWjoRnBxgIsQ55o8wZO97MlvAc%2FlMAxI2iuM3t4b3zRBXuZUEQNRYlAmw1q47yAoslykl8KkT8GrE6G%2Blmap3BgRxzOg5RxLwGhTjw9ArwK4bPegfSIJ24LhckpZHuuypbH6zMqPh9mC6o1rv6qwZhRdWbrTE%2BwdCe%2BNAa%2F5V1LPUysPCJGU4t%2BjfBANAH%2B8ayPbFw1B8uJEJnpzmAawOVNdmbiKvXpgFJ6SHzR3K4Kug4Hs3g6ovGOnX1lq0D36WVPtVgcQS7EWBOYVwVa2QAFEs2ChuIxAfFo02L%2B%2FYgSBRSGBn0hHEVQcM5u%2F2EKGkdtrx%2FL78CZFR2H5L70KmXz%2BgIIAQTbr10BfHXLjp7luhuYXQfk)** Paid for by Friends of Dan Kildee

subject: "RNC urges GOP candidates to ‘go on offense’ on abortion in 2024"
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Dr. Kim Schrier for Congress
body:
After the Supreme Court overturned Roe v. Wade last year, Republicans made it clear rolling back reproductive rights even further was one of their top priorities. | RNC urges GOP candidates to ‘go on offense’ on abortion in 2024

"The Republican National Committee is doubling down on its antiabortion stance, formally urging GOP lawmakers and campaigns to “go on offense in the 2024 election cycle” and to pass the strictest antiabortion legislation possible."

Wade last year, Republicans made it clear rolling back reproductive rights even further was one of their top priorities. | RNC urges GOP candidates to ‘go on offense’ on abortion in 2024 "The Republican National Committee is doubling down on its antiabortion stance, formally urging GOP lawmakers and campaigns to “go on offense in the 2024 election cycle” and to pass the strictest antiabortion legislation possible." Peter, After the Supreme Court overturned Roe v. Wade last year, Republicans made it clear that rolling back reproductive rights even further was one of their top priorities. Now that they've gained control of the House majority, the Republican National Committee is urging lawmakers to pass the most restrictive anti-abortion legislation possible. Republicans have already passed two anti-abortion measures in the House this year, and we can expect them to ramp up their attacks on reproductive rights. name: BREAKING UPDATE (from RonBeGone.com)
subject: re: suing and bankruptcy and jail for journalists
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ron Be Gone, Inc
body:
DeSantis has gone too far this time...
| **_BREAKING from THE NEW YORK TIMES:_
"DeSantis Wants to ROLL BACK Press Freedom"** [](https://act.ronbegone.com/signup/PET20230215_FreePress?refcode=RBG_20230215_EMPET_E2_T0_AC&t=6&akid=1687%2E564421%2EZa_3QJ) We're boiling with rage at Ron DeSantis right now.

**The NYT just reported that DeSantis is going all-out DICTATOR in his attempt to destroy the Freedom of the Press.**

He wants to sue, bankrupt, and jail reporters who fight against him!

Listen, DeSantis is praying that good people like you don't take action to stop him.

[Our team has been fighting DeSantis since DAY ONE, and now we're launching a brand new petition to show public anger against his plot. We need to see 10,000 signatures to defend the press by 10:00 P.M. or else DeSantis will become a full-blown dictator!!](https://act.ronbegone.com/signup/PET20230215_FreePress?refcode=RBG_20230215_EMPET_E2_T0_AC&t=7&akid=1687%2E564421%2EZa_3QJ) | [SIGN IMMEDIATELY: ADD YOUR NAME TO STAND WITH THE PRESS AGAINST RON DESANTIS »](https://act.ronbegone.com/signup/PET20230215_FreePress?refcode=RBG_20230215_EMPET_E2_T0_AC&t=8&akid=1687%2E564421%2EZa_3QJ)
---
We know you're busy... but please, take a moment to read these key excerpts from the article:
"Over the course of an hour, Mr. DeSantis and his guests laid out a detailed case for **revisiting a landmark Supreme Court decision protecting the press from defamation lawsuits**."

"The decision set a higher bar for defamation lawsuits involving public figures, and for years it was viewed as sacrosanct. **That standard has empowered journalists to investigate and criticize public figures without fear that an unintentional error will result in crippling financial penalties.** "

"Mr. DeSantis, a likely Republican presidential candidate, **put the effort at the center of his war against the mainstream media.** "

"**Two justices on the conservative-majority Supreme Court, Clarence Thomas and Neil M. Gorsuch, have indicated their willingness to roll back the ruling** in written dissents in recent years..."

body:
New Hampshire Democrat Chuck Grassie, must face his extremist opponent, David Walker, in another special election in seven days! | | |
---
| | **The good news:** State Democrats had a strong start to 2023 – beating Republican extremists in four special elections in Pennsylvania and Virginia. **The bad news:** We only have **one week** before our Democrat Chuck Grassie goes toe-to-toe with his Republican opponent, David Walker, in a TOSS-UP New Hampshire special – and if we lose this it’ll be a HUGE blow to state Democrats. This is a toss-up, must-win race with so much at stake. If Chuck Grassie can win next Tuesday, it would be the first of _four_ seats needed for Democrats to take control of the New Hampshire House – and there’s already another critical special election on the books for this spring. So we truly mean it when we say your gift today could mean the difference between a win and a loss for candidates like Chuck in competitive special elections. name: HER Time
subject: Let’s chat about FEC deadlines
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the HER Time PAC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee
body:
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58787358/392246046/-2095412496?refcode=AU_HTP_FR_GEN_MQG_AC_20230215_PM2_V1_S2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS8xMDI1NDMiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYzdjNTRlODQtOWJhZC1lZDExLTk5NGQtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=zXuiYjaoYP38H8RDQ2pslC1x4tQgAONWIeqePAHPMlo=)
---
Hey Peter, let’s chat about FEC deadlines. At the end of every quarter, HER Time has to send all our fundraising numbers to the FEC, and then they’ll become public. Tons of people — Kevin McCarthy, GOP super PACs, and more — will be looking at our numbers to judge the strength of our team. This is the time when possible challengers to our frontline candidates like Lauren Underwood and Angie Craig may make final decisions on jumping into the race. If they look at our reports and see lackluster fundraising numbers, they might assume it’ll be an easy path to victory. That’s why it’s **SO** incredibly important to show strong numbers on these fundraising reports — not just in dollar amounts, but in the **number of donors we have. ** We want to show this movement is large, nationwide, fired up, and motivated to elect more women. We need to show off the power of this grassroots team, so we want to be able to include your name on that report, Peter. [_**Will you chip in ANY amount (even just $1!) to support our movement today? clean_body: | = Hey Peter, let’s chat about FEC deadlines. At the end of every quarter, HER Time has to send all our fundraising numbers to the FEC, and then they’ll become public. Tons of people — Kevin McCarthy, GOP super PACs, and more — will be looking at our numbers to judge the strength of our team. This is the time when possible challengers to our frontline candidates like Lauren Underwood and Angie Craig may make final decisions on jumping into the race. If they look at our reports and see lackluster fundraising numbers, they might assume it’ll be an easy path to victory. That’s why it’s SO incredibly important to show strong numbers on these fundraising reports — not just in dollar amounts, but in the number of donors we have. We want to show this movement is large, nationwide, fired up, and motivated to elect more women. We need to show off the power of this grassroots team, so we want to be able to include your name on that report, Peter. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = = | = = | = = Thanks! name: URD HQ
subject: Who is George Washington Carver?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by United Rural Democrats](https://click
body:
George Washington Carver called Iowa home, Peter. | | | Hi Peter — In honor of Black History Month this February, we want to spotlight inspiring Black Americans from rural America who deeply impacted communities across the country. People like George Washington Carver. Carver was born into slavery on a farm in Missouri and became one of the most influential agricultural scientists and inventors of the time. He was the first Black student at Iowa State, where he studied botany and horticulture. Later, Carver was appointed Iowa State's first Black faculty member. Carver then joined the Tuskegee Institute in Alabama at the invitation of Booker T. Washington. There, Carver influenced rural farming through his research on producing peanuts, pecans, and sweet potatoes to protect the soil and feed the South with nutritious crops. In honor of his groundbreaking research and inventions, President Franklin D. Roosevelt created the George Washington Carver National Monument – the first national monument for a Black American and also the first non-presidential national monument. George Washington Carver taught generations of Black Americans farming techniques and pioneered new uses for the crops that remain crucial for the health and prosperity of rural Americans today. United Rural Democrats is dedicated to continuing to promote the legacy of George Washington Carver and the countless other Black Americans who devoted their lives to helping uplift Black Americans and communities across the country. We look forward to continuing to support Black candidates, Black organizers, and Black voters today and every day. Thank you for your support, Peter. – United Rural Democrats HQ
---

But we’ve never let that stop us.
This past election, thousands of supporters chipped in to help fend off our far-right opponent and keep NV-03 blue. It was supporters like you, chipping in $10 or $20 that helped us prove the pundits wrong and win this race.
And even though the 2022 election feels like yesterday, we can’t lose sight of just how important it is that we prepare for 2024. All eyes will be on our district – the most competitive in Nevada – and the high-stakes Senate race which could determine control of the chamber.
_That means we’ll be up against historic spending from Republicans to flip Nevada red._

clean_body: | = | | Folks, do you have a moment? = = | | | = Look, this seat is one of the most competitive in the country. It’s why Republicans have been willing to spend tens of millions of dollars to defeat our grassroots campaign. But we’ve never let that stop us. This past election, thousands of supporters chipped in to help fend off our far-right opponent and keep NV-03 blue. It was supporters like you, chipping in $10 or $20 that helped us prove the pundits wrong and win this race. And even though the 2022 election feels like yesterday, we can’t lose sight of just how important it is that we prepare for 2024. All eyes will be on our district – the most competitive in Nevada – and the high-stakes Senate race which could determine control of the chamber. That means we’ll be up against historic spending from Republicans to flip Nevada red. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = | | = | | = | | = | | = | | = Thank you, Susie Lee | | = We believe that emails are the best way for our organization to stay in touch with supporters like you. name: =?utf-8?Q?Supervisor=20David=20Canepa?=
subject: RSVP Today! Caffeinate and Conversate with Canepa on Feb. 18th. in SSF at Philz Coffee
body:
| | | |
---
| | | Please join me and some special guest speakers for our Caffeinate and Conversate with Canepa monthly events on Saturday, February 18 at Philz Coffee in Westborough Square in South San Francisco from 10 a.m. to noon.

This month’s topic is about mental health, a timely issue considering the mass shooting in Half Moon Bay and for those residents who were severely impacted by the devastating storms that caused significant damage from flooding, mudslides, power outages and downed trees.

We will hear about the resources the county provides related to mental health, including behavioral health counseling and learn about nonprofit advocates that help to improve mental health services throughout our county, reduce the stigma associated with mental illness and support effective treatment and recovery programs.
[**_RSVP NOW!_**](https://davidcanepa.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a3c7592558e548bc8cc150aa5&id=143b2fcddc&e=c0babbc643)
[](https://davidcanepa.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a3c7592558e548bc8cc150aa5&id=dc5d2dc719&e=c0babbc643) In friendship, David J. Canepa
---

name: Kamala Harris
subject: Momentum is on our side, Derek →
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Democratic National Committee, **[www
body:
This is not the time to let up. It’s the time to finish the job. | |
---
At the start of this year, I was asked, _"What’s your one word for 2023?"_ And without any hesitation, I said, _"Momentum."_ This team has helped accomplish so much, from passing the biggest investment in tackling the climate crisis in history to creating 12 million new jobs -- the strongest two years of job growth _by a longshot._ Let me tell you: _Momentum is on our side, Derek._ This is not the time to let up. It’s not the time to pat ourselves on the back. It’s the time to finish the job. **To build on the progress we’ve made, we need the full support of this grassroots team to keep pushing our agenda forward. Will you donate $7 to help fund the resources Democrats are relying on to win races nationwide?**

clean_body: This is not the time to let up. It’s the time to finish the job. | | At the start of this year, I was asked, "What’s your one word for 2023?" And without any hesitation, I said, "Momentum." This team has helped accomplish so much, from passing the biggest investment in tackling the climate crisis in history to creating 12 million new jobs -- the strongest two years of job growth by a longshot. Let me tell you: Momentum is on our side, Derek. This is not the time to let up. It’s not the time to pat ourselves on the back. It’s the time to finish the job. To build on the progress we’ve made, we need the full support of this grassroots team to keep pushing our agenda forward. Will you donate $7 to help fund the resources Democrats are relying on to win races nationwide? It is incumbent now on all of us to keep working hard, but first I want to thank you personally, Derek. We could not have made these great strides were it not for you putting in so much effort, sacrifice, and faith in the goodness of who we are as a nation and what we are capable of achieving. This team’s generous support is funding the programs Democratic candidates across the country need to win elections. Thank you for your support, Kamala Kamala Harris Vice President of the United States Kamala Harris: Derivative of Adam Schultz / Biden for President Photo. name: Candace Owens
subject: The ugly truth about Black History Month
body:
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62327327:6m1fMiGKN:m:1:3331421248:4E8FED5CD86C522C8CF349FE06F9CDEE:r)

Peter,

It's Black History Month. . . The month when a bunch of people who know nothing about black history take the time to celebrate people like Frederick Douglas -- but have never read any of his works.

Black History Month isn't about celebrating the Black men and women who've changed the world for the better.

It's nothing more than a way for woke radicals to push identity politics and glorify division in America.

I don't want a Black History Month, and I can't say "why" better than Morgan Freeman did:

_" You're going to relegate my history to a month? **Black history is American history.** "_

My name is Candace Owens, and I am a co-founder of the BLEXIT Foundation. One of the reasons I helped found BLEXIT was to teach REAL history to Black and minority communities.

To teach true American history -- _and not the socialist, woke version that 's pushed today_ -- I've set a goal to raise $50,000 this month.

[_**Will you join me in the push for TRUE history by sending a gift of today? Click here to show your support >>>**_](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62327327:6m1fMiGKN:m:1:3331421248:4E8FED5CD86C522C8CF349FE06F9CDEE:r)

BLEXIT honors independent black voices like. . .

. . . Thomas Sowell, a well-known American conservative and is considered one of the most influential black conservatives who has authored over 40 books.

. . . Clarence Thomas, a Constitutional originalist and Associate Justice of the Supreme Court of the United States.

. . . Walter Williams, an American economist, commentator, author, and academic and former John M. Olin Distinguished Professor of Economics at George Mason University.

That's why I hope you'll join me in our effort to celebrate Black Excellence and work to build a better future for Black and minority communities. [_**Click here to send a gift >>>**_](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62327327:6m1fMiGKN:m:1:3331421248:4E8FED5CD86C522C8CF349FE06F9CDEE:r)

Here's how we're reaching Black and minority communities with American history:

**BLEXIT 's Liberation Camps** provide an American History curriculum to children in kindergarten through 8th grade who live in low-income communities. We also teach key life skills and character development.

The children experience 18 weeks of after-school programming, six weeks of full-day summer camp programming, 25 full-day programs when schools had in-service days, and 20 parents-night-out programs and field trips.

**And through our 43 State Chapters made up of more than 14,000 volunteers! **

Our chapter members bring BLEXIT's five pillars to life through events and outreach efforts to places where no other organizations can effectively reach to combat the victimhood mentality.
1. **Advocating** for School Choice.
2. **Promoting** criminal justice reform by developing positive relationships between police and minority communities.
3. **Championing** entrepreneurship and free enterprise.
4. **Developing** history programs that will inspire minority children.

Presenting the message of BLEXIT through art and live experiences.

BLEXIT State Chapter members work within their local communities to help change the narrative that surrounds America's minority communities.

My friend, can you help us reach our goal of raising $50,000 this month? **Click below to send your support.**

[_**Donate $35 >>>**_](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62327328:6m1fMiGKN:m:1:3331421248:4E8FED5CD86C522C8CF349FE06F9CDEE:r)
[_**Donate $50 >>>**_](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62327329:6m1fMiGKN:m:1:3331421248:4E8FED5CD86C522C8CF349FE06F9CDEE:r)
[_**Donate $100 >>>**_](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62327330:6m1fMiGKN:m:1:3331421248:4E8FED5CD86C522C8CF349FE06F9CDEE:r)
[_**Donate $250 >>>**_](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62327331:6m1fMiGKN:m:1:3331421248:4E8FED5CD86C522C8CF349FE06F9CDEE:r)
[_**Donate $500 >>>**_](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62327332:6m1fMiGKN:m:1:3331421248:4E8FED5CD86C522C8CF349FE06F9CDEE:r)
[_**Donate $1,000 >>>**_](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62327333:6m1fMiGKN:m:1:3331421248:4E8FED5CD86C522C8CF349FE06F9CDEE:r)
[_**Donate $2,500 >>>**_](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62327334:6m1fMiGKN:m:1:3331421248:4E8FED5CD86C522C8CF349FE06F9CDEE:r)
[_**Donate Any Amount >>>**_](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62327327:6m1fMiGKN:m:1:3331421248:4E8FED5CD86C522C8CF349FE06F9CDEE:r)

Thank you,

Candace Owens
President
BLEXIT Foundation

name: Harmeet Dhillon
subject: Have you seen what they're doing to our children?
body:
I’m asking for your immediate help to stop the radical Left’s medical mutilation of our children

| |
---
| | [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z7ed6ss45hsh9vnor7hhk140i21ac470c4335hag_rp22sh2s8i66pr3clgmaoj4clh2bs)
---
| | Dear Fellow Conservative, My name is Harmeet Dhillon, the founder and Chief Executive Officer of the Center for American Liberty, and I’m asking for your immediate help to stop the radical Left’s medical mutilation of our children in the name of “gender dysphoria.”
---
| | [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zeav1n17hbmv1kbtc3f51j2546asd5p9u12pajc8_rp22sh2s8i66pr3clgmaoj4clh2bs)
---
| We were recently on Tucker Carlson Tonight, announcing that we just launched a landmark case against the hospitals AND doctors who coerced Chloe Cole to transition to a “boy” at the young age of 13.
---
| | **In case you missed our announcement on Tucker’s show, let me quickly give you the details of our case:** As a young 13-year-old girl, doctors began transitioning Chloe to become a boy...
---
_This included putting her on experimental drugs like**Lupron** , a drug that has been used to chemically castrate violent sex offenders..._
---
_... Giving her constant testosterone injections..._ _... And removing both of her breasts in a double-mastectomy surgery at the age of 15._ **_How was this allowed to happen?_** It’s because the doctors and hospitals lied to the family -- including one powerful lie constantly used to scare parents into agreeing to this medical mutilation:
---
“Would you rather have a dead daughter or a live son?”
---
This lie is repeated to struggling families so doctors and hospitals can perform lucrative transgender medical experimentation on children... And I’m asking for your help today to put an end to it! [**Specifically, I’m asking you to make a one-time emergency donation of $25 today to hold the hospitals AND doctors responsible for their barbaric actions.**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zqc3bklqkiegg39qahhnl51uk4gcn0fs8rar2ea0_rp22sh2s8i66pr3clgmaoj4clh2bs) Because until these predators are held responsible things will never change... And if we don’t act right away, more and more children will be put under the knife and experimented on. Medical facilities are actively promoting, encouraging, and advertising these barbaric treatments to minors. Chloe has suffered physically, socially, emotionally, and psychologically from their lies and experiments. Chloe also has no idea if she’ll ever experience the profound joy of motherhood... and if she is able to one day have kids, she knows she will not be able to breastfeed them. The medical experimentation performed on Chloe as a young child caused permanent and irreversible damage to her body and the predators that did this must be held accountable... ...and that’s where you come in. [**Please make an urgent donation of $25 today - but of course if you can give more, say $35, $50, $100, $250 or more I would be eternally grateful. **](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z5p7rt13c5a3jhenka41arglko8q2llfum20fnjg_rp22sh2s8i66pr3clgmaoj4clh2bs) Whatever amount you’re able to give today will be used to hold these radical activists pushing this disgusting agenda on our children accountable. ** **
---
| | [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z6vt41sd1k74klegak8i77ss2mf30dlhme051lvo_rp22sh2s8i66pr3clgmaoj4clh2bs)
---
| So please, do not delay. Chloe’s landmark case is the case that can put a stop to these “physicians” abusing and mutilating children... With your help we can save many more lives like Chloe's.
---
| | [**So please consider a generous contribution of $25, 35, $50, $100, $250 or more today.**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z0dclr0cb2vomb0q895rrrgp7138sjj929li6vf8_rp22sh2s8i66pr3clgmaoj4clh2bs) Sincerely,
---
| |
---
|
---
| | P.S. We must put an end to the medical mutilation happening to thousands of children across the country -- and winning Chloe Cole’s landmark case is how we stop them. Our case holds the hospitals AND doctors responsible for their experimentation and will ensure that these predators who abuse our children in the name of a radical Left-wing agenda think again. [**I hope I can count on your urgent tax-deductible donation of $25, 35, $50, $100, $250 or more today.**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zfhl8lnltvkj27lp4ulhrtrplnj4lo299bl9ulvo_rp22sh2s8i66pr3clgmaoj4clh2bs)
---
| | [**DONATE NOW**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z1vlnciq2v2tju994rgipb2m3ta3pjdqguj86s1o_rp22sh2s8i66pr3clgmaoj4clh2bs)
---
| | [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zsjr1e7ljmp91akuqbejn7rg6443pnk6impd9us8_rp22sh2s8i66pr3clgmaoj4clh2bs)
---

---

---
PO Box 2510, Leesburg, VA 20177
---
---

625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

name: Firearms Policy Coalition
subject: Tell Congress to stop the Biden Anti-Gun Agenda
body:
| | Please see a special message from our sponsor.
---
| | | | [](http://trk.faithandlibertymail._gTkJbhvLKMeCeB8l1A)
---
Friend, President Biden is furious that Congress hasn't banned ALL of your guns yet. So he told ATF to do whatever it takes to restrict your rights and put millions of gun owners in the crosshairs. And now, just days ago, the ATF filed a MASSIVE, 238-page gun control regulation that will take effect in days... Unless you stand with us and ACT NOW. FPC works on the literal front lines of the 2A fight to defend YOUR rights and property. [**Friend, will you add your name right now to Firearms Policy Coalition's petition to Congress, telling our elected officials to STOP the Biden Anti-Gun Agenda?**](http://trk.faithandlibertymail.)
---
[Stop the Biden Anti-Gun Agenda](http://trk.faithandlibertymail.)
---
**If history is a guide, this year we could see gun-grabbing politicians try to impose:**
* A BAN on all semiautomatics
* A BAN on standard-capacity gun magazines
* A BAN on buying guns without a permit
* A forced REGISTRATION of all firearms
* An expansion of "red flag" CONFISCATION
* And more

These anti-gun bills could soon be dropping without warning. And We the People must speak up and tell our elected officials to STOP the Biden Anti-Gun Agenda before these dangerous policies get traction. [**Please add your name to FPC's urgent petition to Congress right now.**](http://trk.faithandlibertymail.)
---
[Stop the Biden Anti-Gun Agenda](http://trk.faithandlibertymail.)
---
This year, anti-gun tyrants will do everything they can to pass more legislation and increase federal power to restrict your rights. That's why our grassroots-powered movement to defend the Second Amendment, the Constitution, and your natural rights is more important than ever before. [**If you're on the side of FREEDOM, the CONSTITUTION, and the SECOND AMENDMENT, please sign your name to Firearms Policy Coalition's urgent petition to STOP the Biden Anti-Gun Agenda right now.**](http://trk.faithandlibertymail.) FPC is leading the fight to STOP anti-gun laws that infringe on the natural rights of peaceable people like yourself. While our opposition is well-funded by billionaires and special interests and has ARMIES of government lawyers, Firearms Policy Coalition has something they don't: freedom-loving Americans like you. This year could shape the future of the Second Amendment and YOUR rights for generations to come. [**Please stand with FPC in this important legal battle -- show your support by signing our petition to STOP the Biden Anti-Gun Agenda right now.**](http://trk.faithandlibertymail.) Stay free,
---

name: Michael Haley
subject: It’s official
body:
My wife is running to be your next President

My wife is running to be your next President
| |
---
| | |
Friend,

My name is Michael Haley, and I'm the proud husband of Nikki Haley.

I'm reaching out to tell you why there is no one better suited than my wife, Nikki, to be our next President of the United States.

Nikki has dedicated her life to serving this great country and its people, and she has always been driven by a deep love for America and a strong commitment to its future.

For as long as I've known Nikki, she has been a fearless defender of America's founding principles and conservative values.

**_I saw Nikki 's grit and determination on the campaign trail when she fought and won to become the first woman to serve as governor of South Carolina.

I witnessed her strength and grace as she defended America's greatness on the international stage as the U.S. Ambassador to the United Nations.
_
Now, I could not be more proud to support her as she takes her commitment to the American people to the next level to become our next President.**

As an accountant, state legislator, governor of South Carolina, and the United States Ambassador to the United Nations, Nikki has proven time and time again that she has the skills, the experience, and the leadership to make a difference in the lives of the American people for the better. But she can't do it alone. **[That's why I am humbly asking you to make a contribution of ANY amount to support her campaign today.](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2z4bd2inssc2e7qrjv7fnsl6spb6okeh07jm74qi8_rp22sh2s8i66pr3clgmaoj2c5h2bs "That’s why I am humbly asking you to make a contribution of ANY amount to support her campaign today.")**

name: Donald Trump Jr.

body:
Like my father, I'm outraged.

**_From the Desk of_**
**Donald Trump Jr.**
| | [](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z0e81lr8nddpfaairkj3sijaqq27t4igf3sjqfr0_rp22sh2s8i66pr3clgmaoj2c5h2bs)

---
Fellow Patriot,
Like my father, I'm outraged.
NEWSMAX -- a solid conservative news channel we trust -- was just cancelled by DirectTV and AT&T, the same guys who cancelled One America News (OAN) Network just last year.
What AT&T;'s DirecTV has NOT cancelled are 22 other liberal news channels, all of whom are carrying the water for Joe Biden and the left.
What's going on?
We're already into the 2024 Presidential election cycle, and they're responding to their Democrat overlords and _[censoring free speech](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zdkjohfi5f92t0srl1pep4dbekmldeauguk6g8h8_rp22sh2s8i66pr3clgmaoj2c5h2bs)_ so they can own the narrative.
Are YOU going to give away your right to know the truth?
I'm asking you to do one thing for me to help us save NEWSMAX, pick up your phone and call DirecTV to cancel!
**Call DirecTV toll-free at****[877-763-9762](tel:877-763-9762)****to cancel. **
You can also cancel AT&T wireless services and more at [**888-855-2338**](tel:888-855-2338).
[_Politely and professionally tell them that you would like to complain and cancel your DirecTV_](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zo77b3qhidrrng32n71fvh529ll56jrl4j7bmglo_rp22sh2s8i66pr3clgmaoj2c5h2bs) -- there is no substitute for NEWSMAX!
This is something you can do RIGHT NOW to protect free speech in America.
I'm counting on you.
Don Jr.

name: Trump News HQ
subject: You can learn from Rome’s history
body:
We generally remember ancient Rome for its sprawling empire and powerful emperors.

| This sponsored message from Trump Train News is on behalf of Hillsdale College | | [](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z2v8stamccem23jt9b9tsv8siub28oiak7dqt1b8_rp22sh2s8i66pr3clgm1o76cph2bs)
---
| |
Dear Fellow American, We generally remember ancient Rome for its sprawling empire and powerful emperors. But overlooked by our fascination with the might and drama of imperial Rome is the fact that Rome reached its greatness through a far different form of government. Did you know that Caesar Augustus inherited 90% of the territory of his Empire from the Roman Republic? The story of how the Roman Republic emerged from a group of warring tribes in the middle of the Italian peninsula to dominate the Mediterranean and, later, most of Europe is a captivating narrative of achievement, political and military genius, and the perils of success.
---
| | To help tell this important story to Americans nationwide, we recently released our free online course, **“The Rise and Fall of the Roman Republic.”** **[You can now receive your own DVD box set of “The Rise and Fall of the Roman Republic”](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zoi7shik1ub9hp7aduugcbmpbqjju32d85hp50ig_rp22sh2s8i66pr3clgm1o76cph2bs) when you make a tax-deductible gift of $100 or more in support of our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty. **
---
| [](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zgbrjulc26d9t6gen30a3o4otpbthl68sgiui39g_rp22sh2s8i66pr3clgm1o76cph2bs)
---
| | And, for a limited time, we’ll also send you a free color map of the Roman world at the end of the Republic printed on high-quality paper. This map is a helpful companion to the course DVD and will illustrate many of the topics discussed in the lectures. Simply use this secure link to reserve your DVD box set of **“The Rise and Fall of the Roman Republic,”** along with the companion map today: **[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/roman-republic-dvd](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zgrfadul7b6ej09i0lb9tobflq2rkticmc5165co_rp22sh2s8i66pr3clgm1o76cph2bs)** Learning the fascinating history of Rome reveals the conditions necessary to preserve a republic...and how a republic may lose its way. That’s why we produced **“The Rise and Fall of the Roman Republic”** and why I hope you’ll watch and share the course on DVD. Before I go, thank you for helping to preserve liberty for future generations of Americans through education with Hillsdale College! Best regards, Kyle Murnen, ’09 Director of Online Learning Hillsdale College
---

subject: From rising GOP star to top of the ticket
disclaimer_text: Paid for by SFA, Inc
body:
As American as apple pie

As American as apple pie
ACTION REQUIRED: Step up before it's too late.

| | | [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z0li907dcdfnlabk8e7oohofm9c1p1cohiup04fo_rp22sh2s8i66pr3clgm1o76cth2bs) [_**Nikki Haley 's story is an American story**_](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zcti6eetisou71lacteeef5v35vocnjno6n3ipe8_rp22sh2s8i66pr3clgm1o76cth2bs)
As the daughter of Indian immigrants, Nikki was taught to love God and her country. **Her parents sacrificed so much to pursue the American Dream. **

Working in her mother's dress shop in Bamberg, SC at age 12, Nikki wasn't given an easy path. But, she learned the value of hard work and the key to prosperity.

She studied at the University of Clemson and became a CPA.

When she realized that those in elected office were too comfortable with the status quo, she ran for the state legislature and unseated a 35-year incumbent. **_No one thought it was possible._**

She became a voice for freedom and government transparency -- demanding American values be protected and corrupt ideals (and politicians) be rejected. She launched a race for governor and was polling in single digits. She had little name ID and limited resources. But she pulled off a win, becoming the first female to lead the state. A two-term champion of economic growth, she earned her state a nickname -- Beast of the Southeast.

Trump took notice and named her U.S. Ambassador to the UN, where she fought to restore American strength. She stood toe to toe with the world's totalitarian leaders and reversed the script. America would no longer feed the hand that bit her.

**** American freedom and strength matter, but they are being eroded by Biden and the Left.
**And the American Dream is on the line in 2024.**
_****_
**Nikki is running for president to take back our country.** **Will YOU join her movement?**
**[If you stand for America, stand with Nikki by donating $25, $50, or even $100 to support her fight for freedom!](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zqincd5m8d3isjugcr5km3aeb5sp5i3je3cvkrto_rp22sh2s8i66pr3clgm1o76cth2bs)**
**[**JOIN NIKKI 'S FIGHT NOW **](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z94ocgpkb4qkcj8ghsv8c320t80hjd9e85dodb8g_rp22sh2s8i66pr3clgm1o76cth2bs)**

Friend, while __ Joe’s _already_ busy running for 2024, I’m working hard to reverse the Biden agenda and get America working for the people again.

---
| | Want to hear a crazy story? **I’m not your run-of-the-mill Republican.** I’m a true patriot and a conservative with a proven record of fighting for the American people.
**My election in 2020 was a bitter FIGHT.** At midnight on election day, I was ahead of my Democrat opponent by **NEARLY 30,000 VOTES!**

[](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z50ashl9onnbmklcdmnh2rbmk38rsaup7eug1ps8_rp22sh2s8i66pr3clgm1o76clh2bs)

Over the next **_90 DAYS_ ,** we fought against a team of lawyers who pulled out every shady tactic in the book to push my opponent ahead. After every ballot was scrutinized and legal vote counted, **I was declared the winner by a slim** _**109**_**votes! **

At the same, I was SPEARHEADING an effort to overturn the unconstitutional concealed carry laws that plagued states like mine. **And I won.**

name: David Horowitz
subject: Final Battle: The Next Election Could be the Last
body:
I’m writing you this email today because I’ve learned critical information about the far-left’s plan to turn America into a socialist nation

| |
---
| | Dear Fellow Conservative, I’m writing you this email today because I’ve learned critical information about the far-left’s plan to turn America into a socialist nation that will rock you to your core. **As a fellow conservative American, you simply cannot afford to ignore what’s happening to our country.** [**That’s why I’m offering you a FREE copy of my explosive new book that exposes the far-left’s evil plot - _FINAL BATTLE: the Next Election Could be the Last._**](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c659174%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=UZPbBHMK%2bVF6bNT2bdE9Og&sysid=1)
---
| | This is a can’t-miss deal that I pray you take advantage of today. My name is David Horowitz. I wrote **_FINAL BATTLE: The Next Election Could be the Last_ **because I’m committed to ending the reign of far-left Marxist elites. _Why?_ Well, 50 years ago... I _was_ a Marxist.
---
| [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c659185%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=VzZCsFPy6hXZwtkio%2f%2bjtw&sysid=1)
---
| | I was side by side with Huey Newton the leaders of the Black Panthers. I edited Ramparts - the largest magazine of the radical Left. I marched, I wrote manifestos, and I attacked America whenever and however I could. **Then the Panthers murdered my friend. The Left helped the Communists win the war in Vietnam. name: Nikki =?UTF-8?Q?Haley=E2=80=99s?= Story
subject: From rising GOP star to top of the ticket
disclaimer_text: Paid for by SFA, Inc
body:
Nikki is running for president to take back our country.

ACTION REQUIRED: Step up before it's too late.

| | | [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z390cll9i0a6q7kqpodfcl7jbruq5b55m5ltoqu0_rp22sh2s8i66pr3clim0or2clh2bs) [_**Nikki Haley 's story is an American story**_](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z8iusgt78ejkoqpcpvhg2np6cvk49d1d418g0gng_rp22sh2s8i66pr3clim0or2clh2bs)
As the daughter of Indian immigrants, Nikki was taught to love God and her country. **Her parents sacrificed so much to pursue the American Dream. **

Working in her mother's dress shop in Bamberg, SC at age 12, Nikki wasn't given an easy path. But, she learned the value of hard work and the key to prosperity.

She studied at the University of Clemson and became a CPA.

When she realized that those in elected office were too comfortable with the status quo, she ran for the state legislature and unseated a 35-year incumbent. **_No one thought it was possible._**

She became a voice for freedom and government transparency -- demanding American values be protected and corrupt ideals (and politicians) be rejected. She launched a race for governor and was polling in single digits. She had little name ID and limited resources. But she pulled off a win, becoming the first female to lead the state. A two-term champion of economic growth, she earned her state a nickname -- Beast of the Southeast.

Trump took notice and named her U.S. Ambassador to the UN, where she fought to restore American strength. She stood toe to toe with the world's totalitarian leaders and reversed the script. America would no longer feed the hand that bit her.

**** American freedom and strength matter, but they are being eroded by Biden and the Left.
**And the American Dream is on the line in 2024.**
_****_
**Nikki is running for president to take back our country.** **Will YOU join her movement?**
**[If you stand for America, stand with Nikki by donating $25, $50, or even $100 to support her fight for freedom!](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zdiiq4jjg2lhlk86g74j2omns9e2l8fq7b1m54v8_rp22sh2s8i66pr3clim0or2clh2bs)**
**[**JOIN NIKKI 'S FIGHT NOW **](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zvl69jjgjibh6ktsdup4l2qs78m7jvjoj3cbqlj0_rp22sh2s8i66pr3clim0or2clh2bs)**

name: Your America
subject: Watch these videos today
body:
Does America need a “Great Reset?”

| | | This sponsored message from Your America News is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c06214%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=XzQ8XHyzN7MX3Wt7RIb3Mg&sysid=1)
---
| |
Dear Fellow American, Does America need a “Great Reset?” In 2020, members of the world’s elite met at the World Economic Forum and launched the Great Reset initiative to transform the world economy. As Klaus Schwab--the founder and executive director of the Forum--wrote, “we need a ‘Great Reset’ of capitalism.” If successful, this would have the effect of canceling our American way of life. A recent Hillsdale College seminar considered the idea of the Great Reset, its ramifications for America, and pro-freedom alternatives. **This seminar --titled [“The Great Reset?](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c06225%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=7hukT910i03SdKa4g8sfug&sysid=1)****[”](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c06226%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=An2RVAY4kVn%2f6hIvfXgpMA&sysid=1)[](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c06214%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=XzQ8XHyzN7MX3Wt7RIb3Mg&sysid=1)--is now available as a free online video series.**

---
[](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c06227%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=cuumRjkRrPq7RHDZXq%2fRAA&sysid=1)
---
| |
Filmed on the Hillsdale campus, this video series will give you insight into:
* The origins and leaders of the Great Reset
* How the ideology of “woke capitalism” is infiltrating large corporations
* The connection between a cashless society and the Great Reset
* What “environmental justice” has to do with the Great Reset
* The Great Reset from China’s perspective
* Alternatives to the Great Reset

**You can receive instant access to this free video series right now using this secure link:** **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/the-great-reset-cca/](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c06228%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=NoxNdn2JeTi4RNFig4gR5g&sysid=1)** You will learn about the Great Reset, the dangers it poses, and pro-freedom alternatives. And you can share these lessons with your family, friends, and more. As America’s economy continues to struggle in the aftermath of disastrous elite decisions, lessons like these are essential to the defense of the free market and American liberty. Use the link above to receive your Great Reset video series today. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---

## Who Is The False Prophet?
---
| [ ](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=18209392.10583.1.fe721e6d37cbf4faca12226ac5938e74)
---
Last night at [Sheridan.Church](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=18209392.10584.1.f13f3d4112640aa6f1d698a51bf8cec9), I finished a teaching over [Revelation 13](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=18209392.10585.1.625a0c6f54469b42addbcd5569a6d64f) which is all about the **Antichrist** , **False Prophet** and **Image/Mark of the Beast**.
In this message the focus is on the **False Prophet** and what Scripture _indicates_ about him.
Check it out here: [www.youtube.com/live/xf5FCTNqVjw?feature=share](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=18209392.10586.1.34f1a0fbc8ad34c0267272a21a496470)
Thank you,
Jackson Lahmeyer
Follow me on [TruthSocial](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=18209392.10587.1.c166883514ce419e6cfac7278a96c03a), GAB, [Facebook](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=18209392.10588.1.644fc56ec18399e5131e146fb5813329), [Instagram](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=18209392.10589.1.924c66cf02f36e769f4ae73a80977293), [Twitter](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=18209392.10590.1.1d017fb45d43e97629b7e1489ce8f100), [Telegram](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=18209392.10591.1.368b8686472ada50ba8c72c7c8b78466), GETTR & [YouTube](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=18209392.10592.1.424d424b5ce2f0dd19f80e4c8c9a2ae6)).

## Who Is The Antichrist?
---
| [ ](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=18209392.10595.1.a38693fdfbdec962a4792d321669bfa6)
---
There is a TON of speculation about who the **Antichrist** is...
**Joe Biden**? **Hillary Clinton**? **Donald Trump**? **Pope Francis**? and on and on.
Right now, at [Sheridan.Church](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=18209392.10596.1.c6e55f2e997752a54408f1352bd98495) for our midweek service, I am doing a series over the [Book of Revelation](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=18209392.10597.1.d921a9d765ce084490b67546d8c99425) (_line by line and verse by verse_).
Last week, our study took us to **Revelation 13** which is all about the **Antichrist** , the **False Prophet** and the **Mark of the Beast**.
Here is a link to my perspective of what Scripture says regarding the Antichrist, False Prophet & Mark of the Beast: [www.youtube.com/live/LBy2Ix5PFc8?feature=share](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=18209392.10598.1.e14fc5ab5bf73b9c49bd480e29036214)
You can also watch the FULL SERIES over Revelation at: [https://youtube.com/playlist?list=PLZ0-pMl6zciQZxE5DSzcAKwH3M3DNQecu](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=18209392.10599.1.b0ed35e547e43a7d71e2b4584840d99d)
| | [ Support Sheridan.Church ](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=18209392.10600.1.7d50bdb09df3666a2b835a906fe8da1e)
---
---

The Left is rejoicing as DirecTV cancels Newsmax, one of America’s last remaining choices for conservative news. We can’t have a free press if the only TV networks we’re allowed to watch are those with a far-left perspective. **[Contact the executives at DirecTV](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.)** and demand that Newsmax be restored!

| | New York City government employees are being required to[ participate](http://lnk.teapartypatriots._bWlkPTQ2MzQ5JmlkPVQxOG85TG5ldWpIaGs5MVFRUSJ9/K69aBSwaGRZnKnwxKSR_Kg) in workplace racial equity training fueled by woke ideology. The training, approved by Mayor Eric Adams, informs employees that their ethnicity is based on neither science nor genetics, which are merely artificial constructs created for the purpose of oppression. The training clearly communicates tenets of [Critical Race Theory](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/7/eyJhaSI6NDkxMDk0ODksImUiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInJpIjoiVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFRIiwicnEiOiIwMi1iMjMwNDctZWJjNjJkMzI3YzExNGJmMDgxOWI4YTdjYWU2NTJkMDEiLCJwaCI6bnVsbCwibSI6ZmFsc2UsInVpIjoiNCIsInVuIjoiIiwidSI6Imh0dHBzOi8vd3d3LmZveG5ld3MuY29tL3VzL3doYXQtaXMtY3JpdGljYWwtcmFjZS10aGVvcnk_bWlkPTQ2MzQ5JmlkPVQxOG85TG5ldWpIaGs5MVFRUSJ9/LZU5sJhQtUV5OdVuxe2T1w), an ideology that pits people from different races against each other by perpetuating the false notion that one exists to oppress the other. "Race has no genetic or scientific basis," the training materials state. "It is a social construct created to classify people on the arbitrary basis of skin color and other physical features."
---
| | |
---
[](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.)
---
Is there any better indication that you don’t care about America’s safety than appointing Kamala Harris as your border czar? It’s clear Biden has never cared whether our border is secure. But House Republicans are holding historic hearings to hold him accountable. **[Sign your name to this petition](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.)** to **URGE CONGRESS** to keep up the pressure!
---
[TAKE ACTION](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.)
---
|

| | The Left will stop at nothing to undermine voter integrity in the next U.S. election cycle. An organization tied to leftwing billionaire Mark Zuckerberg and known for funneling huge sums of cash to county election offices in Democratic strongholds has struck again. This time, it is channeling [$2 million](http://lnk.teapartypatriots._9BEuMmcp4JsoJnw) in private funds to maximize voter turnout in deep-blue DeKalb County, Georgia, in an attempt to swing the election in favor of Democrat candidates. That's notwithstanding the fact that Georgia is among [24 states](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.) that has taken action to ban the abusive practice of private financing of election offices.
---
| | |
---
[](http://lnk.teapartypatriots._XvkG44kUBQxXA)
---
If studying the Constitution is U.S. Law 101, President Biden’s nominees are severely undereducated. His latest pick, Charnelle Bjelkengren, said repeatedly to Congress that she couldn’t recall the articles of the Constitution. Derek, **FIRST:** In Glenn Youngkin’s proposed budget he set aside $50,000 to jail women who receive abortions and the doctors who provide their care. **THEN:** The VA GOP followed that up by killing a bill, that the Senate Democrats passed, **that would prevent data from period tracker apps being acquired by law enforcement via a search warrant.** **NOW:** **We need to stop this authoritarian overreach from the Virginia GOP.** What used to be the party of small government is now using all the power it wields in state government to impose its radical beliefs on Virginia. name: Mike Pompeo
subject: The CCP's plot to infiltrate America CURRENTLY UNDERWAY AS WE SPEAK.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by McCarthy for Congress
body:
| |

body:
I'm writing you this email today because I've learned critical information about the far-left's plan to turn America into a socialist nation that will rock you to your core.

| |
---
| | Dear Fellow Conservative, I'm writing you this email today because I've learned critical information about the far-left's plan to turn America into a socialist nation that will rock you to your core. **As a fellow conservative American, you simply cannot afford to ignore what 's happening to our country.** [**That 's why I'm offering you a FREE copy of my explosive new book that exposes the far-left's evil plot - _FINAL BATTLE: the Next Election Could be the Last._**](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=54d2320e0462448b8c473bb7ba1a3179&_e=kEGBNgQyZspEHb95VIUTN2acVI8J2oRqKHxy3kKR5MgbM6QAMSJc59UDfkfLt-ZcWALN1e5DmFt4b0DVWAkhm40ImELikNmt7tPNJIbOl3iUzoxVGSHnBFBzA_KBRH0bj7_XLiFwycBto2rfTR5AVMMM9fsAQUkY2nEk24egYbJ1otDinQEhKcYARC4G5wsJ_Z7mgGG4p_TKn_gU_5eaFGWK7qnhhsJlIE49Jr6BjCQ-h9f3HmLgIAxLo3uQ_EkiI7WSomao6ZB5875y7kTi3zJNASOxCWkfTyFpaU1p0vvQMVLING_Hskm-8_QLoENUKwJwHYDGHmytYM2pnlwG078_wHO2thXA1Or9FJOTW88-4Xy7gBbCBZghLWi-o21o)
---
| | This is a can't-miss deal that I pray you take advantage of today. My name is David Horowitz. I wrote **_FINAL BATTLE: The Next Election Could be the Last_ **because I'm committed to ending the reign of far-left Marxist elites. _Why?_ Well, 50 years ago... I _was_ a Marxist.
---
| [](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=54d2320e0462448b8c473bb7ba1a3179&_e=kEGBNgQyZspEHb95VIUTN2acVI8J2oRqKHxy3kKR5MgbM6QAMSJc59UDfkfLt-ZcWALN1e5DmFt4b0DVWAkhm40ImELikNmt7tPNJIbOl3iUzoxVGSHnBFBzA_KBRH0bj7_XLiFwycBto2rfTR5AVMMM9fsAQUkY2nEk24egYbJ1otDinQEhKcYARC4G5wsJ_Z7mgGG4p_TKn_gU_5eaFGWK7qnhhsJlIE49Jr6BjCRE6S31QqGTQrFLPz9s_hXFU53AN276W5_2Jgsbh8T1JCbrJxsr7Q6mmdKQEfNU-WZh6uABAj6BGfPCVB467Y4RDtoVIOvsws1Ehp71e7swBAr1CVjaOt4dmt26XLrp1rlycGMG0GhYMGcRpB92HMqy)
---
| | I was side by side with Huey Newton the leaders of the Black Panthers. I edited Ramparts - the largest magazine of the radical Left. I marched, I wrote manifestos, and I attacked America whenever and however I could. **Then the Panthers murdered my friend. The Left helped the Communists win the war in Vietnam. My eyes opened to the incredible destruction and evil my "comrades" made possible.** So, I left. I cast my 1984 ballot for Ronald Reagan and never looked back. I created the David Horowitz Freedom Center to fight the Left and dedicated my life to exposing them. I did it because I knew first-hand the threat our country was facing. I knew what was at stake, and I knew that if I didn't tell the American people what I knew, _we would lose our country forever._ **And now, I published this book because Americans must wake up and realize just how close our nation is to succumbing to the far-left 's Socialist plot.** [**Claim your copy of _FINAL BATTLE: The Next Election Could be the Last_ HERE.**](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=54d2320e0462448b8c473bb7ba1a3179&_e=kEGBNgQyZspEHb95VIUTN2acVI8J2oRqKHxy3kKR5MgbM6QAMSJc59UDfkfLt-ZcWALN1e5DmFt4b0DVWAkhm40ImELikNmt7tPNJIbOl3iUzoxVGSHnBFBzA_KBRH0bj7_XLiFwycBto2rfTR5AVMMM9fsAQUkY2nEk24egYbJ1otDinQEhKcYARC4G5wsJ_Z7mgGG4p_TKn_gU_5eaFGWK7qnhhsJlIE49Jr6BjCSpL_WGYkmEeokboOkqs0xpUQ6K6zIYZ0zOJTSY9lKiBKZMUe1cv5u4ALQJ4fHOHFuPf3STid7VC2Df587ugUyVeDqNnuF-SSK_J9Rdw8cfmXDOWpXFZtC6wo29iTueEhaQbHXr7f3lt-Xv4CnTe599) This book exposes the REAL truth that every American must hear. But don't just take it from me. Take it from these raving critic reviews:
---
| |
---
| **"David Horowitz exposes the outrages perpetrated by the Biden administration and the Democratic left."**** **
---
**\-- Dinesh D'Souza**

**New York Times Bestselling Author and Filmmaker**
---

| **_"Final Battle_ may be the most devastating book-length indictment of the Democratic Party yet written. This is nothing less than a handbook for the salvation of the United States of America."**

**\-- Dennis Prager**

**Nationally Syndicated Radio Talk Show Host**

| | My friend, I hold NOTHING back in this latest release - which is why I want you to have a free copy of it today. I want you to see, in detail, the shocking revelations I found about:

* The un-twisted story of January 6th.

body:
We generally remember ancient Rome for its sprawling empire and powerful emperors. | | | This sponsored message from Freedom Nation Today is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=091b7140ab3c467c9b9449e8af89b4e7&_e=TCFC5jY_4yROEz7qUWthl-UCmQwxfoVhbubBpQvU6yN6VRj0COWwC8STvvv_RNg1YbhKlpHFiKQ8KZnjG0kZb9ZBrK-2J8_wFOvnp3cRyIwI9ph3psyvX4P-hXHeOwa2W-ZickeR6FBpQmGFHSexMBpuQVtqlUaAYEovZtna93OyGcZewC3mcDU2tge5EOEuijx_mMREJftsqOvE4AEPFNVXY55PEoTVSi3JOZ0QXBEmQRoSZzb0ucHTkZ5D4Z-bxfdS6CzCjW7aCwvssFtDEo08Yd4lsvxGatT404xnbUTyl0l-R2nhFijAXKmaMAtKPuMFUMjbgqcpoF3lsc4lZbGlxkngm1wZeSRh2-MX23BdrBJuu3aYyU4ASuE9dX3Cb5xZoVtpAMSOZxBpKln0WQ%3D%3D)
---
| | Dear Fellow American, We generally remember ancient Rome for its sprawling empire and powerful emperors. But overlooked by our fascination with the might and drama of imperial Rome is the fact that Rome reached its greatness through a far different form of government. Did you know that Caesar Augustus inherited 90% of the territory of his Empire from the Roman Republic? The story of how the Roman Republic emerged from a group of warring tribes in the middle of the Italian peninsula to dominate the Mediterranean and, later, most of Europe is a captivating narrative of achievement, political and military genius, and the perils of success.
---
| | To help tell this important story to Americans nationwide, we recently released our free online course, **" The Rise and Fall of the Roman Republic." ** **[You can now receive your own DVD box set of"The Rise and Fall of the Roman Republic"](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=091b7140ab3c467c9b9449e8af89b4e7&_e=TCFC5jY_4yROEz7qUWthl-UCmQwxfoVhbubBpQvU6yN6VRj0COWwC8STvvv_RNg1YbhKlpHFiKQ8KZnjG0kZb9ZBrK-2J8_wFOvnp3cRyIwI9ph3psyvX4P-hXHeOwa2W-ZickeR6FBpQmGFHSexMBpuQVtqlUaAYEovZtna93OyGcZewC3mcDU2tge5EOEuijx_mMREJftsqOvE4AEPFNVXY55PEoTVSi3JOZ0QXBEmQRoSZzb0ucHTkZ5D4Z-b45NKfmfcan7fw8o5QBzYjP7t-m-IJHF6FGYxxWbLwpltRjbyviGR_V_NjhK75wr7nhMbL8yCCkzyw6W7cK8uWsEiQ5CryH7hthEd-5z9YtygeuCfG9TppXs6bWi_0cDF1bdelQaU3NV2Pi7qlqqXVA%3D%3D) when you make a tax-deductible gift of $100 or more in support of our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty. **
---
| [](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=091b7140ab3c467c9b9449e8af89b4e7&_e=TCFC5jY_4yROEz7qUWthl-UCmQwxfoVhbubBpQvU6yN6VRj0COWwC8STvvv_RNg1YbhKlpHFiKQ8KZnjG0kZb9ZBrK-2J8_wFOvnp3cRyIwI9ph3psyvX4P-hXHeOwa2W-ZickeR6FBpQmGFHSexMBpuQVtqlUaAYEovZtna93OyGcZewC3mcDU2tge5EOEuijx_mMREJftsqOvE4AEPFNVXY55PEoTVSi3JOZ0QXBEmQRoSZzb0ucHTkZ5D4Z-b74GUeXfh8z1JGMH6Rahy59eDYGdaNwPK9saxMGP10h8J6LTOGzpz3lS_trgKk5EnTh_uJxf3NQ_rP5Y76_uQ2ACKeaNJO2vORhRnBGBYc8K5x-Dn7MHZOg_i3FdD4ROyY3BxvTHTlhpzWgAnrtHhqQ%3D%3D)
---
| | And, for a limited time, we'll also send you a free color map of the Roman world at the end of the Republic printed on high-quality paper. This map is a helpful companion to the course DVD and will illustrate many of the topics discussed in the lectures. Simply use this secure link to reserve your DVD box set of **" The Rise and Fall of the Roman Republic," **along with the companion map today: **[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/roman-republic-dvd](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=091b7140ab3c467c9b9449e8af89b4e7&_e=TCFC5jY_4yROEz7qUWthl-UCmQwxfoVhbubBpQvU6yN6VRj0COWwC8STvvv_RNg1YbhKlpHFiKQ8KZnjG0kZb9ZBrK-2J8_wFOvnp3cRyIwI9ph3psyvX4P-hXHeOwa2W-ZickeR6FBpQmGFHSexMBpuQVtqlUaAYEovZtna93OyGcZewC3mcDU2tge5EOEuijx_mMREJftsqOvE4AEPFNVXY55PEoTVSi3JOZ0QXBEmQRoSZzb0ucHTkZ5D4Z-bur3GeHfe6zm-8d_m5dytTk6MFUQH1wLJw7iQxdRzFnSjt1XuX96mS2rYubyILFP8G-DxxGHogzDLnYqcTnx8N0dbg8wAWFAbLu-cstJyAvbuQzynmn8-iUPYqd1thbSQKiUwO3D1LRPbCFnBF5hokA%3D%3D)** Learning the fascinating history of Rome reveals the conditions necessary to preserve a republic...and how a republic may lose its way. That's why we produced **" The Rise and Fall of the Roman Republic" **and why I hope you'll watch and share the course on DVD. Before I go, thank you for helping to preserve liberty for future generations of Americans through education with Hillsdale College! Best regards, Kyle Murnen, '09 Director of Online Learning Hillsdale College
