name: Nikki Haley
subject: I am running for President of the United States of America!
body:
I'm reaching out to you with my plans for the future and I want you to play an important part.

I'm reaching out to you with my plans for the future and I want you to play an important part.
| |
---
| | | | [](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=1314be91a4c64b4e9189fe906d935567&_e=A3qY1fA4T-S7nCJI_BPWbDO8DaccdWrS_eNWI_KfqztGFGOvEOr9rg7mZzPPOw5ma8tyQWyFxKDmjFqqS9O702cm-V_wuHky6pbedWvod2RKLqcFpbnwx9dHWz2fmpF4E3zq6lkx-Dyl0MboL8crA4RTGg_8aHGv8hvxpVCfruxe11wVB5Q3n9WbuXRryOTOhXD0t2-XZEInXw-Sk8vqu4DINNoscswEOKL5z-V3_TGws1YtQewGflX6Bf6fPzsN_ShtIZkawXynuVepF4cKVhTu56OOXIZ0idnhzVKDAyp5YwrmW9TwAkbApwRxEyDQExcbiXoy0yfl1TAjdqv-HADg9_5RBIaBVeSdJNwR9fAQjDeBX2guNFkV_CSGnlLojl_FtF09ANVoaQzTvdjB2LjV6V2BJVeScs1OEjpIpWMPampQjEjIWlB2DvyDdNMayioXWIiyczkN28sWtEcYXct-tW8XL4yFC-poB4PZMSK7iVksp9ZHuj2Kn2V5_VO9YUWRDkiBdRAzn9ux4_AgCvB5wJF_cptuxvXY4JGtgu2WeU9abU6zwPNlqepcN5DamPHn8HtbHB0XerlSiRp-xdxiE1JviaJlNIMFw6JhQI92ON9KUxEff3AYVetY5fx6mGdQAOQpiUHG2kiA0fAnuf2pM888ug0kjTxMzQsKcV0fMYrABY01wUi_ZMpN4mPpDbvPIaojFrKqnFusdrvLMx95a9RHuyxyW8sTLVqLtGM%3D)
---

Dear Friend,

I have an announcement to make.

**I am running for President of the United States of America!**

I am running because America is falling behind.

Our future is slipping. Our leaders are failing us.

Right now, in the greatest country in human history, we have too many families paying too much for groceries; too many mothers searching frantically for baby formula; and too many children who are so far behind in the classroom, they might never get ahead.

We have too many small businesses who can't afford rent, and too many big businesses getting taxpayer bailouts.

We have too much __crime__ on our streets - too many __drugs__ flooding our cities - and too few __police__ and border patrol.

And from Joe Biden on down, our leaders put too much trust in big government and too little trust in the American people.

They have us spiraling toward socialism, with a new trillion-dollar spending bill every few months, and a national debt over 30 trillion dollars.

This is not the America I want to leave to my children!

I am running for President because I know that we can do better. **[Will you join me in this mission?](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=1314be91a4c64b4e9189fe906d935567&_e=A3qY1fA4T-S7nCJI_BPWbDO8DaccdWrS_eNWI_KfqztGFGOvEOr9rg7mZzPPOw5ma8tyQWyFxKDmjFqqS9O702cm-V_wuHky6pbedWvod2RKLqcFpbnwx9dHWz2fmpF4E3zq6lkx-Dyl0MboL8crA4RTGg_8aHGv8hvxpVCfruxe11wVB5Q3n9WbuXRryOTOhXD0t2-XZEInXw-Sk8vqu4DINNoscswEOKL5z-V3_TGws1YtQewGflX6Bf6fPzsN_ShtIZkawXynuVepF4cKVhTu56OOXIZ0idnhzVKDAyp5YwrmW9TwAkbApwRxEyDQExcbiXoy0yfl1TAjdqv-HADg9_5RBIaBVeSdJNwR9fAQjDeBX2guNFkV_CSGnlLojl_FtF09ANVoaQzTvdjB2LjV6V2BJVeScs1OEjpIpWMPampQjEjIWlB2DvyDdNMayioXWIiyczkN28sWtEcYXct-tW8XL4yFC-poB4PZMSK7iVksp9ZHuj2Kn2V5_VO9YUWRDkiBdRAzn9ux4_AgCvB5wJF_cptuxvXY4JGtgu2WeU9abU6zwPNlqepcN5DamPHn8HtbHB0XerlSiRp-xfBQ05wYazcMMPYZwmcW-5o4Ndyt1lO8fWvsRfDhwuY8GHP7dz_VM-mKpR-YXN6svs86r6TrMLSThW-kwSmJ_UVpuSKWe-xGgNK9Nn_7Tn6L3C_YFnTvnF-5x03sjnzaQrbi2NfxGmvCxoTm0HVPKAc%3D "Will you join me in this mission?")**

I am the proud daughter of legal immigrants. My parents left India in search of a better life. They found it in Bamberg, South Carolina - population, 2,500. It wasn't always easy. We were the only Indian family in our small town. Nobody knew who we were, what we were, or why we were there. But my parents knew.

Every day, my parents reminded me, my brothers, and my sister that even on our worst day, we are blessed to live in America. They were right then - and they're right now!

My parents came to a country that was gaining strength and growing in confidence. But that was then. Now, every day America falls further behind.

_My purpose in running for President is to save our country from the downward spiral of socialism and defeatism._ I aim to move America upward toward freedom and strength.

As my family and I start this journey, we ask for your prayers. And yes, of course, we ask for your vote.

But there's something else we need even more. Something our country needs above all else...
It's your __spirit__ and your __belief__ in America.

Look past the failed ideas and leaders in Washington - and find the courage to be part of the __solution__.

Cast off the fear that our best days are behind us - and join the movement for our country's renewal.

**[See the same America I see... and stand for America, together with me.](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=1314be91a4c64b4e9189fe906d935567&_e=A3qY1fA4T-S7nCJI_BPWbDO8DaccdWrS_eNWI_KfqztGFGOvEOr9rg7mZzPPOw5ma8tyQWyFxKDmjFqqS9O702cm-V_wuHky6pbedWvod2RKLqcFpbnwx9dHWz2fmpF4E3zq6lkx-Dyl0MboL8crA4RTGg_8aHGv8hvxpVCfruxe11wVB5Q3n9WbuXRryOTOhXD0t2-XZEInXw-Sk8vqu4DINNoscswEOKL5z-V3_TGws1YtQewGflX6Bf6fPzsN_ShtIZkawXynuVepF4cKVhTu56OOXIZ0idnhzVKDAyp5YwrmW9TwAkbApwRxEyDQExcbiXoy0yfl1TAjdqv-HADg9_5RBIaBVeSdJNwR9fAQjDeBX2guNFkV_CSGnlLojl_FtF09ANVoaQzTvdjB2LjV6V2BJVeScs1OEjpIpWMPampQjEjIWlB2DvyDdNMayioXWIiyczkN28sWtEcYXct-tW8XL4yFC-poB4PZMSK7iVksp9ZHuj2Kn2V5_VO9YUWRDkiBdRAzn9ux4_AgCvB5wJF_cptuxvXY4JGtgu2WeU9abU6zwPNlqepcN5DamPHn8HtbHB0XerlSiRp-xVXMGxXrsxBHoOsD1KB_YT_S_TRnuf9PYbT0j9CcR4ODlZ5mQXwZYWaMbt2pZhuqvPf66zVbaU-_RE4KvZnS-Kguixxy8zyezu0axn9i-5JMW9_ppz_qhch4zOOE10IEr6WuJIFNRY7lS7uhi8XBRv8%3D "See the same America I see... and stand for America, together with me.")**

I'm more confident than ever that we can make this vision real in our time - because that's what I've seen my entire life.

As a brown girl, growing up in a black-and-white world, I saw the promise of America unfold before me.

As the proud wife of a combat veteran, I saw our people's deep love of freedom, and determination to defend it.

As Governor, I saw our state move beyond hate and violence, and lift everyone in peace.

And as Ambassador, I saw that America is still the standard.

The time has come to renew that spirit and rally our people.

Our moment is now - and our mission is clear.

Let's save our country and _secure_ our future. And let's move forward, _together_ , toward our destiny - in a _strong_ and _proud_ America!

I appreciate your support more than you can imagine. **[If you can join us today by chipping in, it would mean so much to me.](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=1314be91a4c64b4e9189fe906d935567&_e=A3qY1fA4T-S7nCJI_BPWbDO8DaccdWrS_eNWI_KfqztGFGOvEOr9rg7mZzPPOw5ma8tyQWyFxKDmjFqqS9O702cm-V_wuHky6pbedWvod2RKLqcFpbnwx9dHWz2fmpF4E3zq6lkx-Dyl0MboL8crA4RTGg_8aHGv8hvxpVCfruxe11wVB5Q3n9WbuXRryOTOhXD0t2-XZEInXw-Sk8vqu4DINNoscswEOKL5z-V3_TGws1YtQewGflX6Bf6fPzsN_ShtIZkawXynuVepF4cKVhTu56OOXIZ0idnhzVKDAyp5YwrmW9TwAkbApwRxEyDQExcbiXoy0yfl1TAjdqv-HADg9_5RBIaBVeSdJNwR9fAQjDeBX2guNFkV_CSGnlLojl_FtF09ANVoaQzTvdjB2LjV6V2BJVeScs1OEjpIpWMPampQjEjIWlB2DvyDdNMayioXWIiyczkN28sWtEcYXct-tW8XL4yFC-poB4PZMSK7iVksp9ZHuj2Kn2V5_VO9YUWRDkiBdRAzn9ux4_AgCvB5wJF_cptuxvXY4JGtgu2WeU9abU6zwPNlqepcN5DamPHn8HtbHB0XerlSiRp-xTckJNcDaKGyhsPIvv8SLqkr9yYKLCQ5aRShSGoTvp4p0rfYrqYpVR9VdePSESbo2fzJQiUHR7S9NfNHPCtMniO0irkjY5OCSVanL0HAaSlg_KWIbE-A0DaYjooGZ26Y1EFevshjigdsHYK7I_tsMFI%3D "If you can join us today by chipping in, it would mean so much to me.")**

Thank you for everything you do for our country.

My very best,

---
| [](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=1314be91a4c64b4e9189fe906d935567&_e=A3qY1fA4T-S7nCJI_BPWbDO8DaccdWrS_eNWI_KfqztGFGOvEOr9rg7mZzPPOw5ma8tyQWyFxKDmjFqqS9O702cm-V_wuHky6pbedWvod2RKLqcFpbnwx9dHWz2fmpF4E3zq6lkx-Dyl0MboL8crA4RTGg_8aHGv8hvxpVCfruxe11wVB5Q3n9WbuXRryOTOhXD0t2-XZEInXw-Sk8vqu4DINNoscswEOKL5z-V3_TGws1YtQewGflX6Bf6fPzsN_ShtIZkawXynuVepF4cKVhTu56OOXIZ0idnhzVKDAyp5YwrmW9TwAkbApwRxEyDQExcbiXoy0yfl1TAjdqv-HADg9_5RBIaBVeSdJNwR9fAQjDeBX2guNFkV_CSGnlLojl_FtF09ANVoaQzTvdjB2LjV6V2BJVeScs1OEjpIpWMPampQjEjIWlB2DvyDdNMayioXWIiyczkN28sWtEcYXct-tW8XL4yFC-poB4PZMSK7iVksp9ZHuj2Kn2V5_VO9YUWRDkiBdRAzn9ux4_AgCvB5wJF_cptuxvXY4JGtgu2WeU9abU6zwPNlqepcN5DamPHn8HtbHB0XerlSiRp-xTS8eBb8X4jSxOxBPhe9B4VWAsNUXBlGM_Qbh-_GKhB5PadtB0uEIipco5Q9ockk3WPjFvdqHSfXa8geBepYp4FdY7N2SiwKLiZVatUh6mQS6-vbWPwSHPCNZczb4eQdAlgb_EQjqqfVDRrTZBSQ0Qk%3D)
---

clean_body: I'm reaching out to you with my plans for the future and I want you to play an important part. I'm reaching out to you with my plans for the future and I want you to play an important part. | | | | | | Dear Friend, I have an announcement to make. I am running for President of the United States of America! I am running because America is falling behind. Our future is slipping. Our leaders are failing us. Right now, in the greatest country in human history, we have too many families paying too much for groceries; too many mothers searching frantically for baby formula; and too many children who are so far behind in the classroom, they might never get ahead. We have too many small businesses who can't afford rent, and too many big businesses getting taxpayer bailouts. We have too much crime on our streets - too many drugs flooding our cities - and too few police and border patrol. And from Joe Biden on down, our leaders put too much trust in big government and too little trust in the American people. They have us spiraling toward socialism, with a new trillion-dollar spending bill every few months, and a national debt over 30 trillion dollars. This is not the America I want to leave to my children! I am running for President because I know that we can do better. "Will you join me in this mission?" I am the proud daughter of legal immigrants. My parents left India in search of a better life. They found it in Bamberg, South Carolina - population, 2,500. It wasn't always easy. We were the only Indian family in our small town. Nobody knew who we were, what we were, or why we were there. But my parents knew. Every day, my parents reminded me, my brothers, and my sister that even on our worst day, we are blessed to live in America. They were right then - and they're right now! My parents came to a country that was gaining strength and growing in confidence. But that was then. Now, every day America falls further behind. My purpose in running for President is to save our country from the downward spiral of socialism and defeatism. I aim to move America upward toward freedom and strength. As my family and I start this journey, we ask for your prayers. And yes, of course, we ask for your vote. But there's something else we need even more. Something our country needs above all else... It's your spirit and your belief in America. Look past the failed ideas and leaders in Washington - and find the courage to be part of the solution. Cast off the fear that our best days are behind us - and join the movement for our country's renewal. "See the same America I see... and stand for America, together with me." I'm more confident than ever that we can make this vision real in our time - because that's what I've seen my entire life. As a brown girl, growing up in a black-and-white world, I saw the promise of America unfold before me. As the proud wife of a combat veteran, I saw our people's deep love of freedom, and determination to defend it. As Governor, I saw our state move beyond hate and violence, and lift everyone in peace. And as Ambassador, I saw that America is still the standard. The time has come to renew that spirit and rally our people. Our moment is now - and our mission is clear. Let's save our country and secure our future. And let's move forward, together , toward our destiny - in a strong and proud America! I appreciate your support more than you can imagine. "If you can join us today by chipping in, it would mean so much to me." Thank you for everything you do for our country. My very best, | Nikki Haley P.S. I know that together we can save our country. I am so thankful for your support. "If you can chip in even $5 it would mean so much to me. name: Cliff Schecter, Blue Amp Action
subject: Lauren Boebert has an official challenger for 2024!
body:
You heard the announcement?
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
| | | _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tbe741ad5-4c6b-452f-b0da-c786464eb10b/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
---
|
---
| |
---
| | | | | Peter, **_EXCITING!!_** _**Adam Frisch, who only lost to the loathsome Lauren Boebert by 546 votes, just announced that he’s running against her again in 2024!!**_ **_There's no reason to think Frisch won't beat Boebert if he has the resources he needs, in what will be a presidential year with higher Democratic turnout _****_in Colorado_**** _._** [**_Can you RUSH Adam Frisch $5, $10 or $25 or whatever you can for a HUGE launch week and a great start, making up 547 votes and ridding our Capitol of seditionist Lauren Boebert?_**](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tcb61e6f2-c88d-4b11-9f93-c867b1803f43/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) From his announcement on Twitter: [](https://default.salsalabs.org/T5f6022f2-45b2-4f9d-8ddf-63d5093925c7/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) _**Meanwhile, Boebert either didn't learn a thing from her close shave or is simply unable to learn. August of 2022 her neighbor called 911 because Boebert and her husband--who was arrested in the past for exposing himself to teenage girls at a bowling alley--threatened them.**_ That's a sentence I never imagined having to write.
---
|
---
| | | | | | [**DONATE NOW**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T3fe1d554-70f0-45de-890f-e855ee96b004/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| **_Boebert wants to arrest everyone who investigated Trump, impeach President Biden--just because--and defund Ukraine so Putin can annihilate the country. These are the positions of a fascist. Just because she's stupid, don't let it convince you she's not dangerous. She's both._** [**_Can you RUSH Adam Frisch $5, $10 or $25 or whatever you can for a HUGE launch and great start, making up 547 votes and ridding our Capitol of seditionist Lauren Boebert?_**](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tad6432f0-1fd8-4a67-94bf-fe9aacbde1af/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) **This race is so important. We greatly thank you for contributing.** Cliff

| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T91232107-e1e6-453f-9c50-10ccc0915f43/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

This isn't an email we like sending, friend – but we just fell short of our crucial mid-month fundraising goal.
Senate control could once again come down to Nevada, which is why experts at _The Washington Post_ are calling Jacky Rosen one of the most endangered senators on the ballot. **At a moment when every fundraising goal is critical to getting our reelection campaign off to the strongest possible start, missing this goal could mean handing the GOP a massive early fundraising advantage.**
**[So please, friend, will you rush $5 or more right now to help us make up this shortfall, keep Nevada blue, and defend our Democratic Senate majority?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58810425/392310226/610767770?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk2336-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3MWZhM2E4YS0xOGFlLWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=JhbVYGD5ncDXl3W3J3nChbPDsh_TLL2-V776vS9E_1U=)**

name: Speaker Kevin McCarthy
subject: Omar- FIRED. Swalwell- FIRED. Schiff- FIRED.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by McCarthy for Congress
body:
[View this message in your browser](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2zgkg6vc7p225nlv8le2gaq3lru9qm213jlufl6eo_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgeppef9t56ej3fctmekp76t1heipnacpne4pqcdtlmui34thgmipnadt4sbp65ttk6hibfcblm9gj1dr0shon2cri6pir5dphe5ojcs36murm6tj6mlge4pj1mpjrfkjge9i3cc5icpp78cbmc3gb8p9gs2qj2p76cpj32s5lmgrr4tj66jibad37m2qmash1k8gn48n24hhmeor5cdhm4p70s8iv0)

| |
---
| | | Let's set the record straight.

I fired Ilhan Omar because she was hurling anti-semitic and anti-American Remarks across social media. This is UNACCEPTABLE behavior for a member of a committee representing America on the world stage.

I fired Eric Swalwell from the intelligence committee because he became entangled with a spy for the Chinese Communist party. I do not have to explain to you why this would be a conflict of interest for someone sitting on the Intelligence Committee.

I fired Adam Schiff from the Intelligence Committee because he spread lies about Donald Trump's supposed involvement with Russia despite knowing them to be untrue at the time.

I promised you that if we took back the majority, I would bring decency and justice to the people's House.

---
| | [PROMISES MADE](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2zmuifom9gsk2cjo8h8t0be39f2pjm44a9vl6hlmo_rp22sh2s8i66pr3clhm6oj4s3h2bs)
---
| | [PROMISES KEPT](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2z64j1n4oct1qokuimfabvhdu7n7gkaenj743tjfg_rp22sh2s8i66pr3clhm6oj4s3h2bs)
---
| | [STAND WITH US](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2zsj30onutso0fcnpsqhhul456lhuir4rph20qpag_rp22sh2s8i66pr3clhm6oj4s3h2bs)
---

I will not stop until we get this country back on track. But the Democrats are FURIOUS at what we have been doing.

Even now, Omar, Schiff, and Swalell are raising MILLIONS off their terminations. They will not stop until they return to power.

We cannot let this happen. I promise to fight with everything I have to stop this from happening, and with your support, we will succeed.

**[Can I ask that you chip in $1, $5, $10 or anything you might be able to give to help us take on the dark money Democrats and protect our Conservative House Majority?](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2z70b3p0j44r4th5nmac3g2p5ch9snhljspfoerqg_rp22sh2s8i66pr3clhm6oj4s3h2bs "Can I ask that you chip in $1, $5, $10 or anything you might be able to give to help us take on the dark money Democrats and protect our Conservative House Majority?")**

---
| | [STAND WITH US](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2zsiaq9l875c99s9edgabvfla5q6p3i3e4m51jrq0_rp22sh2s8i66pr3clhm6oj4s3h2bs)
---

Thank you,
Speaker Kevin McCarthy

name: NextGen America
subject: Six months of the Inflation Reduction Act
body:
Open to see how the historic bill is changing our lives.

| | Friend, Over 100,000 clean energy jobs created. ✅
Lowered costs for families on their energy bills. ✅
$369 billion invested in our futures. ✅ **That’s all just in the past six months due to the Inflation Reduction Act.** This progress is proof of our power. President Biden and Democrats in Congress heard our calls for bold climate action, and now they’re making it happen. **Act now: Send a message to ensure that Congress follows President Biden’s leadership and champions our generation’s priorities through our** [youth agenda.](https://click.everyaction.com/k/58813141/392321195/-424043578?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNTkcvMS81NjE1OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjODk2OGQ4OC0xZmFlLWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=cMEESZyVKsYZDQV_yYgcuzAOgpwH1KRx1uCguptwpd0=&emci=53103c61-05ae-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&emdi=c8968d88-1fae-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&ceid=6787172) [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/58813142/392321196/-921436439?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNTkcvMS81NjE1OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjODk2OGQ4OC0xZmFlLWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=cMEESZyVKsYZDQV_yYgcuzAOgpwH1KRx1uCguptwpd0=&emci=53103c61-05ae-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&emdi=c8968d88-1fae-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&ceid=6787172) [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/58813144/392321197/-921436439?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNTkcvMS81NjE1OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjODk2OGQ4OC0xZmFlLWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=cMEESZyVKsYZDQV_yYgcuzAOgpwH1KRx1uCguptwpd0=&emci=53103c61-05ae-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&emdi=c8968d88-1fae-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&ceid=6787172) **An investment in the climate is an investment in our future,** and it’s just the beginning. | | | Peter,

A lot of people are asking why I took such a strong stand in the vote to elect a new Speaker of the House.

_**It 's because I work for the people and the people alone.

I refuse all PACs - that means corporate PACs, Leadership PACs, and ideological PACs.

I refuse all federal lobbyist donations.

I believe no other Republican in Congress has such a policy. **_

name: Attorney Larry Klayman
subject: BREAKING: January 6 Peaceful Protesters BEG to get moved to Guantanamo Bay
body:
They’re BEGGING to be transferred to Guantanamo Bay, Cuba...where vicious, America-hating terrorists get better treatment! No Mass or Sunday worship service. Laundry returning with brown stains, pubic hair, and or reeking of ripe urine. Broken toilets that either wont flush or repeatedly explode in Cells!

They’re BEGGING to be transferred to Guantanamo Bay, Cuba...where vicious, America-hating terrorists get better treatment! No Mass or Sunday worship service. Laundry returning with brown stains, pubic hair, and or reeking of ripe urine. Broken toilets that either wont flush or repeatedly explode in Cells! | | | [ ](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c06348%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=VWuQp1lufxKMVoXCXkQDbg&sysid=1)
---
| | |
---
| | [](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c06349%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=I5FXce9DP4BfVNUETeylSw&sysid=1) Hi Patriot,

[Please give a crucial $10, $25, $50, $100, or more IMMEDIATELY to fully fund my two critical, class action lawsuits and hard-hitting legal actions to FREE ALL JANUARY 6 PROTESTERS!](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c06340%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=vflXFuyHzwhLafOSWQK1hQ&sysid=1)

I just read the urgent letter signed by 34 innocent Americans, jailed in Washington, D.C for peacefully protesting the stolen 2020 presidential election.

**Patriot, what’s being done to them is so demonic, so foul, that they’re BEGGING to be transferred to Guantanamo Bay, Cuba ...where vicious, America-hating terrorists get better treatment!**

I’m heartsick and deeply angry about what’s being done to our fellow patriots.

Their letter reads like an appeal from dissidents in the Soviet Union.

Here are just a few examples of what they’re enduring (I quote directly from their letter, published by Gateway Pundit):

* Begging for Help / Water / Medical Aid / Mercy through a 4-inch by 10-inch window of cold metal doors
* No visits from family, friends, lawyers, or clergy
* No Mass or Sunday worship service
* Laundry returning with brown stains, pubic hair, and or reeking of ripe urine
* Broken toilets that either wont flush or repeatedly explode in Cells
* Stuck in Cells for 9 days without a shower
* Solitary Confinement for 25 1⁄2 hours or more at a time

Outrageously, there’s more.

**Guards deny them hot water and keep them from attending court. They severely beat, mace, harass, insult, and even sexually assault them.**

Their food is so disgusting and so low in nutrition, that some prisoners are losing their eyesight, their hair, and getting scurvy (from Vitamin C deficiency).

There’s much, much more...all of it horrifying.

And this has been going on for up to a year and a half...in AMERICA.

**They conclude their letter by pleading to be transferred to Guantanamo Bay, Cuba, where the Taliban, al-Qaeda, and ISIS terrorists get better treatment!**

This can’t go on. I won’t allow it.

I’m Larry Klayman, the founder ofstrong Judicial Watch and founder and General Counsel of Freedom Watch.

I’m a former federal prosecutor and trial lawyer who’s fought for the American people for 45 years.

You’ve seen me on cable news outlets and heard me on radio talk shows. I’m proud to say I am the first lawyer to EVER obtain a court ruling that an American president committed a crime when I won my case against Bill Clinton.

I worked closely with Congressman Bob Barr and other impeachment managers to IMPEACH criminal Bill Clinton.

And I SUCCESSFULLY represented the victims of other Clinton scandals, like Filegate, Travelgate, IRS Gate, Chinagate, and many others.

Not to mention that I also enjoined Obama’s corrupt NSA from mass surveillance on hundreds of millions of Americans and killed Obama’s illegal amnesty for over 5 million illegal aliens, a case that went all the way to the Supreme Court!

**I know what it takes to take on federal agencies, politicians, even presidents - AND WIN!**

And now I’m pursuing two class action lawsuits and other important legal actions to get justice for the January 6 Protesters and take on Joe Biden’s rotten regime in court.

**Nobody else is doing what I’m doing in court to get justice for these poor people.**

Patriot, please say a pray for the January 6 Prisoners. Their temptation to despair, to give up, must be enormous.

[Then I beg you to help me fight for them with your very best gift now of $10, $25, $50, $100, or even more. If you’ve given before, please give again. If you can, give more than you’ve ever given to Freedom Watch.](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c06341%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=NWvG4iftAysLxtX3eG08qw&sysid=1)

I can’t do it without you, Patriot.

Thank you for doing whatever you can now.

Sincerely,

Larry Klayman
Founder of both Judicial Watch and Freedom Watch
Current Chairman and General Counsel of Freedom Watch, Inc.

P.S. Patriot, I’m heartbroken after reading that powerful letter from our fellow patriots who are rotting in jail in Washington, D.C. **These are innocent men and women, tortured and abused like they were political prisoners in a Third World dictatorship!**

[Please give what you can right now to help me fight to set them free. $5, $10, $25, $50, even more...whatever you can spare at this very moment. Each dollar counts.](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c06342%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=dexxXd%2fFlM07wn81kwDmyQ&sysid=1)

**Free the January 6 Protestors!
**
Right now, un-American politicians and corrupt members of the Department of Justice are keeping innocent Americans in jail without due process...they’re often abused and beaten...they’re blocked from seeing their wives and children...and kept from seeing their lawyers and clergy!

At least one January 6 protestor has already died.

And another protester, a patriot grandma with cancer, just finished serving 60 days in federal prison for a crime she didn’t commit.

[But there’s something you can do about it ...you can donate immediately to Freedom Watch’s critically important lawsuit to HELP FREE the rest of these persecuted patriots with your crucial gift today.](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c06343%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=zNPcrJwjaEPJAKUqpA0T1w&sysid=1)
---

_625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314_

Not to mention that I also enjoined Obama’s corrupt NSA from mass surveillance on hundreds of millions of Americans and killed Obama’s illegal amnesty for over 5 million illegal aliens, a case that went all the way to the Supreme Court! I know what it takes to take on federal agencies, politicians, even presidents - AND WIN! And now I’m pursuing two class action lawsuits and other important legal actions to get justice for the January 6 Protesters and take on Joe Biden’s rotten regime in court. Nobody else is doing what I’m doing in court to get justice for these poor people. Patriot, please say a pray for the January 6 Prisoners. Their temptation to despair, to give up, must be enormous. I can’t do it without you, Patriot. Thank you for doing whatever you can now. Sincerely, Larry Klayman Founder of both Judicial Watch and Freedom Watch Current Chairman and General Counsel of Freedom Watch, Inc. P.S. Patriot, I’m heartbroken after reading that powerful letter from our fellow patriots who are rotting in jail in Washington, D.C. These are innocent men and women, tortured and abused like they were political prisoners in a Third World dictatorship! Free the January 6 Protestors! ** Right now, un-American politicians and corrupt members of the Department of Justice are keeping innocent Americans in jail without due process...they’re often abused and beaten...they’re blocked from seeing their wives and children...and kept from seeing their lawyers and clergy! At least one January 6 protestor has already died. And another protester, a patriot grandma with cancer, just finished serving 60 days in federal prison for a crime she didn’t commit. 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58814436/392325397/1206641811?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ1NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmMDUyOTA3Yy0yM2FlLWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=3qqrSWouslotKi8YgakVnEqUg07bg6OGVA-jVu2VMdA=&emci=e830bd57-23ae-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&emdi=f052907c-23ae-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&ceid=24635485) The article and accompanying video tell the story of Wes’ life leading up to his historic and victorious run for Governor of Maryland, his inspiring message around patriotism, and his plan to create a state that leaves no one behind. Here’s just a highlight: | _“Moore’s theme is both a product and a through line of a remarkable biography. Growing up fatherless and surrounded by violence, he turned his life around, graduated Phi Beta Kappa from Johns Hopkins University, and won a Rhodes scholarship to Oxford. He’s a decorated Army combat veteran, a best-selling author of inspirational memoirs, and a former Wall Street banker, small businessman, and nonprofit CEO. Just weeks into his first term in elected office, he is widely considered the Democrats’ most talented political newcomer since Barack Obama.”_

name: Team Moulton
subject: What’s lacking in Congress is not intelligence. It’s courage
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Seth Moulton for Congress
body:
http://sethmoulton.com [http://sethmoulton.com] Friend ,
Rep. Seth Moulton was just featured in an important Boston Globe column [https://www.bostonglobe.com/2023/02/09/metro/putting-public-service-back-public-servants/] . We believe it is spot on, and want to highlight it for you in case you missed it!
Did you know that between 1965 and 1975, veterans made up 70 percent of Congress? Today, that number has plummeted to only 18 percent. That staggering drop has coincided with a dramatic rise in partisanship in our politics.
Just like Seth told the Globe: What’s lacking in Congress is not intelligence. It’s courage.
That’s why Seth prioritizes getting things done in Congress—whether that means working across the aisle or standing up against the hyperpartisanship that has made our politics vitriolic and our legislative process inefficient.
Friend, often, it is the veterans and service-oriented candidates who have the courage to stand up to our own parties. It’s these candidates who have the courage to go against the partisan grain and move the needle forward.
Simply put: We need more of that. If you’re able, please consider chipping in $15 or more today to Seth’s campaign so that he can continue working to cut through the noise and demonstrate the ways our elected officials can work together on behalf of the American people. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/seth-moulton-3]
Politics should be about public service. It can be about public service. But it will take courage from our politicians to look beyond the partisan fight of the day, and to stand up for things because they are right, not just because they are popular.
Thanks for all you do,
Team Moulton
https://www.facebook.com/sethmoulton [https://www.facebook.com/sethmoulton] https://twitter.com/sethmoulton [https://twitter.com/sethmoulton] https://www.instagram.com/sethmoulton/?hl=en [https://www.instagram.com/sethmoulton/?hl=en] https://www.linkedin.com/company/seth-moulton-for-america/ [https://www.linkedin.com/company/seth-moulton-for-america/]

name: Attorney Larry Klayman
subject: BREAKING: January 6 Peaceful Protesters BEG to get moved to Guantanamo Bay
body:
They’re BEGGING to be transferred to Guantanamo Bay, Cuba...where vicious, America-hating terrorists get better treatment! No Mass or Sunday worship service. Laundry returning with brown stains, pubic hair, and or reeking of ripe urine. Broken toilets that either wont flush or repeatedly explode in Cells!

They’re BEGGING to be transferred to Guantanamo Bay, Cuba...where vicious, America-hating terrorists get better treatment! No Mass or Sunday worship service. Laundry returning with brown stains, pubic hair, and or reeking of ripe urine. Broken toilets that either wont flush or repeatedly explode in Cells! | | | [](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2z1eqdj48t9g0ss5buhv83oudjc2rc769ris8i2p0_rp22sh2s8i66pr3cljm0or5c1h2bs)
---
| | |
---
| | [](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2z3j31su4o0rpvmp5b6qcqh4oqcodgk45l36qjajg_rp22sh2s8i66pr3cljm0or5c1h2bs) Hi Patriot,

[Please give a crucial $10, $25, $50, $100, or more IMMEDIATELY to fully fund my two critical, class action lawsuits and hard-hitting legal actions to FREE ALL JANUARY 6 PROTESTERS!](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zrsus5v98kme6u3gu7j1lcp2mlr8uc923dl351l0_rp22sh2s8i66pr3cljm0or5c1h2bs)

I just read the urgent letter signed by 34 innocent Americans, jailed in Washington, D.C for peacefully protesting the stolen 2020 presidential election.

**Patriot, what’s being done to them is so demonic, so foul, that they’re BEGGING to be transferred to Guantanamo Bay, Cuba...where vicious, America-hating terrorists get better treatment!**

I’m heartsick and deeply angry about what’s being done to our fellow patriots.

Their letter reads like an appeal from dissidents in the Soviet Union.

Here are just a few examples of what they’re enduring (I quote directly from their letter, published by Gateway Pundit):

* Begging for Help / Water / Medical Aid / Mercy through a 4-inch by 10-inch window of cold metal doors
* No visits from family, friends, lawyers, or clergy
* No Mass or Sunday worship service
* Laundry returning with brown stains, pubic hair, and or reeking of ripe urine
* Broken toilets that either wont flush or repeatedly explode in Cells
* Stuck in Cells for 9 days without a shower
* Solitary Confinement for 25 1⁄2 hours or more at a time

Outrageously, there’s more.

**Guards deny them hot water and keep them from attending court. They severely beat, mace, harass, insult, and even sexually assault them.**

Their food is so disgusting and so low in nutrition, that some prisoners are losing their eyesight, their hair, and getting scurvy (from Vitamin C deficiency).

There’s much, much more...all of it horrifying.

And this has been going on for up to a year and a half...in AMERICA.

**They conclude their letter by pleading to be transferred to Guantanamo Bay, Cuba, where the Taliban, al-Qaeda, and ISIS terrorists get better treatment!**

This can’t go on. I won’t allow it.

I’m Larry Klayman, the founder ofstrong Judicial Watch and founder and General Counsel of Freedom Watch.

I’m a former federal prosecutor and trial lawyer who’s fought for the American people for 45 years.

You’ve seen me on cable news outlets and heard me on radio talk shows. I’m proud to say I am the first lawyer to EVER obtain a court ruling that an American president committed a crime when I won my case against Bill Clinton.

I worked closely with Congressman Bob Barr and other impeachment managers to IMPEACH criminal Bill Clinton.

And I SUCCESSFULLY represented the victims of other Clinton scandals, like Filegate, Travelgate, IRS Gate, Chinagate, and many others.

Not to mention that I also enjoined Obama’s corrupt NSA from mass surveillance on hundreds of millions of Americans and killed Obama’s illegal amnesty for over 5 million illegal aliens, a case that went all the way to the Supreme Court!

**I know what it takes to take on federal agencies, politicians, even presidents – AND WIN!**

And now I’m pursuing two class action lawsuits and other important legal actions to get justice for the January 6 Protesters and take on Joe Biden’s rotten regime in court.

**Nobody else is doing what I’m doing in court to get justice for these poor people.**

Patriot, please say a pray for the January 6 Prisoners. Their temptation to despair, to give up, must be enormous.

[Then I beg you to help me fight for them with your very best gift now of $10, $25, $50, $100, or even more. If you’ve given before, please give again. If you can, give more than you’ve ever given to Freedom Watch.](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2z0hqt9k3kfv8mmrh6ae6os68gjg8hh53imlfrcp0_rp22sh2s8i66pr3cljm0or5c1h2bs)

I can’t do it without you, Patriot.

Thank you for doing whatever you can now.

Sincerely,

Larry Klayman
Founder of both Judicial Watch and Freedom Watch
Current Chairman and General Counsel of Freedom Watch, Inc.

P.S. Patriot, I’m heartbroken after reading that powerful letter from our fellow patriots who are rotting in jail in Washington, D.C. **These are innocent men and women, tortured and abused like they were political prisoners in a Third World dictatorship!**

[Please give what you can right now to help me fight to set them free. $5, $10, $25, $50, even more...whatever you can spare at this very moment. Each dollar counts.](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zg37m4uh2krik29bkagget69foqnc92hbmpugi4o_rp22sh2s8i66pr3cljm0or5c1h2bs)

**Free the January 6 Protestors!
**
Right now, un-American politicians and corrupt members of the Department of Justice are keeping innocent Americans in jail without due process...they’re often abused and beaten...they’re blocked from seeing their wives and children...and kept from seeing their lawyers and clergy!

At least one January 6 protestor has already died.

And another protester, a patriot grandma with cancer, just finished serving 60 days in federal prison for a crime she didn’t commit.

[But there’s something you can do about it ...you can donate immediately to Freedom Watch’s critically important lawsuit to HELP FREE the rest of these persecuted patriots with your crucial gift today.](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zal4ho88nu9ilgvjtigs57vnjojtr0e33ga67s6o_rp22sh2s8i66pr3cljm0or5c1h2bs)
---

name: Matt Gaetz
subject: Vindicated.
body:
Thank you for being in my corner.
| | |
---
| [](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0016aAQ08CHxNOagEO5_AmlThHfGlhDsGX4KIRwUN55dnWCGUdjZhE3c_og3HqAvuLInFvbpnh8aEDANfQMqNSSppDc2XUqnoAfgbhcriTuHAsqiixbGEuUNpE50QPiCo1h6NNlKELNOMeHbd7DvndRIthNHBg2A6ZT6Ak6WXd24QCUeJCMp-rmnfWigWChLF7sEECNLT34GDo=&c=kRqtEXnRrk0saVOJqh9qbI-QM0WVV7yEhtPYCLSUtDSYwsGVUoOzEg==&ch=AOSvu9eGbwkKZ-mTgWqL5cNc4kZUIUXJLTIcMhgPL_n87iXCbPgOEg==)
---
| Peter,
---
| Allow me to start off with a simple message: Thank You.
Words cannot express how grateful I am for every patriot who supported me, prayed for me, and stood by my side throughout this ordeal.
You are all proof that the America First Movement is made up of the best and most selfless that our great country has to offer.
Over the past few months, just like CNN admitted to on camera, the Fake News Media has endlessly propagandized my life and told lies about me.
And it was all because I'm EFFECTIVE at impacting legislation. They always come after the fighters.
But I don't take my Ps and Qs from the mainstream media. I work for YOU!
And grassroots patriots like you have returned the favor by standing by my side...
This America First Movement - the strongest political force in the country - stood with me throughout the saga, refusing to fall for the media narratives and providing critical resources that helped me fight back. And as a result, we have weathered the storm that they sent to try and take us out.
God never gives us anything we cannot handle, Peter...
THANK YOU ONCE AGAIN FOR SUPPORTING ME AND HELPING ME WITHSTAND THEIR LIES!
---
| | [KEEP UP THE FIGHT!](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0016aAQ08CHxNOagEO5_AmlThHfGlhDsGX4KIRwUN55dnWCGUdjZhE3c_og3HqAvuLInFvbpnh8aEDANfQMqNSSppDc2XUqnoAfgbhcriTuHAsqiixbGEuUNpE50QPiCo1h6NNlKELNOMeHbd7DvndRIthNHBg2A6ZT6Ak6WXd24QCUeJCMp-rmnfWigWChLF7sEECNLT34GDo=&c=kRqtEXnRrk0saVOJqh9qbI-QM0WVV7yEhtPYCLSUtDSYwsGVUoOzEg==&ch=AOSvu9eGbwkKZ-mTgWqL5cNc4kZUIUXJLTIcMhgPL_n87iXCbPgOEg==)

---
| |
---
| Peter, other America First fighters like Jim Jordan and President Trump showed exactly how to deal with lies and smears like these.
You don't let the process become the punishment - you forge ahead!
And that's exactly what I will continue to do. I will continue this work to put America First, to get us out of pointless foreign wars, to stop our border from becoming a turnstile, and to serve nobly on the new committee focused on the weaponization of government (something that hits close to home having gone through this...)
But, Peter, I also know that the attacks won't end here. We must continue to watch our backs... Because that's where the target is. They will keep coming for me - and for YOU - until they have wiped our movement off the political map.
We stop them by standing united. We stop them when patriots like YOU are invested in the mission. Because now, we have PROOF that we can outlast their attacks...
[So I hope you'll keep up the support for our movement today and help us prepare for whatever they throw our way next! >>](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0016aAQ08CHxNOagEO5_AmlThHfGlhDsGX4KIRwUN55dnWCGUdjZhE3c_og3HqAvuLInFvbpnh8aEDANfQMqNSSppDc2XUqnoAfgbhcriTuHAsqiixbGEuUNpE50QPiCo1h6NNlKELNOMeHbd7DvndRIthNHBg2A6ZT6Ak6WXd24QCUeJCMp-rmnfWigWChLF7sEECNLT34GDo=&c=kRqtEXnRrk0saVOJqh9qbI-QM0WVV7yEhtPYCLSUtDSYwsGVUoOzEg==&ch=AOSvu9eGbwkKZ-mTgWqL5cNc4kZUIUXJLTIcMhgPL_n87iXCbPgOEg==)

name: Col. Mike Waltz
subject: EXTENDED
body:
| | | Peter,
---
I don’t have a lot of time so I’ll make this quick:

**Our team was able to secure a 24-HOUR EXTENSION on our mid-month deadline for our 100 most dedicated patriots - and YOU made the cut. **

After we didn’t meet our initial goal, I was extremely worried. But now, we have an incredible second chance.

If we miss this opportunity, it’s all over, Peter. Don’t give up now.

Friend, America’s Warriors write a blank check for our freedoms. They’re willing to go to war and face unimaginable odds to defend freedom and liberty. And how do we repay these Heroes? _By charging them, like the three below, with bogus crimes they didn’t commit._
---
[](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z9dvgriba2nn50smq2dfopvpjgj0s17nph7skfug_rp22sh2s8i66pr3cljm4oj4cth2bs)
---
Here’s what happened to the **MARSOC 3 Raiders** ... On New Year’s Eve in 2018, Chief Petty Officer Eric Gilmet and Gunnery Sergeants Danny Draher and Josh Negron were assaulted while trying to take a much-needed break on deployment at a local bar in Erbil, Iraq. All was well until Gilmet, Draher, and Negron decided to go home for the evening and a contractor outside the bar confronted them. Despite trying to avoid a confrontation with him, the contractor struck one of the Warriors twice in the face and was in the process of throwing a third punch. In defense of his Marine brother, one of the men struck the contractor - just once - and sent him to the ground. The Marines stayed with the man for _hours_ , even bringing him back to base for medical care throughout the night after his “friends” abandoned him. The contractor tragically passed due to complications from his intoxicated state. Soon after the man’s death, the MARSOC 3 were charged with manslaughter, sending a tragic blow to their livelihoods and families. What followed was one of the most unjust trials our military justice system has ever seen. _Friend, the MARSOC 3 faced 25 years in prison for crimes they didn’t commit. They fought against bias, unlawful command influence, and intense intimidation tactics._ **With the help of United American Patriots, we were able to help secure justice for two of the Raiders!** GySgt Draher and GySgt Negron were recently found **NOT GUILTY** by a jury for negligent homicide and involuntary manslaughter. **But our work is far from over. Eric Gilmet is still facing 25 years in prison.**
---
[](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z9fp23dm714inf3jsh5tpv4lu2tfb0ki3pdj4vgo_rp22sh2s8i66pr3cljm4oj4cth2bs)
---
This is where you come in, friend.
We’re asking Americans like you to step up and contribute to **UAP’s Warrior Fund** to clear Chief Petty Officer Eric Gilmet’s name.

name: Indivisible (via Left Action)
subject: Sign the petition: Help protect Medicare and Social Security
body:
| | | | |
---
| | | | | _Republicans in Congress are hellbent on cutting Social Security and Medicare, and are holding America’s economy hostage in order to do it. [Add your name now, say NO to cuts to Social Security and Medicare, and help our friends at Indivisible fight back!](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tf0a22d44-5158-4368-a53f-fb1d9272800a/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) The only way we will stop these cuts is if enough people speak out, and do so forcefully, so [add your name](https://default.salsalabs.org/T11b45b3b-0cb0-45bd-ad58-d9c8abc16517/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9), and tell others to do the same!_
---
| | | Friend, Since the start of the 118th Congress, MAGA House Republicans have made it clear how they plan to govern: chaos. Their first order of business? **Holding our entire economy hostage.** Last month, we hit the debt ceiling -- which represents the legal cap on how much the treasury can borrow to fund its legal obligations -- and House Republicans are refusing to raise it unless vital programs are slashed. Which programs are their main targets? **Medicare and Social Security.** President Biden laid out their attack on these programs to the nation during the State of the Union, despite the GOP’s attempts to deny it. But they said it themselves: Senator Mike Lee of Utah declared, "It will be my objective to phase out Social Security, to pull it up by the roots and get rid of it." And Senator Rick Scott, former chair of the National Republican Senatorial Committee, is advocating to require constant re-appropriation to keep Medicare and Social Security going -- meaning if Congress can’t get to an agreement, the programs would end. **We cannot let this happen.** Right now many working class Americans are struggling with inflation and rising costs of living. Any cuts to Medicare and Social Security -- programs seniors have been paying into their whole lives -- would only threaten the livelihoods of millions. **[Indivisible is standing up for working families and fighting back, but we need your help: Sign your name if you agree we should protect and strengthen Medicare and Social Security benefits >>](https://default.salsalabs.org/Taa9bd01a-182f-4f98-acee-ceaa621a4a46/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)**
---
| | | | [SIGN YOUR NAME >>](https://default.salsalabs.org/Td86c5177-1313-47c9-994e-c0d9cb5cee56/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | | The fact is this: Republicans have raised the debt ceiling time and time again when Trump was in office. They’ve also added trillions to the debt by providing tax cuts to corporations and billionaires. So we’re not buying their “balancing the budget” act because we know what they’re really about: putting their extremist agenda over delivering for working families _every single time. _ Friend, we’re tired of the games MAGA Republicans are playing with our economy. A default on our debt could be disastrous, and the extremists in their party don’t seem to care -- they’d rather slash programs that millions rely on to stay out of poverty. [**Millions depend on these programs, and Indivisible is committed to protecting them. Sign your name right away if you agree there should be _no_ cuts to Medicare and Social Security benefits -- period.**](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tb1b448ba-ce7e-4cd9-b404-de4ff089154a/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
|
---
| | | | [SIGN YOUR NAME >>](https://default.salsalabs.org/T0bb9aca9-70ed-4484-b552-3183537d2a41/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| Thanks for taking action,
Indivisible Team
---
| | | | | **Other things you can do:**
* Follow us on [Facebook](https://default.salsalabs.org/T1098b0c0-d847-4cbf-846f-0a5310b7318c/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) and [Twitter](https://default.salsalabs.org/Ta6948427-5f04-456c-8012-0560f378d8ec/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
* [Go here for more actions you can take](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tb2c29c06-8dce-4c8e-89ab-c08b36eaceca/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
* [Help us out with a donation](https://default.salsalabs.org/T2248de56-2dac-4704-83e7-ac99aa45accc/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

name: Candace Owens
subject: The ugly truth about Black History Month
body:
Black History Month isn’t about celebrating the Black men and women who’ve changed the world for the better.

[](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c78985%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=fAVuOIUVE3%2bJM3bgkTRK%2fg&sysid=1)

Friend,

It’s Black History Month. . . The month when a bunch of people who know nothing about black history take the time to celebrate people like Frederick Douglas -- but have never read any of his works.

Black History Month isn’t about celebrating the Black men and women who’ve changed the world for the better.

It’s nothing more than a way for woke radicals to push identity politics and glorify division in America.

I don’t want a Black History Month, and I can’t say “why” better than Morgan Freeman did:

_“You're going to relegate my history to a month?**Black history is American history.** ”_

My name is Candace Owens, and I am a co-founder of the BLEXIT Foundation. One of the reasons I helped found BLEXIT was to teach REAL history to Black and minority communities.

To teach true American history -- _and not the socialist, woke version that’s pushed today_ -- I’ve set a goal to raise $50,000 this month.

[_**Will you join me in the push for TRUE history, Friend, by sending a gift of $10, $35, $50, or any amount? Click here to show your support >>>**_](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c78986%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=fkTeRe9aB3Fn2n371qS9SQ&sysid=1)

BLEXIT honors independent black voices like. . .

. . . Thomas Sowell, a well-known American conservative and is considered one of the most influential black conservatives who has authored over 40 books.

. . . Clarence Thomas, a Constitutional originalist and Associate Justice of the Supreme Court of the United States.

. . . Walter Williams, an American economist, commentator, author, and academic and former John M. Olin Distinguished Professor of Economics at George Mason University.

That’s why I hope you’ll join me in our effort to celebrate Black Excellence and work to build a better future for Black and minority communities. [_**Click here to send a gift of $10, $35, $50, or any amount >>>**_](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c78987%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=HDvASZra3Mp69kNtFQc0CA&sysid=1)

Here’s how we’re reaching Black and minority communities with American history:

**BLEXIT’s Liberation Camps** provide an American History curriculum to children in Kindergarten through 8th grade who live in low-income communities. We also teach key life skills and character development.

The children experience 18 weeks of after-school programming, six weeks of full-day summer camp programming, 25 full-day programs when schools had in-service days, and 20 parents-night-out programs and field trips.

**And through our 43 State Chapters made up of more than 14,000 volunteers! **

Our chapter members bring BLEXIT’s five pillars to life through events and outreach efforts to places where no other organizations can effectively reach to combat the victimhood mentality.
1. **Advocating** for School Choice.
2. **Promoting** criminal justice reform by developing positive relationships between police and minority communities.
3. **Championing** entrepreneurship and free enterprise.
4. **Developing** history programs that will inspire minority children.

Presenting the message of BLEXIT through art and live experiences.

BLEXIT State Chapter members work within their local communities to help change the narrative that surrounds America’s minority communities.

Friend, can you help us reach our goal of raising $50,000 this month? **Click below to send your support.**

[_**Donate $10 >>>**_](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c78988%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=ZcIDsLx0r3QilrtbLlmb5w&sysid=1)

clean_body: Black History Month isn’t about celebrating the Black men and women who’ve changed the world for the better. Friend, It’s Black History Month. . . The month when a bunch of people who know nothing about black history take the time to celebrate people like Frederick Douglas -- but have never read any of his works. Black History Month isn’t about celebrating the Black men and women who’ve changed the world for the better. It’s nothing more than a way for woke radicals to push identity politics and glorify division in America. I don’t want a Black History Month, and I can’t say “why” better than Morgan Freeman did: “You're going to relegate my history to a month?Black history is American history. ” My name is Candace Owens, and I am a co-founder of the BLEXIT Foundation. One of the reasons I helped found BLEXIT was to teach REAL history to Black and minority communities. To teach true American history -- and not the socialist, woke version that’s pushed today -- I’ve set a goal to raise $50,000 this month. BLEXIT honors independent black voices like. . . . . . Clarence Thomas, a Constitutional originalist and Associate Justice of the Supreme Court of the United States. . . . We also teach key life skills and character development. The children experience 18 weeks of after-school programming, six weeks of full-day summer camp programming, 25 full-day programs when schools had in-service days, and 20 parents-night-out programs and field trips. And through our 43 State Chapters made up of more than 14,000 volunteers! Our chapter members bring BLEXIT’s five pillars to life through events and outreach efforts to places where no other organizations can effectively reach to combat the victimhood mentality. 1. BLEXIT State Chapter members work within their local communities to help change the narrative that surrounds America’s minority communities. Look what happened in New York City!
**The recent Democratic primary for mayor in New York was marred by a significant error in the Ranked-Choice Voting process. **
**135,000****test votes were mistakenly uploaded, leading to a preliminary count that was wrong!**
As a result, two candidates ended up with nearly identical results, and the president of the New York NAACP spoke out against the Ranked-Choice Voting system, calling for an overhaul of the elections agency.
**This error in New York is a clear sign that the Ranked-Choice Voting process is a** __**threat to election integrity.**__

clean_body: | | | | Help us Preserve Democracy | Peter, Look what happened in New York City! The recent Democratic primary for mayor in New York was marred by a significant error in the Ranked-Choice Voting process. 135,000test votes were mistakenly uploaded, leading to a preliminary count that was wrong! As a result, two candidates ended up with nearly identical results, and the president of the New York NAACP spoke out against the Ranked-Choice Voting system, calling for an overhaul of the elections agency. This error in New York is a clear sign that the Ranked-Choice Voting process is a threat to election integrity. We need your help to fight against this flawed system and to preserve honest and fair elections. | Join us in our mission to protect the integrity of our democratic process. Every donation counts, and together we can make a difference. Thank you for your support and for standing with us to preserve democracy. | | Kelly Tshibaka Preserve Democracy | ==

Hi Friend,

Up here in Oregon, as you may know, [**Battleground Oregon**](https://u22856175.ct.sendgrid.net/ls/click?upn=Qqu2eGArjYt8p8lYGOqE7QoP95tYBeahSHuWTS7wD00WaA8DbLPjIRd5ZxuSkkTPQZHf_XwU9lPq5-2Bze3gI64ohlV0cQwWAuBAU7ADIvj2CS7ymhuTI2jG3IYR5NWbV52qgmdAiGhBklNQsRXTWl4rWtz6V26ifmsOhc2lTNkdXy-2F5FFomLfxGZOGa3bZcww1pfz6Av7ciulNOfUDD4F43sRhUJSTT4h-2FZM-2FVwjGzWzPC2-2F3b3x4-2FvXGvL-2BimvELRTkRMXiaro9SK4mv8TV3YhGmW8DUMidabvnLslpWsbdGeshj4XEIIm-2FFeMVgy6S3FtDuijKGmVzWTxIQZMSk9l5F9XyU1ciXOUBIkxr6FNmEtrSKBT1pSrYhsBoOOCLFwC0wfRmlnuZvnd-2B5VX5EZskt-2FeW7s9BgPah1aI5yNWQMM89KcJhPVYyq0SqeK9DtcpBV9C7krabRhvgz7mpg0z9Jsz1izsb6vmkEMo-2BhAy1aI9rHu5vW7BALcH0-2Bs48RL-2BbP4MVKQsWa73qf2bfAVTB-2B2KF7aow0xHgmF3DNCkyMDNamtVZ1EkhIZg34ciqCjqYWVCOHB59vdhJr9Ti2N0dGsM41lxmrQwZB4trmKjXyREa5KWENjTlY7o81IicXeKqZxV0jf-2FMZ7BZgHgv4uiP5-2FtrV5agELDfIEFd-2BAdTt1S4S1jTrjKsuKgfyhRarRj-2BXXSxKbWsT-2Ba0NSznf02l9OoqouPJ4F-2Bt3U3OTbIqBcEEm08fVB2jLMCE0vUN99fpfAJvjQZzDiUp8scv-2FyF6swXElyZNGKlBpq77bcz96hcS4qA1k1-2F4hiWoMVa4iue4uRVyPpSx7nroLayxi19X9Edc2m0bt8lgnN4KJNMNDSUo7FImOAs0mmIPB2ecw-2BA03yTorCB-2BP96We2Nvk9izB0Z7DvEDGRFD2hF1Avv41QZiO2y2g5ymve-2BI2rjIDTim-2BqxSCViNKMz0DdEdDcoMfH-2F4d938yAm5I0Bh3yUD7Q4Z7tvkWhYlSdlQSYl6R6d7B44xdErExxRFugpv7PhI6r0Q-3D-3D) has filed an election integrity lawsuit that was mocked by the media on the left, and celebrated by people that want one citizen, one vote. Our goal is that the vast majority of voters have confidence in the integrity of elections. Right now this is not the case.

72% of Oregonians polled believe there is significant election fraud. Our plan at Battleground Oregon is pursue a lawsuit based on the groundbreaking Supreme Court Case, "Brown vs. Board of Education of Topeka, Kansas" that links the psychological impact of people's disillusionment to real disenfranchisement. **IF YOU BELIEVE YOUR VOTE DOESN'T COUNT, YOU HAVE BEEN DISENFRANCHISED!**

The government filed a 40 page response to our initial filing and now we have submitted our knockout punch. clean_body: | | | | Groundbreaking lawsuit filed to restore Oregon Voter confidence Hi Friend, Up here in Oregon, as you may know, has filed an election integrity lawsuit that was mocked by the media on the left, and celebrated by people that want one citizen, one vote. Our goal is that the vast majority of voters have confidence in the integrity of elections. Right now this is not the case. 72% of Oregonians polled believe there is significant election fraud. Our plan at Battleground Oregon is pursue a lawsuit based on the groundbreaking Supreme Court Case, "Brown vs. Board of Education of Topeka, Kansas" that links the psychological impact of people's disillusionment to real disenfranchisement. IF YOU BELIEVE YOUR VOTE DOESN'T COUNT, YOU HAVE BEEN DISENFRANCHISED! The government filed a 40 page response to our initial filing and now we have submitted our knockout punch. includes all Oregon counties and has leveraged data, personal testimonies, affidavits, and declarations that came to this one hub. Battleground is set up so that information flows to a coordinated grassroots conservative common sense fueled launching pad for the fight for fair and free elections. It is a beautiful thing. Can you help us in this fight? Through your generous donation we can continue to hold government accountable to We The People. But only with your support! | | | Thank you for your urgent support,Friend. | JOIN US | | | | ELEGRAM Battleground Oregon P.O. Box 95, Bend, OR

name: Andrew Hughes
subject: Should Dr. Ben Carson Be Canceled?
body:
This is something he has experienced firsthand.

|
---
| | | [](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zo0eikoqn0kb5ur9qjmunclmmh536mbts7ub9a80_rp22sh2s8i66pr3cljm2pb4c9h2bs)
---
| Fellow Patriot,

Dr. Carson asked me to reach out to Americans who want what's best for our country, to help him take a stand against "cancel culture." It's tearing our country apart and needs to be stopped.

This is something he has experienced firsthand.

As you may have heard, this past November the Detroit School Board voted to change the name of the Benjamin Carson High School of Science and Medicine. Why? Because the School Board was mad that Dr. Carson was part of the Trump Administration!

These educational leaders - who should be acting as role models for our kids - instead decided to create a huge political spectacle by "canceling" Dr. Carson and trying to erase his amazing achievements as a doctor, as a leader, and as a citizen. It's really outrageous.

Dr. Carson is disappointed by this - not because he wants any glory but because it sets a bad example ... for the kids at this school, and for the entire country.

"Cancel culture" tells young people and all Americans that you shouldn't listen to those with whom you disagree and try to find common ground; you should just stigmatize them and erase them.

The Left probably expected Dr. Carson to lash out at the Detroit School Board and his political opponents - hurl some insults, call people names, keep the fight going.

But instead, Dr. Carson said to our team here at the American Cornerstone Institute (ACI):

_" What if we use this as an opportunity to rally people across the country to speak out against cancel culture? To show America that we have a better path forward for our country than hate and division?"_

And that's exactly what we're doing. It's why Dr. Carson launched ACI in the first place - to lead the way for what's best for our country.

And we've created a way for you to stand with Dr. Carson and make your voice heard. Just click the link below; it will take you to our **National Statement Against Cancel Culture** that you can review and then co-sign.

[https://offers.americancornerstone.org/cancel-culture-pledge](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zbt952k2ebhtr75gtpcnt5097htlf5ne484dr510_rp22sh2s8i66pr3cljm2pb4c9h2bs)

Dr. Carson is getting asked about the Detroit school incident quite a bit, and when he answers he wants to speak for Americans who are heartbroken by what cancel culture is doing to our country - who want this divisiveness and vitriol to end! I think you're just such an American.

And when you and thousands of concerned citizens like you sign this Statement, Dr. Carson will be able to keep speaking from the heart against cancel culture - knowing that he's broadcasting a message that is important to his fellow Americans.

He can say ... "Enough is enough! I'm fed up with cancel culture, and so are folks everywhere who love America and want what's best for the country."

If that's a message you want Dr. Carson to share on your behalf, please take a moment now to be part of ACI's **National Statement Against Cancel Culture**. Here's the link again for you:

[https://offers.americancornerstone.org/cancel-culture-pledge](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zkthq7qg4l355ik7rpm4a3c7ejntrmu8dn5ahpdg_rp22sh2s8i66pr3cljm2pb4c9h2bs)

Amid all the divisiveness and polarization that has been injected into our policy debates, Dr. Carson is proud of the work ACI is doing to encourage Americans to come together despite our differences and find ways to take on the challenges that face our country.

I hope you'll join Dr. Carson in this important work. Thank you!

Sincerely,

Andrew D. Hughes
Executive Director & CEO
American Cornerstone Institute

clean_body: This is something he has experienced firsthand. | | | | | Fellow Patriot, Dr. Carson asked me to reach out to Americans who want what's best for our country, to help him take a stand against "cancel culture." It's tearing our country apart and needs to be stopped. This is something he has experienced firsthand. As you may have heard, this past November the Detroit School Board voted to change the name of the Benjamin Carson High School of Science and Medicine. Why? Because the School Board was mad that Dr. Carson was part of the Trump Administration! These educational leaders - who should be acting as role models for our kids - instead decided to create a huge political spectacle by "canceling" Dr. Carson and trying to erase his amazing achievements as a doctor, as a leader, and as a citizen. It's really outrageous. Dr. Carson is disappointed by this - not because he wants any glory but because it sets a bad example ... for the kids at this school, and for the entire country. "Cancel culture" tells young people and all Americans that you shouldn't listen to those with whom you disagree and try to find common ground; you should just stigmatize them and erase them. The Left probably expected Dr. Carson to lash out at the Detroit School Board and his political opponents - hurl some insults, call people names, keep the fight going. But instead, Dr. Carson said to our team here at the American Cornerstone Institute (ACI): " What if we use this as an opportunity to rally people across the country to speak out against cancel culture? To show America that we have a better path forward for our country than hate and division?" And that's exactly what we're doing. It's why Dr. Carson launched ACI in the first place - to lead the way for what's best for our country. And we've created a way for you to stand with Dr. Carson and make your voice heard. Just click the link below; it will take you to our National Statement Against Cancel Culture that you can review and then co-sign. Dr. Carson is getting asked about the Detroit school incident quite a bit, and when he answers he wants to speak for Americans who are heartbroken by what cancel culture is doing to our country - who want this divisiveness and vitriol to end! I think you're just such an American. And when you and thousands of concerned citizens like you sign this Statement, Dr. Carson will be able to keep speaking from the heart against cancel culture - knowing that he's broadcasting a message that is important to his fellow Americans. He can say ... "Enough is enough! I'm fed up with cancel culture, and so are folks everywhere who love America and want what's best for the country." If that's a message you want Dr. Carson to share on your behalf, please take a moment now to be part of ACI's National Statement Against Cancel Culture. Here's the link again for you: Amid all the divisiveness and polarization that has been injected into our policy debates, Dr. Carson is proud of the work ACI is doing to encourage Americans to come together despite our differences and find ways to take on the challenges that face our country. I hope you'll join Dr. Carson in this important work. Thank you! Sincerely, Andrew D. name: Cliff Schecter, Blue Amp Action
subject: Five days to another House seat, if Jennifer McClellan wins the special election on the 21st. This could be the first of many steps to winning back the House for Democrats, and a majority under Leader Hakeem Jeffries.
body:
House seat is up for grabs next Tuesday
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
| | | _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T140dbfd5-ad8b-460e-9bd3-cecbd0facd28/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
---
|
---
| |
---
| | | | | Peter, have you gotten a chance to pitch in for this special election? [**We Have FIVE Days To Shrink Kevin McCarthy's Majority — and we can do it if we can help Jennifer McClellan win this special election in Virginia!!**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T987652f6-96b5-463f-aa16-8572aa516813/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) _In 5 days, there will be a special election in Virginia's 4th Congressional District. Our incredible Democratic candidate, Jennifer McClellan, would be the first African-American to represent the district and another vote for Leader Hakeem Jeffries!_ She describes herself like this: \--- _I believe in the power of government to make people’s lives better — and I’ve spent the past 18 years as a public servant helping Virginians and solving problems, from passing the Voting Rights Act of Virginia to the Reproductive Health Protection Act.

**But my work doesn’t stop here – because there are still more people to help and problems to solve.**

My team has a plan to win. We’re distributing yard signs, airing new ads, and meeting voters all over the district – but our critical voter outreach efforts are expensive._ _\---_
---
|
---
| | | | | | [**DONATE NOW**](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tcd598d69-1898-451d-9969-427bea1cd8ba/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| **McClellan's opponent, Leon Benjamin, is a MAGA NUT who pushed the dangerous conspiracy theory Trump didn't lose the 2020 election and when Benjamin ran for this seat in 2022 and lost, he refused to concede. He's a bigot who attacks immigrants, a** nd _he'll provide Kevin McCarthy another vote in Congress._ [](https://default.salsalabs.org/T4a905570-268c-442b-b853-0ecabe9c1a1f/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) **_We must ensure that in 5 days we send Jennifer McClellan, not that nutcase, to Congress. We don't need more Marjorie Taylor Greenes in the Capitol._** [**_Can you join us in rushing Jennifer McClellan $5, $10, $25 or whatever you can so she can put those funds to use and win this crucial congressional seat?_**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T99276af0-e156-491f-b9d7-77aea4029655/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) _Thank you so much, Blue Amp Action community!_ Cliff

| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T33146df9-b423-44bf-904a-5d4f75712d6a/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

name: Kirsten Gillibrand
subject: top of your inbox
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Gillibrand for Senate
body:
Friend, I wanted to make sure that this email was at the top of your inbox tonight. **You see, I just got a text from my team, and we're still $3,119 short of our urgent mid-month goal.**
---
With Mitch McConnell just two seats shy of a majority and New York Republicans emboldened like never before, missing goals like this one simply isn't an option. And because I refuse to accept a single penny from corporate PACs, I'm counting on grassroots folks like you to help me make up this gap in the next few hours.
**[So that's why I'm personally asking one last time: Please will you chip in $5 — anything you can spare helps — to defend our Democratic Senate majority?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58826270/392343686/-2054302023?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&amount=5&refcode=jtk3926-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxMDhjYjFmYi0zMGFlLWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Dg--lKyMrW3YqUVCJSjOEjqf7hccFEzrCkPbY3ONKKw=)**
| | [DONATE NOW](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58826271/392343687/-2054302023?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk3926-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxMDhjYjFmYi0zMGFlLWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Dg--lKyMrW3YqUVCJSjOEjqf7hccFEzrCkPbY3ONKKw=)
---
Thank you for sticking with me in this fight.

With gratitude,

Kirsten
\------- Forwarded message -------
From: **Kirsten Gillibrand**
Date: Feb. 14, 2023
Subject: let me explain
| | |
---
I'm about to ask you to donate $5, friend. **But first, please let me explain why your $5 today will make such a big difference in the fight to defend our narrow Democratic Senate majority.**
Experts at The Washington Post are calling the 2024 Senate map "a GOP dream." And after Republicans flipped enough congressional seats in New York last year to retake the House majority, they're now targeting me as a key pickup opportunity in their fight to flip the Senate, too.
We simply can't let that happen — not when everything from Social Security to reproductive freedom to the future of the Supreme Court are at stake. But while Mitch McConnell and his special interest allies gear up to spend _hundreds of millions of dollars_ to retake power, I refuse to accept a single cent from corporate PACs.
**That's why I'm relying entirely on grassroots supporters like you to step up ahead of tomorrow's critical mid-month deadline to help us reach our $25,000 goal — one $5 donation at a time. Falling short would send a clear message to the GOP that this seat is up for grabs, so I'm counting on your urgent help, friend.**
**[Please, will you chip in $5 right now so we can reach our critical mid-month goal, defeat the GOP here in New York and defend the Senate for Democrats? Every dollar truly does make a difference.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58826272/392343688/-2054302023?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&amount=5&refcode=jtk3926-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxMDhjYjFmYi0zMGFlLWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Dg--lKyMrW3YqUVCJSjOEjqf7hccFEzrCkPbY3ONKKw=)**

Experts at The Washington Post are calling the 2024 Senate map "a GOP dream." And after Republicans flipped enough congressional seats in New York last year to retake the House majority, they're now targeting me as a key pickup opportunity in their fight to flip the Senate, too. But while Mitch McConnell and his special interest allies gear up to spend hundreds of millions of dollars to retake power, I refuse to accept a single cent from corporate PACs. That's why I'm relying entirely on grassroots supporters like you to step up ahead of tomorrow's critical mid-month deadline to help us reach our $25,000 goal — one $5 donation at a time. body:
| | | | |
---
| | | [Demand Criminal Charges against Trump Trial Witnesses Suspected of Perjury >>](https://default.salsalabs.org/T11565e1d-f7ef-4ae5-849f-f79f88d60ac7/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

| | | Breaking from the [New York Times:](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tcf8ff661-391c-4181-b2a3-65c880399525/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

_" A court on Thursday released portions of a report by a special grand jury investigating whether Donald J. Trump and his allies interfered in the presidential election in Georgia in an attempt to overturn the 2020 result...the jurors said they believed that "one or more" unnamed witness who testified in the inquiry may have committed perjury and should face indictment." (NYT)_

Where there's a Trump trial, there are lies. That's no surprise.

**But now there needs to be punishment as well. We can't allow lies from sworn witnesses, especially if they are used to defend Trump.** [**Add your name, and demand criminal charges against the witnesses who committed perjury.**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T1b58a30e-73e4-4573-81bb-c61518fd93a7/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
