name: Tom Fitton
subject: America’s Largest “Open Records” Litigator…Fighting for You!
body:
We file more “open records” lawsuits than any other organization in America...and over the past 29 years, we have broken through government secrecy on scandals ranging from Hillary Clinton’s emails to Biden family corruption issues!

| |
---
|
---
|
---
| Dear Fellow American,

Judicial Watch is America's _largest "open records" litigator_.
That means _we file more "open records" lawsuits than any other organization in America_...and over the past 29 years, we have broken through government secrecy on scandals ranging from Hillary Clinton's emails to Biden family corruption issues!
But litigation comes with _real costs_ ...and that's why [I hope today you will give us your support with a special contribution!](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=62232&L=17813&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0xMzUvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPU1heSZ1dG1fdGVybT1Ob24tRG9ub3Jz&hash=a27e3dffa06e173a0004e320eb691911825abcdbc43a80e551b7336d53a8f580)
| [Contribute](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=62232&L=17813&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0xMzUvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPU1heSZ1dG1fdGVybT1Ob24tRG9ub3Jz&hash=a27e3dffa06e173a0004e320eb691911825abcdbc43a80e551b7336d53a8f580)
---

_Our commitment_ is to uphold the rule of law and the American people's "right to know." And the best way to do that is through the legal system and the courts.

I don't believe any other organization uses the legal system and the courts as effectively and comprehensively as Judicial Watch does to protect the rule of law!

[Your support now will mean so much to us at this time, because the work of Judicial Watch has never been as important as it is today.](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=62232&L=17813&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0xMzUvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPU1heSZ1dG1fdGVybT1Ob24tRG9ub3Jz&hash=a27e3dffa06e173a0004e320eb691911825abcdbc43a80e551b7336d53a8f580)

[Contribute](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=62232&L=17813&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0xMzUvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPU1heSZ1dG1fdGVybT1Ob24tRG9ub3Jz&hash=a27e3dffa06e173a0004e320eb691911825abcdbc43a80e551b7336d53a8f580)
---

Our members and supporters are helping us keep our **elections honest** , expose **unlawful immigration** policies, **secure our****borders,** fight for conservatives' **free speech rights** , demand **Biden family corruption accountability** , and expose and challenge taxpayer-funded support for **Critical Race Theory** indoctrination!

**_We 're keeping our elections fair and honest!_**

Past Judicial Watch legal actions have led to courtroom victories (and massive voter registration roll clean-ups) in **California, Florida, Indiana, Kentucky, Maryland, New York City, North Carolina, Ohio** and **West****Virginia**.

Today, we are in federal court against **Colorado** and **Pennsylvania** for failing to make reasonable efforts to clean their voter lists, as required by the **National Voter Registration Act****(NVRA).**

At the same time, our election law team is reviewing voting data from the November 2022 midterm elections and federal demographic data to determine if we need to file "warnings" ...and potentially sue...other states.

Also, since the **Biden administration** continues to launch attacks _against_ election integrity safeguards, our other election integrity work now takes on new urgency.

That's why we're now in court challenging **Biden****Justice Department** lawsuits against **Georgia** and **Texas** for enacting _commonsense election laws_ that curtailed voter fraud and made it easier for _eligible citizens_ to vote.

And our legal team is studying other threats to ballot integrity as well because the challenges to honest elections in 2024 will be enormous...and you can be sure that where others _complain_ about voter fraud and dishonest elections, Judicial Watch _acts_.

[Contribute](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=62232&L=17813&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0xMzUvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPU1heSZ1dG1fdGVybT1Ob24tRG9ub3Jz&hash=a27e3dffa06e173a0004e320eb691911825abcdbc43a80e551b7336d53a8f580)
---

**_We 're Exposing and Stopping Racist, Marxist Critical Race Theory Teaching_**

Our successful lawsuit against the U.S. Defense Department forced the release of documents **proving** that **CRT** propaganda is part of the curriculum at the **U.S. Military Academy (West Point).** And we also sued for records related to alleged **CRT** instruction at the **U.S. Naval Academy** and the **U.S. Air Force Academy**!

But that's not all on the **CRT** front that's spilling into 2023...

...we are currently pursuing federal civil rights lawsuits on behalf of teachers in **Massachusetts** and **Illinois** who were fired in retaliation for opposing Critical Race Theory and other extreme woke programs in their schools.

These lawsuits are active, and the ways things are taking shape today, I strongly suspect we'll be filing more lawsuits like these this year.

**_We battle against government secrecy and for the American people 's right to know_**

We are doggedly persistent in our litigation to see _that our open records laws are respected_ , and that justice is done when it comes to getting to the full truth about **Biden family corruption ....which is why we are in state court fighting the University of Delaware over its refusal to release information about its _secret deal_ with Joe Biden that is keeping Biden's 36 years' worth of U.S. Senate records under lock and key! **

And we are pursuing multiple lawsuits to expose the full truth about **Hunter Biden 's** sleazy family business dealings, especially with **China**...business dealings that may well have benefitted **Joe Biden!**

[Litigation is expensive and time-consuming](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=62232&L=17813&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0xMzUvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPU1heSZ1dG1fdGVybT1Ob24tRG9ub3Jz&hash=a27e3dffa06e173a0004e320eb691911825abcdbc43a80e551b7336d53a8f580), but it delivers results, and Judicial Watch never stops fighting for accountability and our "right to know."

[Contribute](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=62232&L=17813&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0xMzUvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPU1heSZ1dG1fdGVybT1Ob24tRG9ub3Jz&hash=a27e3dffa06e173a0004e320eb691911825abcdbc43a80e551b7336d53a8f580)
---

**_And we are a leader in the battles to enforce our laws against illegal immigration_**

We have filed a raft of FOIA requests and lawsuits over **Biden 's border crisis** that's undermining public safety, our sovereignty, our U.S. Constitution, and our national security. Faced with the Biden administration's illegal immigrant invasion, our tireless efforts to expose the criminal negligence of the Biden administration are vital.

[Your decision to support us is important.](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=62232&L=17813&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0xMzUvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPU1heSZ1dG1fdGVybT1Ob24tRG9ub3Jz&hash=a27e3dffa06e173a0004e320eb691911825abcdbc43a80e551b7336d53a8f580) Even more than that ...it is _essential_.

clean_body: We file more “open records” lawsuits than any other organization in America...and over the past 29 years, we have broken through government secrecy on scandals ranging from Hillary Clinton’s emails to Biden family corruption issues! | | | | | Dear Fellow American, Judicial Watch is America's largest "open records" litigator. That means we file more "open records" lawsuits than any other organization in America...and over the past 29 years, we have broken through government secrecy on scandals ranging from Hillary Clinton's emails to Biden family corruption issues! But litigation comes with real costs ...and that's why | Our commitment is to uphold the rule of law and the American people's "right to know." And the best way to do that is through the legal system and the courts. I don't believe any other organization uses the legal system and the courts as effectively and comprehensively as Judicial Watch does to protect the rule of law! Our members and supporters are helping us keep our elections honest , expose unlawful immigration policies, secure ourborders, fight for conservatives' free speech rights , demand Biden family corruption accountability , and expose and challenge taxpayer-funded support for Critical Race Theory indoctrination! We 're keeping our elections fair and honest! Past Judicial Watch legal actions have led to courtroom victories (and massive voter registration roll clean-ups) in California, Florida, Indiana, Kentucky, Maryland, New York City, North Carolina, Ohio and WestVirginia. Today, we are in federal court against Colorado and Pennsylvania for failing to make reasonable efforts to clean their voter lists, as required by the National Voter Registration Act(NVRA). At the same time, our election law team is reviewing voting data from the November 2022 midterm elections and federal demographic data to determine if we need to file "warnings" ...and potentially sue...other states. Also, since the Biden administration continues to launch attacks against election integrity safeguards, our other election integrity work now takes on new urgency. That's why we're now in court challenging BidenJustice Department lawsuits against Georgia and Texas for enacting commonsense election laws that curtailed voter fraud and made it easier for eligible citizens to vote. And our legal team is studying other threats to ballot integrity as well because the challenges to honest elections in 2024 will be enormous...and you can be sure that where others complain about voter fraud and dishonest elections, Judicial Watch acts. We 're Exposing and Stopping Racist, Marxist Critical Race Theory Teaching Our successful lawsuit against the U.S. Defense Department forced the release of documents proving that CRT propaganda is part of the curriculum at the U.S. Military Academy (West Point). And we also sued for records related to alleged CRT instruction at the U.S. Naval Academy and the U.S. Air Force Academy! But that's not all on the CRT front that's spilling into 2023... ...we are currently pursuing federal civil rights lawsuits on behalf of teachers in Massachusetts and Illinois who were fired in retaliation for opposing Critical Race Theory and other extreme woke programs in their schools. These lawsuits are active, and the ways things are taking shape today, I strongly suspect we'll be filing more lawsuits like these this year. We battle against government secrecy and for the American people 's right to know We are doggedly persistent in our litigation to see that our open records laws are respected , and that justice is done when it comes to getting to the full truth about Biden family corruption ....which is why we are in state court fighting the University of Delaware over its refusal to release information about its secret deal with Joe Biden that is keeping Biden's 36 years' worth of U.S. Senate records under lock and key! And we are pursuing multiple lawsuits to expose the full truth about Hunter Biden 's sleazy family business dealings, especially with China...business dealings that may well have benefitted Joe Biden! , but it delivers results, and Judicial Watch never stops fighting for accountability and our "right to know." And we are a leader in the battles to enforce our laws against illegal immigration We have filed a raft of FOIA requests and lawsuits over Biden 's border crisis that's undermining public safety, our sovereignty, our U.S. Constitution, and our national security. Faced with the Biden administration's illegal immigrant invasion, our tireless efforts to expose the criminal negligence of the Biden administration are vital. Even more than that ...it is essential. Because if Judicial Watch doesn 't take on Washington DC corruption and secrecy, no one else will. Sadly, that's a fact. If you can make a contribution today, you will help us push forward with all our lawsuits, research and investigations... and help us continue to deliver real results! Results like pushing states across the country to clean their voter rolls and reduce opportunities for voter fraud. Results like exposing the ugly truth about Critical Race Theory and defending teachers who take a stand against it. Results like holding Joe Biden and other public officials accountable. name: Amanda Nichols
subject: Starbucks’ CEO refuses to testify in Bernie’s committee
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Our Revolution click here to unsubscribe
body:
Peter Willis,

Bernie Sanders called Howard Schultz to
testify before the HELP committee to answer for his illegal union busting.
Instead of taking any accountability, Schultz is refusing to testify and
counting on his power as a billionaire to avoid any consequences.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8349?source=EM_NBI_OR_20230216_FR_Starbucks_0_3MO_AmandaNichols_NA_NA_Schultz&t=1009&akid=4025%2E5885482%2EPH00wN ]The Starbucks CEO is now attacking Bernie with the full weight of his
financial resources and we need to have his back. Pitch in here to stand
with Our Revolution and help Bernie fight union-busting!

—Begin Forwarded Message—

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8349?source=EM_NBI_OR_20230216_FR_Starbucks_0_3MO_AmandaNichols_NA_NA_Schultz&t=1010&akid=4025%2E5885482%2EPH00wN ][IMG]

Peter Willis,

Starbucks founder and CEO Howard Schultz
was personally named in complaints filed by the general counsel of the
National Labor Relations Board for union busting.

After years of posturing as an employee-friendly company, Schultz led
Starbucks’ union busting efforts — closing stores, firing staff supportive
of unionization, withholding pay raises, and even going as far as to hire
notorious former CIA and Pinkerton operatives to disrupt organizing!

Bernie Sanders called on Schultz to testify before the Health, Education
Labor and Pensions Committee in the US Senate. And, now, despite the
likelihood of a legally binding subpoena to answer questions about
Starbucks’ questionable labor practices, Howard Schultz is refusing to
testify.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8349?source=EM_NBI_OR_20230216_FR_Starbucks_0_3MO_AmandaNichols_NA_NA_Schultz&t=1011&akid=4025%2E5885482%2EPH00wN ]Empathy-free billionaires like Howard Schultz think they’re above the
law, and they’ll use vast resources to try to smear Bernie and avoid
accountability. Can we count on you to have Bernie’s back by pitching in
to help us fight back?

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8350?source=EM_NBI_OR_20230216_FR_Starbucks_0_3MO_AmandaNichols_NA_NA_Schultz&t=1012&akid=4025%2E5885482%2EPH00wN ]CHIP IN $10 NOW » [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8351?source=EM_NBI_OR_20230216_FR_Starbucks_0_3MO_AmandaNichols_NA_NA_Schultz&t=1013&akid=4025%2E5885482%2EPH00wN ]CHIP IN $18 NOW »

name: Charles Booker
subject: FWD: National support
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Booker for Kentucky
body:
Peter,

As we approach February's mid-month deadline, I’m hoping you’ll help us
reach a $10,000 goal and help take a big step towards fully retiring our
campaign debt.

I hate to have to ask -- but we left it all on the field at the end of the
campaign, and ended up with some bills left to pay. I want to make sure
those campaign expenses get paid and I want to step into our next fight
together. First, I need your help.

[ https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/18886?t=1001&akid=2984%2E346206%2E5w960F ]If you’re in a position to do so, please click here to rush a
contribution before midnight.

Thank you!

Charles

--- Forwarded message ---

Peter, as you know, my race was not a conventional one. The
campaign we built together was focused on reaching new voters, expanding
the electorate, inspiring people who weren’t political to invest in the
democratic process.

The issues we talked about resonated with so many people across Kentucky.
Those are issues we continue to fight for and I believe that soon we will
win.

But despite the historic progress we made and the hundreds of thousands of
donations we received, national support never came.

[ https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/18886?t=1002&akid=2984%2E346206%2E5w960F ]That is in part why I need to ask again if you will make a contribution
so that we can close out our campaign and focus on the next chapter of our
fight together. Please, if you’re in a position to do so, click here to
make a contribution.

I’ve been asking for your help for a few weeks now and we’ve made a lot of
progress. We’ve chipped away at our debt, but we still have some ways to
go.

Thank you for anything you can contribute. I appreciate you and I’m
excited to move on to what’s next.

Charles

Contribute to Charles Booker: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cb-email-donate?refcode=em20230216-2984-footer&t=1003&refcode2=2984_346206_5w960F&akid=2984%2E346206%2E5w960F

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe:

You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:

clean_body: Peter, As we approach February's mid-month deadline, I’m hoping you’ll help us reach a $10,000 goal and help take a big step towards fully retiring our campaign debt. I hate to have to ask -- but we left it all on the field at the end of the campaign, and ended up with some bills left to pay. I want to make sure those campaign expenses get paid and I want to step into our next fight together. First, I need your help. [ ]If you’re in a position to do so, please click here to rush a contribution before midnight. Thank you! Charles --- Forwarded message --- Peter, as you know, my race was not a conventional one. The campaign we built together was focused on reaching new voters, expanding the electorate, inspiring people who weren’t political to invest in the democratic process. The issues we talked about resonated with so many people across Kentucky. Those are issues we continue to fight for and I believe that soon we will win. But despite the historic progress we made and the hundreds of thousands of donations we received, national support never came. [ ]That is in part why I need to ask again if you will make a contribution so that we can close out our campaign and focus on the next chapter of our fight together. Please, if you’re in a position to do so, click here to make a contribution. I’ve been asking for your help for a few weeks now and we’ve made a lot of progress. We’ve chipped away at our debt, but we still have some ways to go. Thank you for anything you can contribute. I appreciate you and I’m excited to move on to what’s next. Charles Contribute to Charles Booker:

name: =?utf-8?Q?Brian=20Lenney?=
subject: GOOD NEWS
body:
|
---
| | Quick update:

Yesterday, my bill (S 1209) that says the state can't use a child's immunization status to **INITIATE** a CPS investigation nor **TERMINATE** parental rights (think courtrooms, custody hearings) passed the House Judiciary & Rules committee _unanimously._

The next stop is the House floor where I don't expect any problems, then if it passes, onto the Governor's desk.

This is good news for Idaho families and medical freedom!

[**Please click here to tell the House Committee thank you for passing this out of committee and on toward the finish line**](https://votelenney.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7ce84224f3cc6e52f7633cc60&id=d23ff0c1fa&e=dea908e0fe "one click and one email goes to the whole committee, easy!")

Also, another big win...

Despite the efforts of left-wing activists to flood our virtual testimony platform with anti-school choicers, and over nearly** _6 hours_** of debate and testimony, our School Choice bill (S 1038) passed out of the Senate Edu committee, with a 6-3 vote (one Republican voted with the two Dems on the committee).

This bill would revolutionize the way we do education in Idaho and help a lot of families... and the idea for this bill is found right inside our Idaho GOP platform!

The next step for this is the Senate floor and it has a long way to go.

So if you have a sec --> [**click here to let the Idaho Senate know that you want them to pass S 1038**](https://votelenney.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7ce84224f3cc6e52f7633cc60&id=29e027de4f&e=dea908e0fe "one click, one email = simple!") and help Idaho families choose the best option for their own kiddos.

Because trapping kids in FAILING government schools is never a good idea.

Cheers,

Brian

**p.s. **

Here's [a tiny portion of the testimony](https://votelenney.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7ce84224f3cc6e52f7633cc60&id=a938924a97&e=dea908e0fe "watch Brian close er down") from our closing yesterday :)

1) To make sure you keep getting these emails, please add [blforidaho@gmail.com](mailto:blforidaho@gmail.com) to your address book or whitelist me.

2) Want to get off this list? [Unsubscribe from this list](https://votelenney.us5.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=7ce84224f3cc6e52f7633cc60&id=57cc6bf1b7&e=dea908e0fe&c=bad5792d34).

3) My postal address: PO Box 3753, Nampa, ID 83653-3753

4) Want to support the cause? [Click here to contribute](https://votelenney.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7ce84224f3cc6e52f7633cc60&id=cd52af0641&e=dea908e0fe "get in the fight").

name: GA Dems
subject: remember when Georgia was a red state?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Democratic Party of Georgia
body:
it wasn’t that long ago

|
---

[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58806500/392295005/227139380?refcode=20230216.1_GADems_2AB&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTA4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1MDRlNzVjNi0wZWFlLWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=y8sBO3PinxkHgB2qusaf8rP6FjgE6iB3JlV0GYZ7JkE=&emci=9dc7d4a2-90ac-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&emdi=504e75c6-0eae-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&ceid=43566853)

| | **Peter, remember when Georgia was a red state?** It wasn’t that long ago.

Heading into the 2020 election, it had been _nearly thirty years_ since the Peach State had voted for a Democrat for president and twenty years since we’d elected a Democratic senator.

**But thanks to this grassroots team, a lot has changed in just three years:** **FIRST:** We helped Democrats flip the White House AND the Senate by delivering Georgia’s electoral votes to Joe Biden and Kamala Harris and by electing Senators Jon Ossoff and Reverend Raphael Warnock.

**THEN:** Despite pundits predicting a “red wave,” we protected and expanded Democrats’ Senate majority by reelecting Reverend Raphael Warnock.

subject: OOPS
body:
|
---
| | Oops...

The bill number for the first one is actually **[_S 1029_](https://votelenney.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7ce84224f3cc6e52f7633cc60&id=686aa3f1ac&e=dea908e0fe) **(got the number mixed up below).

Cheers,

Brian

**\------------------------------------------------------
\------------------------------------------------------**

Quick update:

Yesterday, my bill (S 1209) that says the state can't use a child's immunization status to **INITIATE** a CPS investigation nor **TERMINATE** parental rights (think courtrooms, custody hearings) passed the House Judiciary & Rules committee _unanimously._

The next stop is the House floor where I don't expect any problems, then if it passes, onto the Governor's desk.

This is good news for Idaho families and medical freedom!

[**Please click here to tell the House Committee thank you for passing this out of committee and on toward the finish line**](https://votelenney.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7ce84224f3cc6e52f7633cc60&id=8260208f24&e=dea908e0fe "one click and one email goes to the whole committee, easy!")

Also, another big win...

Despite the efforts of left-wing activists to flood our virtual testimony platform with anti-school choicers, and over nearly** _6 hours_** of debate and testimony, our School Choice bill (S 1038) passed out of the Senate Edu committee, with a 6-3 vote (one Republican voted with the two Dems on the committee).

This bill would revolutionize the way we do education in Idaho and help a lot of families... and the idea for this bill is found right inside our Idaho GOP platform!

The next step for this is the Senate floor and it has a long way to go.

So if you have a sec --> [**click here to let the Idaho Senate know that you want them to pass S 1038**](https://votelenney.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7ce84224f3cc6e52f7633cc60&id=99215ad981&e=dea908e0fe "one click, one email = simple!") and help Idaho families choose the best option for their own kiddos.

Because trapping kids in FAILING government schools is never a good idea.

Cheers,

Brian

**p.s. **

Here's [a tiny portion of the testimony](https://votelenney.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7ce84224f3cc6e52f7633cc60&id=5b72d04285&e=dea908e0fe "watch Brian close er down") from our closing yesterday :)

name: Elissa Slotkin
subject: I’m filled with rage
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ELISSA SLOTKIN FOR CONGRESS
body:
#
Friend -
This has been a deeply dark, tragic week for my district and across the state of Michigan. Michigan State University, the students and faculty that attend, and the greater East Lansing community and beyond are all irreparably changed by an act of senseless violence.
On Tuesday, I stopped by to thank the amazing folks at Sparrow Hospital, where injured students were taken. Doctors, nurses, staff, pathologists, and so many more streamed in as they managed to run five operating rooms simultaneously.
Leadership is often defined in a crisis, and what amazed me was how the hospital team had to both manage the frenzy of so many patients, but also have the humanity to hold the hands of parents, sit in the waiting room with them, and in some horrible instances, hold them as they identified their children. Their work has been remarkable, and I couldn’t be more proud to represent this place.
I’ve also seen that leadership come from folks within our community who are fed up. Since Monday, I’ve received more messages of support for MSU and East Lansing than I can count. But I’ve also gotten a lot of texts and calls from Republican constituents, business owners and local leaders who I know to be avid hunters and sportsmen. These folks call to tell me that while they love their hobby and don’t want someone taking their guns, they also can't stand to see our children killed in their schools.
These folks are just as fed up and angry as anyone who’s been calling me. They are parents and grandparents who are watching our children change because of gun violence and who want something done. This is a change that I started to see happen in Michigan after Oxford, deepened with Uvalde, and has now ramped up in earnest with the shooting at MSU.
But this is what I think the elected leaders in Washington are totally missing. They are the last to get the memo. The country is changing, while these politicians remain scared of the vocal minority who refuses to talk about any gun safety changes whatsoever.
There is no need to choose between having a gun for hunting or sport and caring about protecting our kids in places that should be their sanctuaries. You can do both. But our elected officials somehow think it’s heresy to even come to the table to discuss how to keep our kids safe from gun violence. They are just missing it.
Gun violence is the leading cause of death among American children. That’s not an opinion, it’s a fact. What’s happened at MSU is now the second school mass shooting in my district in less than a year and a half — more loss, more devastated families, and another broken community.
Our children deserve to feel safe at school. They shouldn’t have to live in constant fear. I’m willing to work with anyone to address the gun violence epidemic and I won’t give up, even when some aren't even willing to come to the table to begin with.
In the coming days and weeks, more facts will emerge from this horrible tragedy that help guide our work to ensure these students did not die in vain. I just hope my colleagues in Congress have the courage to act and save lives.
Elissa

PAID FOR BY ELISSA SLOTKIN FOR CONGRESS
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com . Email is a very important way we communicate with supporters like you, but if you want to, you can [ unsubscribe here ](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=1&akid=16%2E135344%2E7nfKxH).

Elissa Slotkin served in the Central Intelligence Agency and the Department of Defense. Use of her job titles and photographs during service do not imply endorsement by the Central Intelligence Agency OR the Department of Defense.

body:
| [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58807692/392298862/665653053?refcode=fl_em_fr_20230215mm1_gv_90da_1a_hdr&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzAxMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzNzYwMGFmMC0xMGFlLWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=qmstfNjWgwuQJdvKKZ5zKCfpDL-ale6J7w9R8qMmDM0=)
---
Team, it’s Conor – formerly your favorite finance director, and now, campaign manager for Gabe for Congress! I’m reaching out because we’re already halfway through February, and we’re unfortunately behind on our fundraising goal for the month. Donations have slowed to a crawl since the 2022 election ended, and we can completely understand why. **But the race for 2024 has already begun, and Gabe is expected to be the MOST VULNERABLE House Democrat up for re-election. Cook Political Report just named him one of the top 20 toss-up races again.** Gabe was only able to win this critical, highly competitive race for Congress in NM-02 because of people like you chipping in whatever you could here and there. This is a truly people-powered campaign fueled by grassroots contributions of $10, $25, or whatever you can afford. With less than two weeks until our end-of-month, deadline, can you pitch in ANY amount to support Gabe’s re-election campaign as he fights for us in Congress? Even $5 (less than a cup of coffee these days!) will make an impact. **Here is your personal link to donate: [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/vas-email-feb2023/personal](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58807696/392298865/665653053?refcode=fl_em_fr_20230215mm1_gv_90da_1a_l1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzAxMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzNzYwMGFmMC0xMGFlLWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=qmstfNjWgwuQJdvKKZ5zKCfpDL-ale6J7w9R8qMmDM0=)** Thank you so much for having Gabe’s back and powering our movement, Conor | | Gabe Vasquez is a first-generation American, former City Councilor, and conservation champion who flipped New Mexico’s 2nd Congressional District from red to blue in 2022 with the help of this people-powered movement. Now, he's taking his experience in office and passion for economic opportunities, the environment, and giving a voice to underserved communities in Congress to fight for the people of New Mexico.

clean_body: | = Team, it’s Conor – formerly your favorite finance director, and now, campaign manager for Gabe for Congress! I’m reaching out because we’re already halfway through February, and we’re unfortunately behind on our fundraising goal for the month. Donations have slowed to a crawl since the 2022 election ended, and we can completely understand why. But the race for 2024 has already begun, and Gabe is expected to be the MOST VULNERABLE House Democrat up for re-election. Cook Political Report just named him one of the top 20 toss-up races again. Gabe was only able to win this critical, highly competitive race for Congress in NM-02 because of people like you chipping in whatever you could here and there. This is a truly people-powered campaign fueled by grassroots contributions of $10, $25, or whatever you can afford. With less than two weeks until our end-of-month, deadline, can you pitch in ANY amount to support Gabe’s re-election campaign as he fights for us in Congress? Even $5 (less than a cup of coffee these days!) will make an impact. Here is your personal link to donate: = Thank you so much for having Gabe’s back and powering our movement, Conor | | Gabe Vasquez is a first-generation American, former City Councilor, and conservation champion who flipped New Mexico’s 2nd Congressional District from red to blue in 2022 with the help of this people-powered movement. body:

---
| Dear Peter,
The Republican Majority is rapidly approaching our first 100 days... How do you think we’re doing?
Since Republicans regained control of the House, we have:
* Cut funding for the 87,000 IRS agents
* Started a committee to look at government abuse of power
* Started a committee to research the true origin of the COVID-19 virus
* Voted to force the Biden Administration to stop selling our valuable oil to our enemies in China.
* Started a taskforce to address the growing Chinese military and economic threat

**And we are only just beginning!**
We want to know how you think the Republican Majority has done since taking control from the Democrats.
---
| [Grade Congress Now >>>](https://jenforcongress.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8dd2850e8f70f37af510b3442&id=187f04cc56&e=4955722b3e "Grade Congress Now >>>")

| | His speech was full of blatant lies and half-truths about the current strength of our economy and country. **That’s because Joe’s more interested in auditioning to run in 2024 than leading now.** In contrast, our new conservative majority is laser-focused on leading. Since taking office in January, we...
* **Defunded Biden’s 87,000 IRS Agents on Day 1.**
* **Launched Hearings into Big Tech, the Border Crisis, and Biden’s document scandal. **
* **Removed Ilhan Omar from her committee assignment for her anti-Semitic rhetoric **

Peter, while __ Joe’s _already_ busy running for 2024, I’m working hard to reverse the Biden agenda and get America working for the people again.
**[That’s why I’m hoping you’ll allow me to continue focusing on that work by making a grassroots donation to support my fight >>>](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=dc28117c22b94a0a8f1ebd3ddbed95ca&_e=9hOnXernILuD-E2pmmLK40p59rcO2wv6JVhbggISsvR-fxbWM4VO5SfLr-pcHQNEO3-qLLfI7M_pTbYCyOG0pW0tuSfAWpJuWUQtT3fps6zCXSKU8Cq-ME5hR_kyjbuXDbV6bpUzsQxBpAk2v7F3XOVG9V2qSsDwg69xmy0kf3jq8Et59SIFqpcjeGWoMpGcMG1pJ7hMdPlCJqUP96hgf5F7VbRq5IP-ll-JSnT0Zj5GjW1aO5vr5lXNuZdqMdkq7-SkKePCqheRq3XyS8C56h_kHTRn1VorIAd0iw4w3XEZwN_nJnOsl4DwcNFc69UVDwQ3j4l9vk9xYlk9PjzDlbINKI4jvGCXEHyerM0eUAn_FMG3l2idKZQOcjNUfNNXQqqJGp5oMqo6h-J9iMwhGpetjklhK1h6vQCbNprJODQ3qS45bP0wb3Kx4KACE1VoyckFP-w4aKNQOUpxszBCTg%3D%3D)**

| | Want to hear a crazy story? **I’m not your run-of-the-mill Republican.** I’m a true patriot and a conservative with a proven record of fighting for the American people.
**My election in 2020 was a bitter FIGHT.** At midnight on election day, I was ahead of my Democrat opponent by **NEARLY 30,000 VOTES!**
---
[](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=dc28117c22b94a0a8f1ebd3ddbed95ca&_e=9hOnXernILuD-E2pmmLK40p59rcO2wv6JVhbggISsvR-fxbWM4VO5SfLr-pcHQNEO3-qLLfI7M_pTbYCyOG0pW0tuSfAWpJuWUQtT3fps6zCXSKU8Cq-ME5hR_kyjbuXDbV6bpUzsQxBpAk2v7F3XOVG9V2qSsDwg69xmy0kf3jq8Et59SIFqpcjeGWoMpGcMG1pJ7hMdPlCJqUP96hgf5F7VbRq5IP-ll-JSnT0Zj5GjW1aO5vr5lXNuZdqMdkq7-SkKePCqheRq3XyS8C56h_kHTRn1VorIAd0iw4w3XEZwN_nJnOsl4DwcNFc69UV_0OojAadc13LeGaadA2OazaWbe_OJLqKrlz32y-BtYuJDOHUB7o5A3XEPB8ppdq4VPwUTiV3ik_dtQl54Ck5SjQsB4NYlvKRuecJYiv9olpsePsvDSZD_YX4IMSoFzW0D6GLrQyDOIbrYRxRYVtckA%3D%3D)
---
Over the next **_90 DAYS_ ,** we fought against a team of lawyers who pulled out every shady tactic in the book to push my opponent ahead. After every ballot was scrutinized and legal vote counted, **I was declared the winner by a slim** _**109**_**votes! **
From that moment on, I knew I needed to lead the election integrity effort.__**_And that’s why I founded and led the Election Integrity Caucus in Congress._**
---
[**RUSH IN → DEFEND ELECTION INTEGRITY**](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=dc28117c22b94a0a8f1ebd3ddbed95ca&_e=9hOnXernILuD-E2pmmLK40p59rcO2wv6JVhbggISsvR-fxbWM4VO5SfLr-pcHQNEO3-qLLfI7M_pTbYCyOG0pW0tuSfAWpJuWUQtT3fps6zCXSKU8Cq-ME5hR_kyjbuXDbV6bpUzsQxBpAk2v7F3XOVG9V2qSsDwg69xmy0kf3jq8Et59SIFqpcjeGWoMpGcMG1pJ7hMdPlCJqUP96hgf5F7VbRq5IP-ll-JSnT0Zj5GjW1aO5vr5lXNuZdqMdkq7-SkKePCqheRq3XyS8C56h_kHTRn1VorIAd0iw4w3XEZwN_nJnOsl4DwcNFc69UVGoFmZmEHz6sOHSbvpccuctq7c5rZ_c-oTVUTZEUFBUNjK78Y6Ml3GRpX1zds9z5YT5GCJhGWPpTWcyk-0tRJQfF6b-FerPE_QeMEXcnvQUB6COVdTqjHcFZBfDFyZ-cx0YXB1hXDbbLWd_1QLLUIug%3D%3D)
---
_But my fight didn’t stop there. _
At the same, I was SPEARHEADING an effort to overturn the unconstitutional concealed carry laws that plagued states like mine. **And I won.**
---

body:
Let’s set the record straight.

| |
---
| | | Let's set the record straight.

I fired Ilhan Omar because she was hurling anti-semitic and anti-American Remarks across social media. This is UNACCEPTABLE behavior for a member of a committee representing America on the world stage.

I fired Eric Swalwell from the intelligence committee because he became entangled with a spy for the Chinese Communist party. I do not have to explain to you why this would be a conflict of interest for someone sitting on the Intelligence Committee.

I fired Adam Schiff from the Intelligence Committee because he spread lies about Donald Trump's supposed involvement with Russia despite knowing them to be untrue at the time.
Adam Schiff leaked it?

I promised you that if we took back the majority, I would bring decency and justice to the people's House.

---
| | [PROMISES MADE](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z2qlqls6lk3as1adabbt2o03b4va4bvh4j2g7qvo_rp22sh2s8i66pr3clge8o30c3h2bs)

---

I will not stop until we get this country back on track. But the Democrats are FURIOUS at what we have been doing.

Even now, Omar, Schiff, and Swalell are raising MILLIONS off their terminations. They will not stop until they return to power.

We cannot let this happen. I promise to fight with everything I have to stop this from happening, and with your support, we will succeed.

**[Can I ask that you chip in $1, $5, $10 or anything you might be able to give to help us take on the dark money Democrats and protect our Conservative House Majority?](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zqltdsvopqj7jk2aoim57asskakiu6v70kihqpbg_rp22sh2s8i66pr3clge8o30c3h2bs "Can I ask that you chip in $1, $5, $10 or anything you might be able to give to help us take on the dark money Democrats and protect our Conservative House Majority?")**

Thank you,
Speaker Kevin McCarthy

clean_body: NEW Senate Rating | = Derek, Elections Daily has released its first set of ratings for the 2023 Virginia Senate elections and there’s good news and bad news. Here’s the good news: Democrats' path to 20 seats in the Senate is straightforward. But here’s the bad news: 20 seats won’t cut it. GOP Lt. Gov. Winsome Sears holds the tie-breaking vote, so Democrats need 21 seats to keep the majority, and winning that 21st seat is going to be tough. Don’t get us wrong: tough doesn’t mean impossible. It just means that we’re going to need everyone to chip in and do their part. = ** | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: ******=****** | ******=****** ---|--- ******=****** | ******=****** ******=****** | ******=****** Whether that’s volunteering for campaigns, donating to the DPVA, or working in your communities to get out the vote, putting in the time and effort to win these critical elections is going to be one of the most important things Virginia Democrats do this year. Don’t forget — the only reason that Glenn Youngkin and the VA GOP have been unsuccessful in their quest to ban abortion and force regressive education policies on Virginians is our Senate Democrats’ brick wall. The fight to 21 has begun. = Democratic Party of Virginia ******=****** ******=******** [content goes here] Democratic Party of Virginia PO Box 448 Richmond, VA 23218 United States Paid for by the Democratic Party of Virginia, www.vademocrats.org. name: Michael Haley
subject: It’s official
body:
My wife is running to be your next President

My wife is running to be your next President
| |
---
| | |
Friend,

My name is Michael Haley, and I'm the proud husband of Nikki Haley.

I'm reaching out to tell you why there is no one better suited than my wife, Nikki, to be our next President of the United States.

Nikki has dedicated her life to serving this great country and its people, and she has always been driven by a deep love for America and a strong commitment to its future.

For as long as I've known Nikki, she has been a fearless defender of America's founding principles and conservative values.

**_I saw Nikki 's grit and determination on the campaign trail when she fought and won to become the first woman to serve as governor of South Carolina.

I witnessed her strength and grace as she defended America's greatness on the international stage as the U.S. Ambassador to the United Nations.
_
Now, I could not be more proud to support her as she takes her commitment to the American people to the next level to become our next President.**

As an accountant, state legislator, governor of South Carolina, and the United States Ambassador to the United Nations, Nikki has proven time and time again that she has the skills, the experience, and the leadership to make a difference in the lives of the American people for the better. But she can't do it alone. **[That's why I am humbly asking you to make a contribution of ANY amount to support her campaign today.](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zc420r8n0ju8biup1dlpdo3fsmv72iv0c2gdf160_rp22sh2s8i66pr3clge4o34cph2bs "That’s why I am humbly asking you to make a contribution of ANY amount to support her campaign today.")**

As Nikki and our family embark on this journey to put America back on the right track, we hope to have your support.

---
| | [CHIP IN TO STAND WITH NIKKI](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zqqcuaa5neolj27ehpil6t43l6k3tpep51qr0r78_rp22sh2s8i66pr3clge4o34cph2bs)
---

We sincerely appreciate your support!

Onward to victory,

name: =?utf-8?Q?Dave=20Min=20for=20Congress?=
subject: RELEASE: International Brotherhood of Electrical Workers Local 47 Endorses Dave Min
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Dave Min for Congress 2024**
body:
First Union Endorsement Of The Race Continues The Incredible Momentum Behind Min | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/b56bcc6436ba/releaseinternational-brotherhood-of-electrical-workers-local-47-endorses-dave-min-15650067?e=7017cc100e)
---
| |
---
| | **For Immediate Release:** February 16, 2023
**Contact:** [press@davemin.com](mailto:press@davemin.com) **International Brotherhood of Electrical Workers Local 47 Endorses Dave Min ** _First Union Endorsement Of The Race Continues The Incredible Momentum Behind Min_
**IRVINE, CA** — Today, the International Brotherhood of Electrical Workers Local 47 joined over 55 local Orange County elected officials and leaders, 54 members of the California Legislature, Congresswoman Katie Porter, California Attorney General Rob Bonta, California State Treasurer Fiona Ma, California Insurance Commissioner Ricard Lara, and the Congressional Asian Pacific American Caucus’s political leadership PAC, which represents 19 members of Congress, in endorsing State Senator Dave Min for Congressional District 47. This is the first endorsement by a labor union for this 2024 race. **“The working women and men of the International Brotherhood of Electrical Workers Local 47 proudly endorse Dave Min for Congress,”** said Colin Lavin, Business Manager of IBEW 47.**“The son of immigrants, Dave knows firsthand how hard work and a fair shot at the American Dream can build the middle class in this country. Dave has dedicated his career to standing up to corporate greed on Wall Street, and standing with working families. From historic investments in state infrastructure, to ensuring worker protections on the job site, Dave has fought to bring costs down for Orange County families, and build a stronger California for all of us****.”** The International Brotherhood of Electrical Workers 47 represents more than 10,000 active members and retirees who work in a wide variety of fields, including utilities, construction, telecommunications, broadcasting, manufacturing, railroads and government. The IBEW is among the largest unions in the AFL-CIO. Senator Min, the only Korean-American in the state legislature, has proven himself an incredibly effective legislative leader in the Senate, authoring 16 bills signed into law by the Governor, including leading legislation on [hate crimes](https://davemin.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1b97cb6a343b55cba640c3404&id=e63d6bcd59&e=7017cc100e), [gun violence prevention](https://davemin.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1b97cb6a343b55cba640c3404&id=5bef9328c8&e=7017cc100e), [family safety](https://davemin.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1b97cb6a343b55cba640c3404&id=d47dfd635c&e=7017cc100e), and [women’s reproductive rights.](https://davemin.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1b97cb6a343b55cba640c3404&id=030a0d65b3&e=7017cc100e) In the wake of the 2021 Huntington Beach Oil Spill, he stood up to the oil industry and led efforts to[ end offshore drilling](https://davemin.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1b97cb6a343b55cba640c3404&id=577503d07d&e=7017cc100e). Min serves as Chair of the Senate Natural Resources and Water Committee and as Senate Vice Chair of the Asian and Pacific Islander Legislative Caucus. He previously chaired the Senate Cybersecurity Select Committee. Before entering the State Senate, Min was a law professor at UC Irvine, where he taught and researched in the area of business law. He resides with his wife Jane, a UC Irvine law professor who specializes in domestic violence and family law, and their three children in Irvine. Dave is a native Californian, a product of California public schools who graduated from the Wharton School and Harvard Law School, and an Eagle Scout. ############# _California’s 47th is an open Congressional District in Orange County that includes the Cities of Costa Mesa, Huntington Beach, Irvine, Newport Beach, and Seal Beach, and portions of Laguna Beach, Laguna Hills, and Laguna Woods. Incumbent Katie Porter is vacating the seat to run for U.S. Senate. In 2022, Porter defeated former Assemblymember Republican Scott Baugh by 3.44% in this “toss-up” district. State Senator Dave Min currently represents over 80% of Congressional District 47 in Sacramento. In 2020, Min received over 158,000 votes within CA-47, defeating incumbent John Moorlach by 4.3%. 19% of the registered voters in CA-47 are of Asian and Pacific Islander descent, including one of the largest Korean-American populations in the country._
---

Irvine, CA 92616

clean_body: First Union Endorsement Of The Race Continues The Incredible Momentum Behind Min | | | | | | | For Immediate Release: February 16, 2023 Contact: mailto:press@davemin.com International Brotherhood of Electrical Workers Local 47 Endorses Dave Min First Union Endorsement Of The Race Continues The Incredible Momentum Behind Min IRVINE, CA — Today, the International Brotherhood of Electrical Workers Local 47 joined over 55 local Orange County elected officials and leaders, 54 members of the California Legislature, Congresswoman Katie Porter, California Attorney General Rob Bonta, California State Treasurer Fiona Ma, California Insurance Commissioner Ricard Lara, and the Congressional Asian Pacific American Caucus’s political leadership PAC, which represents 19 members of Congress, in endorsing State Senator Dave Min for Congressional District 47. This is the first endorsement by a labor union for this 2024 race. “The working women and men of the International Brotherhood of Electrical Workers Local 47 proudly endorse Dave Min for Congress,” said Colin Lavin, Business Manager of IBEW 47.“The son of immigrants, Dave knows firsthand how hard work and a fair shot at the American Dream can build the middle class in this country. Dave has dedicated his career to standing up to corporate greed on Wall Street, and standing with working families. From historic investments in state infrastructure, to ensuring worker protections on the job site, Dave has fought to bring costs down for Orange County families, and build a stronger California for all of us.” The International Brotherhood of Electrical Workers 47 represents more than 10,000 active members and retirees who work in a wide variety of fields, including utilities, construction, telecommunications, broadcasting, manufacturing, railroads and government. The IBEW is among the largest unions in the AFL-CIO. Senator Min, the only Korean-American in the state legislature, has proven himself an incredibly effective legislative leader in the Senate, authoring 16 bills signed into law by the Governor, including leading legislation on , , , and In the wake of the 2021 Huntington Beach Oil Spill, he stood up to the oil industry and led efforts to. Min serves as Chair of the Senate Natural Resources and Water Committee and as Senate Vice Chair of the Asian and Pacific Islander Legislative Caucus. He previously chaired the Senate Cybersecurity Select Committee. Before entering the State Senate, Min was a law professor at UC Irvine, where he taught and researched in the area of business law. He resides with his wife Jane, a UC Irvine law professor who specializes in domestic violence and family law, and their three children in Irvine. Dave is a native Californian, a product of California public schools who graduated from the Wharton School and Harvard Law School, and an Eagle Scout. ############# California’s 47th is an open Congressional District in Orange County that includes the Cities of Costa Mesa, Huntington Beach, Irvine, Newport Beach, and Seal Beach, and portions of Laguna Beach, Laguna Hills, and Laguna Woods. Incumbent Katie Porter is vacating the seat to run for U.S. Senate. In 2022, Porter defeated former Assemblymember Republican Scott Baugh by 3.44% in this “toss-up” district. State Senator Dave Min currently represents over 80% of Congressional District 47 in Sacramento. In 2020, Min received over 158,000 votes within CA-47, defeating incumbent John Moorlach by 4.3%. 19% of the registered voters in CA-47 are of Asian and Pacific Islander descent, including one of the largest Korean-American populations in the country. | | | | | | Paid for by Dave Min for Congress 2024 PO Box 5959 Irvine, CA 92616 Want to change how you receive these emails? name: American Briefing
subject: Future generations are counting on your response
body:
This sponsored message from American Briefing is on behalf of Hillsdale College
Can you do me a favor?

Dear Fellow American, Can you do me a favor?
[](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2z8q53valdcuvl7su8bb7b56eg67o94jkml8t99ko_rp22sh2s8i66pr3clgecp37c9h2bs) Dear Fellow American, Can you do me a favor? Please take time right now to review and complete Hillsdale College’s [**RECLAIM AMERICA’S HISTORY Three-Point National Battle Plan Survey**.](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2z44b1hjs84a5dta6cv768e73aunpjgkd0i296aqg_rp22sh2s8i66pr3clgecp37c9h2bs) My name is Bill Gray, and I'm the Vice President of National Donor Outreach at Hillsdale College. It's my responsibility to invite like-minded conservatives (like you!) to support Hillsdale. **I don’t use the word “battle” lightly, but with the stakes so high one must be blunt.** It’s clear to me that we are in a fight for the future of our nation—a fight against progressives who are targeting our youngest citizens. These so-called “progressives” seek to undermine traditional patriotism and ultimately transform American government and society. _The New York Times'_ "1619 Project" is the prime example of this effort to inject into the minds of our youngest citizens a biased distortion of our nation's history. If you haven’t heard, the “1619 Project” places the founding of America in 1619, when the first slave arrived in Jamestown, rather than in 1776 when the Declaration of Independence proclaimed that “all men are created equal” and endowed by God with “unalienable rights.” **“Our democracy’s founding ideals,” the “1619 Project” proclaims, “were false when they were written.”** Outrageous! _The New York Times’_ stated goal with the “1619 Project” is to influence the curricula of K-12 schools nationwide. They teach young people that slavery—not freedom—is and always will be the central and defining idea of the American experience, making our country irredeemable. This project has garnered universal acclaim from the news media. In fact, the lead essayis won a Pulitzer Prize! There are even talks about making the "1619 Project" into a feature film. **Given popular and widespread efforts like these, we should not be surprised that there is a decreasing sense of patriotism among younger Americans—and an increasing tendency to embrace socialism and other liberty-destroying ideas.** Education has become a battleground, and reviving a proper understanding of American history and government, especially among younger citizens, must be our** _most urgent priority._** Hillsdale College is at the forefront of this effort. **We are actively engaging the Left on the battlefield of education. And I need your help to make this effort even more effective.** Hillsdale is America’s most powerful advocate for intelligent and informed patriotism—our best defense against the loss of our liberty and insidious beliefs like socialism. We do this on our Michigan campus, with an undergraduate and graduate student body of over 1,500, and through education that reaches and teaches millions of citizens each year on behalf of liberty. And in response to efforts such as the media-driven "1619 Project" that seek to turn the next generation of citizens against the principles of the Declaration of Independence and the U.S. Constitution, Hillsdale must expand this critical work--especially in 2023. As I said before, to fight and win this battle, Hillsdale needs your help right away. The FIRST step I need you to take right now is to complete the **RECLAIM AMERICA’S HISTORY! Three-Point National Battle Plan Survey**. This national project seeks to make it clear that people in your state and nationwide still revere our founding principles of liberty, and refuse to let them be corrupted by those who hold America in contempt. **As _The New York Times’_ efforts make clear, powerful forces vehemently oppose this view of America, and their assault on our glorious history is taking place before our very eyes. ** _Our ongoing response, rooted in genuine learning, and proven to reach millions of citizens, must be escalated as quickly as possible._ And if, upon completing your Battle Plan, you feel a strong connection to Hillsdale’s work, then I urge you to please consider including a generous tax-deductible gift in support of expanding these efforts on behalf of liberty. Based on the costs of Hillsdale's multiple educational programs--which I will outline fo**r you shortly --it has been determined that to fully implement this [RECLAIM AMERICA'S HISTORY Three-Point National Battle Plan Survey](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zc7d8mu6fl3vhv2rj0l7kil4ktimlt07g8h1u18o_rp22sh2s8i66pr3clgecp37c9h2bs)** for maximum impact, Hillsdale College must raise at least $1,016,700. And unlike most colleges and universities that rely on federal funding and subsidies, EVERY PENNY of funding for Hillsdale’s educational outreach comes from the voluntary support of intelligent patriots like you. This is because Hillsdale College refuses EVEN ONE PENNY of state or federal taxpayer funding—even indirectly in the form of student grants or loans. That’s so important, I need to say it again—Hillsdale College refuses EVERY PENNY of government funding! **In this way, Hillsdale remains truly independent, avoiding unconstitutional regulations that would violate the College’s educational mission.** Hillsdale has built national support from hundreds of thousands of citizens. These intelligent patriots know that liberty in America is in trouble thanks to progressive control of our schools and institutions. And these citizens are determined to preserve our liberty—as I believe you are. These supporters give what they can, when they can—gifts of $25 or $50 or more, sometimes much more ... because they understand that every dollar given goes to reaching and teaching millions of people—including our nation’s youth—with genuine learning about liberty and the Constitution. The gift you choose to give today will determine whether Hillsdale can activate each component of the **[RECLAIM AMERICA’S HISTORY Three-Point National Battle Plan Survey.](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2z8mh2smbnusn1l90c36jsqe0obdvi6vnilpsocdo_rp22sh2s8i66pr3clgecp37c9h2bs)** And this entire plan is tied to Hillsdale’s proven programs and publications that are educating millions of Americans right now. Here are the key aspects of Hillsdale’s plan for your review and feedback: **BATTLE PLAN POINT #1: Identify the Critical Concerns of Everyday Americans** I mentioned that our network of supporters that is hundreds of thousands of patriots strong—such a broad base of support gives us invaluable public-opinion data on what Americans are MOST concerned about given the current state of our nation. We are always eager to add new perspectives (like yours) that can make our work the most relevant and timely possible. **Your participation today will allow Hillsdale to strengthen our educational outreach efforts by targeting them where they’re needed most, on the areas of concern that matter most to the American people.** You were selected to be part of this effort based on your record of involvement in causes that strengthen America, AND because of Hillsdale’s confidence that you will respond quickly and honestly, lending your voice to our efforts to restore the Constitution. I’m counting on and very much looking forward to your survey response! **BATTLE PLAN POINT #2: Counter Progressive Teaching in America’s Schools** In this section we dig deep into Hillsdale’s proven educational outreach, and give you a sense of how we lead important conversations surrounding America’s history and founding principles—AND ask what YOU think about these efforts. And make no mistake—Hillsdale is uniquely qualified to drive this effort. Did you know that Hillsdale is one of only a few American colleges and universities that requires each student, regardless of major, to complete a one-semester course on the Constitution? This fact has earned the support of so many Americans who did not attend the College, and who have never even set foot on our campus—they understand that what we teach in our classrooms radiates all over America. Is this important to you? In 2012, Hillsdale began offering online courses _free of charge_ , because we see it as an effective way promote intelligent patriotism and civic virtue. We market the courses on social media and online to reach large audiences, especially younger Americans. The response has been tremendous—over 2.3 million citizens have taken one or more of our online courses. Do you think this is an effective means of reaching and teaching millions of Americans on behalf of liberty? We even have an online course that directly counters _The New York Times’_ “1619 Project.” This free course is called **“The Great American Story: A Land of Hope”** and presents an unbiased and complete account of America’s past. To me this is a great example of why these free courses are needed: They safeguard the country, through education, against the damage to liberty inflicted by the Left. And what do you think about sending a free monthly digest of liberty, to millions of people? This newsletter is called _Imprimis_ , and it features speeches delivered at Hillsdale events by prominent scholars, journalists, and policymakers, focused on political, economic, historic, and cultural topics from a constitutional viewpoint. _Imprimis_ is America’s most widely-circulated publication in support of liberty, reaching more households and businesses than either the _Wall Street Journal_ or the “fake news” _New York Times_. Issues covering topics such as “Rediscovering the Wisdom of American History” and “Shall We Defend our Common History?” set _Imprimis_ apart. The publication is as a powerful counterbalance to the biased media outlets that pursue narrow, ideologically driven distortions of history. (If you’re not yet an _Imprimis_ subscriber, we’ll be happy to sign you up as soon as we hear from you.) **BATTLE PLAN POINT #3: Restore Excellence to K-12 Schools** In this section we explore how Hillsdale College is reshaping American K-12 education, especially through our Barney Charter School Initiative, which helps launch and guide classical K-12 charter schools nationwide, teaching thousands of K-12 students. These schools all have a strong civics curriculum. The curriculum provides young Americans with a solid grounding in our nation’s history, our limited constitutional government, and economics. In doing so, Hillsdale provides communities with a practical model of how schools can best serve students and the country. **Sustained by our supporters, Hillsdale’s Barney Charter School Initiative has assisted in the founding of more than 20 classical K-12 charter schools in 11 states, with approximately 12,000 students enrolled. And more of these K-12 schools are opening each year.** Do you support this effort to set a new standard for K-12 education and give young Americans a proper education? Hillsdale also launched a new initiative to send pocket Constitutions to thousands of elementary and junior high schools. We ship them with a promise to send as many pocket Constitutions as their schools need. **The response has been astounding.** We’ve now sent out more than 500,000 pocket Constitutions across the country, and we receive more requests every week. Does this effort to restore the Constitution to K-12 schools sound like a good idea to you? As you select your answers, I believe you will find that Hillsdale’s educational outreach is a powerful way to confront and ultimately overcome the progressive forces that seek to instill in young people the ruinous idea that America stands for slavery, not freedom. I know you love this country, and I hope you will partner with Hillsdale in defending America through education—education aimed at citizens of all ages nationwide. The first step is getting your thoughts on our **[RECLAIM AMERICA’S HISTORY Three-Point National Battle Plan Survey.](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zipbt8k1se2ldjnkp7j1e1njl6ra0ghil4nji6mo_rp22sh2s8i66pr3clgecp37c9h2bs)**
With your response you will represent your state as part of a major sampling of citizen opinion that can help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views and concerns of mainstream Americans—views that we can make available to policymakers and opinion leaders when we discuss the Left’s agenda, and use to strengthen our educational outreach efforts. What Hillsdale needs now is YOU—your thoughtful input on the work we’re doing, and your generous support to expand our work. **So please complete the[Battle Plan Survey](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zag8a616qaf3gu7s917ut6bn02afi487ou5scbvo_rp22sh2s8i66pr3clgecp37c9h2bs) today.**
When you give to Hillsdale and share your opinions, you will join a dedicated and growing team of intelligent patriots, who always step up when the time comes to defend America against the progressives’ attack on American history and liberty. Thank you for your commitment to liberty in America. Warm regards,
Bill Gray
Vice President of National Donor Outreach
Hillsdale College
Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844 **P.S**. We are in a battle for the future of America, because the Left is determined to transform our country ... by fundamentally changing how history is taught to young people. Education is the battlefield, and Hillsdale College urgently needs you standing with us to support and sustain our efforts. With your help, we can continue to reach and teach millions of citizens of all ages, especially the youngest Americans, with the principles of liberty underlying the Constitution. Please complete **[RECLAIM AMERICA’S HISTORY! Three-Point National Battle Plan Survey](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2z8ianet8j9h8c3kdr45bq4djbi9mq2sogfc2iefg_rp22sh2s8i66pr3clgecp37c9h2bs)** to shape Hillsdale College’s defense of America against the progressive assault on history. Your response is needed within five days so we can finalize plans to expand our educational outreach on behalf of liberty.
---
If dpwillis67@gmail.com should not be subscribed or if you need to change your subscription information for American Briefing, [please use this preferences page](http://e.americanbriefing.com/prefs/9z2zd4c75mn9nqqj3vno1ag4tpu2npj9n88tdn5ou88).
625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

With your help, we can continue to reach and teach millions of citizens of all ages, especially the youngest Americans, with the principles of liberty underlying the Constitution. Please complete to shape Hillsdale College’s defense of America against the progressive assault on history. Your response is needed within five days so we can finalize plans to expand our educational outreach on behalf of liberty. subject: My lawsuit is heating up!
body:
When I first filed, these Big Tech tyrants likely laughed it off thinking I could never prove it . . . but oh, how times have changed! | | | | [](https://5gcvd67r.r.us-east-1.awstrack.me/L0/https:%2F%2Flibersend.loomered.com%2Fl%2FbZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA%2FiOwjUnurDSjtokU79r2m7g%2FAiGgBuOLzx5l97QcrkpVVA/1/010001865b27503f-520f5059-75eb-4dd6-83aa-028d70a7e1a2-000000/Ibwha8ga7G8Vl4SsCB1TB5D0nF0=309) | [](https://5gcvd67r.r.us-east-1.awstrack.me/L0/https:%2F%2Flibersend.loomered.com%2Fl%2FbZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA%2FiOwjUnurDSjtokU79r2m7g%2FAiGgBuOLzx5l97QcrkpVVA/2/010001865b27503f-520f5059-75eb-4dd6-83aa-028d70a7e1a2-000000/JFqXNtcWG8wfeQ5ClzBs5sRnQd8=309) Dear Friend,

Last year, I filed a RICO lawsuit against Twitter, Facebook, Jack Dorsey, Mark Zuckerberg, and the FBI for colluding in a coordinated conspiracy to illegally interfere in our elections, including my own Congressional campaigns.

When I first filed, these Big Tech tyrants likely laughed it off thinking I could never prove it . . . but oh, how times have changed!

With the recent disclosures during the GOP House Oversight hearing last week in which three former Twitter executives and their FBI agent lawyer testified under oath about Twitter's use of censorship during the 2020 election, the collusion between Twitter, Facebook, and even our federal government was brought to light and proven in front of Congress for the world to see. Now, it's just a matter of getting my case to trial.

**And, trust me, Big Tech is sweating bullets.**

Last week, just one day after the hearing, Twitter and Jack Dorsey brought on yet another expensive attorney to fight me . . . and get this, the attorney is Michael Gottlieb, **former Associate Counsel to Barack Obama!**

**[Big Tech will fight as hard as they can to try to defeat my historic lawsuit, and I need your support more than ever! Please donate as much as you can today.](https://5gcvd67r.r.us-east-1.awstrack.me/L0/https:%2F%2Flibersend.loomered.com%2Fl%2FbZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA%2FiOwjUnurDSjtokU79r2m7g%2FAiGgBuOLzx5l97QcrkpVVA/3/010001865b27503f-520f5059-75eb-4dd6-83aa-028d70a7e1a2-000000/dG9HFZxbZZYd8aA7th3izresAew=309)**

There is a stay on discovery until we get through a motion to dismiss. I'm confident we'll survive it, and when we do, my legal team and I have the names of every person we need to subpoena, and we**will be getting ahold of so much data, it will blow the lid off the entire plan by Big Tech to censor me and other Americans all around the nation in an effort to illegally interfere in our elections.**

My case is vital to the future of FREE SPEECH AND FREE AND FAIR ELECTIONS, and it will hopefully help put an end to the strangle hold that Big Tech has on both our society and our elections!

But again, I need your generous support to keep fighting as my legal fees continue to grow, and I pray you'll come through for me while I continue to fight for you, and millions of others who have been silenced and politically targeted.

**[Please donate today.](https://5gcvd67r.r.us-east-1.awstrack.me/L0/https:%2F%2Flibersend.loomered.com%2Fl%2FbZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA%2FiOwjUnurDSjtokU79r2m7g%2FAiGgBuOLzx5l97QcrkpVVA/4/010001865b27503f-520f5059-75eb-4dd6-83aa-028d70a7e1a2-000000/4QDrSgpRE3ZR_nfpojLKABlt6zk=309)**

Thank you again for all that you do.

Respectfully,

Laura Loomer

---
| (C) 2023 Illoominate Media, 720 Lucerne Ave, #1465
Lake Worth, FL 33460

**To opt-out of marketing emails like these, please unsubscribe below.
[Unsubscribe](https://5gcvd67r.r.us-east-1.awstrack.me/L0/https:%2F%2Flibersend.loomered.com%2Funsubscribe%2FwJCYyn7638HXOcoR8928MiNxO5nXTgGo6s7D8pT0763BW8929so%2FjNrcjifZkRuM7634SQt2EHxg%2FAiGgBuOLzx5l97QcrkpVVA/1/010001865b27503f-520f5059-75eb-4dd6-83aa-028d70a7e1a2-000000/c95JtKtoVyQEYwpCtyMFAP45eMM=309)

subject: Check out my new book for kids
body:
"The Parrots Go Bananas!" | | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/ba51c038ee10/ari-fleischer-on-beyond-the-briefing-1207148?e=f6564bbe3b)
---
|
---
|
---
| | | | | | | | |
# Breaking news...
Americans need content we can trust to provide to our children! As such, I’ve written my first-ever children’s book that reveals the dangers of fake news. As you guys know, this is a topic I know a thing or two about...Written for kids 4-12, this book tells a fun story about 2 amazing characters named Bongo and Asher who are preparing for the biggest baseball game of the year. However, a sneaky band of parrots is determined to ruin Bongo and Asher’s reputations by spreading fake news about them.The book will be released on March 1st, but my email list gets exclusive access to get it now on pre-order! Plus get **FREE shipping** with code “**SPICER** ”.Hurry up before this one sells out. It’s sure to be a home run with the whole family, and thats not fake news.
---
|
---
| [Buy it now](https://seanspicer.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d009170fb4604b5974b5521bd&id=de4d14501a&e=f6564bbe3b)

|

The Promotion is open only to U.S. citizens or lawful permanent U.S. residents who are legal residents (green card holders) of the 50 United States, Puerto Rico, and the District of Columbia and are at least 18 years of age (or the age of majority under applicable law). Winners must be 18 or older (or of majority under applicable law) and meet other requirements as described in the Official Rules. Promotion subject to Official Rules and additional restrictions on eligibility may apply. Visit for full details and Official Rules. Sponsor: Trump Save America, PO Box 13570, Arlington, VA 22219. name: =?utf-8?Q?Lucas=20Kunce?=
subject: Josh Hawley failed veterans like me.
body:
#
Hi Peter, it's Lucas Kunce.
In a moment, I'm going to ask you to **[make a donation of any amount toward my grassroots campaign for U.S. Senate.](https://middleseat.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4df735ad160f8636f8fa36143&id=7c3adcdf66&e=8095450ef8) But first, I want to tell you about the burn pit I lived next to in Iraq -- and how politicians like Josh Hawley failed veterans like me.**
[](https://middleseat.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4df735ad160f8636f8fa36143&id=804d0829ca&e=8095450ef8)
It was 2009. I was stationed at the Al Taqaddum Airbase where I was a Marine Captain leading a police training team. Twelve Marines and a Navy Corpsman. Running missions through Habbaniyah, Fallujah, and Ramadi.
It was my first of three tours of duty during the War on Terror. And from our camp, the base's burn pit loomed over us.
Smoke columns filled the sky and blew through our living space. We ran through it, joking about how we should be doing gas mask runs. For three months that pit bathed us in toxic fumes. We accepted it and focused on our duty.
For me, that was planning our routes and pouring over intel to avoid the immediate danger: IEDs on all the convoys and missions we were running outside the wire. I was so proud to bring every member of that team home safely.
**Or so I thought -- because, as it turns out, we couldn't protect ourselves from our own country.**
When I got back from Iraq, I developed a persistent tickle in my throat. Constant irritation. I never had allergies before and annoyed myself with the constant throat clearing. Eventually, I was so embarrassed by it that I went to the base clinic. They said it was postnasal drip and that they could give me allergy medicine. There was no formal diagnosis. But over 10 years later, it's still there.
Bothersome. Uncomfortable, but certainly manageable. And that's about the best story you'll hear about a vet who's been exposed to burn pits. Many struggle with chronic respiratory issues. Migraines. Cancer.
So imagine how we all felt, watching all these Republicans like Josh Hawley, most of whom have never even worn the uniform, throw us a giant middle finger?
I know that's harsh language, but it has to be. Because what they did was about as anti-American as it gets. Patriots don't attack veterans who suffered injuries or illness from being around those toxic pits.
Many of these same Republicans spent years voting to keep us in these forever wars, lying to the American people about what was really going on over there, and getting rich off their defense contractor stocks that skyrocket when we're at war.
These people profited off of sending us over there only to screw us when we came back messed up. It's criminal -- and I'm ready to do something about it.
I served my country for 13 years in the United States Marine Corps. I'd give anything for this country -- and that's exactly why I'm running to replace Josh Hawley in the U.S. Senate.
**We deserve leaders who are willing to make even an ounce of the sacrifice our veterans have.[If you're with me, please add a donation of $10 or anything at all to my grassroots campaign today so we can get this message in front of Missouri voters and defeat Josh Hawley in 2024.](https://middleseat.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4df735ad160f8636f8fa36143&id=1c015a126b&e=8095450ef8)**
If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly:
[Contribute $10](https://middleseat.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4df735ad160f8636f8fa36143&id=249ae41b2a&e=8095450ef8) [Contribute $25](https://middleseat.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4df735ad160f8636f8fa36143&id=a61dd5a967&e=8095450ef8) [Contribute $30](https://middleseat.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4df735ad160f8636f8fa36143&id=203d841b3d&e=8095450ef8) [Contribute $50](https://middleseat.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4df735ad160f8636f8fa36143&id=7cf948563c&e=8095450ef8) [Contribute $100](https://middleseat.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4df735ad160f8636f8fa36143&id=b52088a1a4&e=8095450ef8) [Contribute $250](https://middleseat.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4df735ad160f8636f8fa36143&id=eff2a4c7d1&e=8095450ef8) [Give another amount](https://middleseat.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4df735ad160f8636f8fa36143&id=22409e45df&e=8095450ef8)
---
I'm proud to have you on this team.
Thanks for being part of it,
-- Lucas Kunce

**[Donate](https://middleseat.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4df735ad160f8636f8fa36143&id=19626eb536&e=8095450ef8)**
---
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, [click here to unsubscribe](https://middleseat.us21.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=4df735ad160f8636f8fa36143&id=10a32a162c&e=8095450ef8&c=9079f3ffad). Mail us: PO BOX 1240, Independence, MO 64050.

I know that's harsh language, but it has to be. Because what they did was about as anti-American as it gets. Patriots don't attack veterans who suffered injuries or illness from being around those toxic pits. Many of these same Republicans spent years voting to keep us in these forever wars, lying to the American people about what was really going on over there, and getting rich off their defense contractor stocks that skyrocket when we're at war. These people profited off of sending us over there only to screw us when we came back messed up. It's criminal -- and I'm ready to do something about it. I served my country for 13 years in the United States Marine Corps. I'd give anything for this country -- and that's exactly why I'm running to replace Josh Hawley in the U.S. Senate. We deserve leaders who are willing to make even an ounce of the sacrifice our veterans have. If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly: I'm proud to have you on this team. Thanks for being part of it, -- Lucas Kunce

subject: Truth be told, fundraising has taken a back seat…
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Eric Sorensen for Illinois
body:
| I’ll try to keep this brief, Peter – Midnight tonight marks the midway point of our current fundraising quarter, but as it stands, we are not quite halfway toward meeting our quarterly goal. We’re pacing a bit behind. Like Joe (my campaign manager) explained yesterday, we are once again working from the ground up. Our fight to keep IL-17 blue took every dollar we raised to win and a lesson we learned from our first campaign is that we need to build a war chest sooner rather than later to ward off attacks and challengers. **In a swing district like ours, it’s important that we don’t fall short.** If you haven’t donated recently, I hope you’ll consider chipping in $5 before midnight to help get us back on track to meet our mid-quarter goal and ensure a strong start to re-election.
