clean_body: | I’ll try to keep this brief, Peter – Midnight tonight marks the midway point of our current fundraising quarter, but as it stands, we are not quite halfway toward meeting our quarterly goal. We’re pacing a bit behind. Like Joe (my campaign manager) explained yesterday, we are once again working from the ground up. Our fight to keep IL-17 blue took every dollar we raised to win and a lesson we learned from our first campaign is that we need to build a war chest sooner rather than later to ward off attacks and challengers. In a swing district like ours, it’s important that we don’t fall short. If you haven’t donated recently, I hope you’ll consider chipping in $5 before midnight to help get us back on track to meet our mid-quarter goal and ensure a strong start to re-election. Fundraising has taken a back seat over the past few weeks. It’s been busy with speakership drama that delayed the swearing-in of the 118th Congress, committee assignments, and bringing forth legislation. I can’t wait to fulfill my promises from the trail and bring more comprehensive change for a brighter IL-17. Please consider making a contribution before our mid-quarter fundraising deadline hits at midnight. Any amount will go a long way. Here’s a good link:**** I appreciate your support, Eric | | Paid For By Eric Sorensen for Illinois P.O. Box 1172 Moline, IL 61265 United States | | Sent via . subject: A New Generation of Leadership
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Nick Melvoin for Congress - FEC ID #C00831289PO Box 92320, Pasadena, CA 91109Additional information is available at fec
body:
| | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/brysongillette/a-new-generation-of-leadership?e=1012843e9c)
---
[](https://nickmelvoin.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ecb3c4d83b7c99a9fd895cfd0&id=61bfcabda9&e=1012843e9c)
Dear Friend,
Earlier this week, Senator Feinstein announced her retirement after a half-century of public service. For over 30 years in the Senate, she fought to build the foundation we all stand upon, all while leaving a trail of glass ceilings in her wake. From leading on national efforts to legalize gay marriage, advocating for common sense gun laws, and protecting Californians by combating our ongoing drought and wildfire crises, the Senator has been essential in shaping our state and nation.
[**As she makes way for a new generation of leadership in the Senate, it is clear we need to do the same in the House. Will you pitch in to help bring a new generation of leadership to Congress?**](https://nickmelvoin.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ecb3c4d83b7c99a9fd895cfd0&id=8dbc084fb7&e=1012843e9c)
In her 30’s, Dianne Feinstein ran for local office to solve problems unique to her generation. Fifty years later, my generation is dealing with our own challenges - climate change, a lack of affordable housing, and educational inequity. Similar to Senator Feinstein, it’s these challenges that inspired me to run for public office, first for School Board and now for Congress.
[**But I cannot get there alone. There are a lot of forces fighting to keep the status quo in place and I need your help to fight back.**](https://nickmelvoin.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ecb3c4d83b7c99a9fd895cfd0&id=08748dd962&e=1012843e9c)
Thank you for your generous support!
Onward,

[](https://nickmelvoin.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ecb3c4d83b7c99a9fd895cfd0&id=08b8dee725&e=1012843e9c)
_**NICK AND SEN. FEINSTEIN IN WASHINGTON**_

name: Amanda K. Edwards
subject: The Tulsa Race Massacre of 1921
disclaimer_text: paid for by the Amanda Edwards Campaign, Melanie Gray, Treasurer PO Box 88228, Houston, Texas 77288
body:
This Black History Month has marked many opportunities to reflect on the challenges the Black community has overcome and those who have blazed trails in the community.| | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58812752/392319818/-1317380116?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDMyMDEiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYzUxMmY4NGUtMWZhZS1lZDExLTk5NGQtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=gzbq7_S4FvtrQHNRGUeY05RoFGv7c5OpmXYkingptr8=)
---
| | Friend, This Black History Month has marked many opportunities to reflect on the challenges the Black community has overcome and those who have blazed trails in the community. If you look closely at the image below, you will see me (as a Harvard Law student) holding the hand of an original Tulsa Race Massacre of 1921 survivor. This picture may be found in the National Museum of African American History & Culture (NMAAHC).
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58812753/392319819/-1098806316?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDMyMDEiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYzUxMmY4NGUtMWZhZS1lZDExLTk5NGQtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=gzbq7_S4FvtrQHNRGUeY05RoFGv7c5OpmXYkingptr8=&emci=1bd71885-60ad-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&emdi=c512f84e-1fae-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&ceid=2985257)
---
It was taken as we marched with the survivors of The Tulsa Race Massacre to the Capitol to meet then-Senator Obama and to the U.S. Supreme Court seeking justice for those who had survived the worst race riot in U.S. history. What the caption does not state is that our mentor, Professor Charles Ogletree, represented the survivors seeking justice, which the Supreme Court denied. He took his students with him to be part of this moment now depicted in the NMAAHC. During the Tulsa Race Massacre of 1921, hundreds in the Greenwood community of Tulsa were killed and between 5,000 – 8,000 were left without homes & businesses. When my mother first saw the image, she said, “you look so serious” in that picture. I believe that determined look on my face represents the anticipation of nearly a century of being without justice, and a desire to simply do the right and just thing for these survivors whose wait for justice has been far too long. I can remember how it felt to escort the survivors that day. The way she clutched my hand as we walked in the cold DC weather is hard to put into words (it was both strong and vulnerable at the same time), but I will always remember it. I have had many moving moments in this life, but escorting these 1921 Tulsa Race Riot Survivors is something that overwhelms me. I am so thankful for Professor Charles Ogletree helping to lead this effort for justice and for having the foresight to let his students tag along to bridge the generational divides that often leave gaps in our shared history.

Onwards, Amanda K. Edwards
---
|
---

clean_body: This Black History Month has marked many opportunities to reflect on the challenges the Black community has overcome and those who have blazed trails in the community.| | | = | | Friend, This Black History Month has marked many opportunities to reflect on the challenges the Black community has overcome and those who have blazed trails in the community. If you look closely at the image below, you will see me (as a Harvard Law student) holding the hand of an original Tulsa Race Massacre of 1921 survivor. This picture may be found in the National Museum of African American History & Culture (NMAAHC). It was taken as we marched with the survivors of The Tulsa Race Massacre to the Capitol to meet then-Senator Obama and to the U.S. Supreme Court seeking justice for those who had survived the worst race riot in U.S. history. What the caption does not state is that our mentor, Professor Charles Ogletree, represented the survivors seeking justice, which the Supreme Court denied. He took his students with him to be part of this moment now depicted in the NMAAHC. During the Tulsa Race Massacre of 1921, hundreds in the Greenwood community of Tulsa were killed and between 5,000 – 8,000 were left without homes & businesses. When my mother first saw the image, she said, “you look so serious” in that picture. I believe that determined look on my face represents the anticipation of nearly a century of being without justice, and a desire to simply do the right and just thing for these survivors whose wait for justice has been far too long. I can remember how it felt to escort the survivors that day. The way she clutched my hand as we walked in the cold DC weather is hard to put into words (it was both strong and vulnerable at the same time), but I will always remember it. I have had many moving moments in this life, but escorting these 1921 Tulsa Race Riot Survivors is something that overwhelms me. I am so thankful for Professor Charles Ogletree helping to lead this effort for justice and for having the foresight to let his students tag along to bridge the generational divides that often leave gaps in our shared history. Onwards, Amanda K. Edwards | | | Amanda K. Edwards has the experience and innovative vision to move Houston forward. To learn more, = | | Political Advertising paid for by the Amanda Edwards Campaign, Melanie Gray, Treasurer PO Box 88228, Houston, Texas 77288 mailto:info@edwardsforhouston.com +1 281-215-3147 | | | ---|---|--- | |

subject: Would you like to join me for lunch two weeks today?
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/mspolicy/leadershipacademy-8132808?e=5703353baa)
---
| |
---
|
Dear Friend,
You might have read about radical ‘woke' ideologues insisting that being a woman is a subjective state unrelated to biology. Crazy, right?

Except this extremist agenda had real consequences for Riley Gaines, a 12x All-American swimming champion. Radical ‘woke’ ideology could have all kinds of harmful consequences for women’s sports.

**Riley will be in Jackson on Thursday March 2 nd at 11:30 at River Hills, where she will be explaining why we need a Women’s Bill of Rights to protect women’s rights. **I would love it if you could come and join us?
---

name: Cliff Schecter, Blue Amp Action
subject: The primary for the vacant seat on the Wisconsin Supreme Court is next Tuesday. Voters will decide which two candidates go on to the general election. Will you stand with us in supporting both Democratic candidates? If they both win the primary, the next judge added to the court to replace a retiring conservative will be a fighter for fair election and protect women’s health care. Can you help?
body:
5 days to lock in the top-two
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
| | | _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tced9e2e1-ee3c-4cea-8532-6e7cae63b2aa/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
---
|
---
| |
---
| | | | | Peter, **_In five days Wisconsin could become a red state for the foreseeable future—a far cry from where it was when Democrats could often count on the state’s electoral votes for the presidency—OR ... we can help rebalance the state judiciary after years of Republican mismanagement._ ** _On February 21st, there's a first round of elections for an open Wisconsin Supreme Court seat_ _\--a top two primary for a seat vacated by a conservative judge_ _. If two Democrats win the primary, we can guarantee that the court adds another jurist who cares about democracy and women’s rights._ [**_Can you click here to join us in rushing $5, $10, $25 or whatever you can to Wisconsin Supreme Court Justice candidates _Everett Mitchell & Janet Protasiewicz._ There’s so much on the line._**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T8988744f-f906-403a-bdd0-3144657cd790/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) _From our friends at Pod Save America:_ [](https://default.salsalabs.org/T66cf33a4-5bc3-4cf1-b969-361ad0ab2718/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) To recap from a previous email we sent: **_With a right winger leaving Wisconsin's Supreme Court, we must elect a Democrat. There'__s an open primary Feb. 21st __with two Democrats and two Republicans_ _. If Dems run first and second, we guarantee a win in April's general election. At the very least, we must stop both Republicans from winning the 21st, shutting us out of the general election._** _Meanwhile, The Wisconsin Democratic Party shared recently:_ MAGA Republican-aligned candidate Jennifer Dorow just placed a $60,000 ad buy.
---
|
---
| | | | | | [**DONATE NOW**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T7b8408c7-3de0-4a47-88c8-f7e2865ab99d/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| **_A liberal Supreme Court majority will overturn Wisconsin's radical abortion ban and insane gerrymandering that delivered Kevin McCarthy a House majority. It'll President Biden in 2024 from what Republicans tried in '20 and promised to do again--use state legislatures and courts to steal the election._** [**_Can you join us in rushing $5, $10, $25 or whatever you can to Wisconsin Supreme Court Justice candidates _Everett Mitchell & Janet Protasiewicz. _It's hard to think of any race having more on the line._**](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tcb7acd0f-03b8-4412-8a46-abd1af7b1ffb/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) Thank you for fighting for democracy in Wisconsin and America! Cliff

| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T6430fb78-c5d7-4342-b5d6-2942fc7a6447/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

body:
Would you like a SIGNED copy of my new book?

Would you like a SIGNED copy of my new book?

|

| | |
Friend,

I’m excited to release a new book about my time as President Trump’s CIA Director and Secretary of State.

_**Never Give An Inch**_ contains dozens of untold stories you don’t want to miss, including negotiations with North Korea’s Kim Jong Un, rescuing American hostages, eliminating Qassem Soleimani, and much more!

**[I’m granting you SPECIAL ACCESS to your very own SIGNED copy before the book’s release to the general public. subject: Trump Stuns Supporters With Surprise Move - This Will Change the 2024 Election For Sure
body:

Thanks to our members who have supported that vision, we've become the driving force behind many victories that have brought incredible women to the decision-making table.

That's why reaching our February membership goal today is so important. Members like you power our efforts, and your support is KEY to ensuring that we can gear up to recruit, train, and support women who can defeat anti-choice Republicans up and down the ballot.

**Our goal is 25,000 new members activated this week to elect fierce women who can restore reproductive freedom nationwide — and I'm counting on you to be one of them. clean_body: | | | Your membership is key to electing Democratic pro-choice women | Donate NOW Since the last time I reached out, thousands of grassroots supporters have stepped up and activated their 2023 EMILYs List Membership. With just a few hours left until our membership deadline at midnight, we're 87.6% of the way toward our goal — but we're still missing your response, Peter. So I'm coming to you with a personal request: I founded EMILYs List back in 1985 because I believe that electing more Democratic pro-choice women is the key to moving our country forward. Thanks to our members who have supported that vision, we've become the driving force behind many victories that have brought incredible women to the decision-making table. That's why reaching our February membership goal today is so important. Members like you power our efforts, and your support is KEY to ensuring that we can gear up to recruit, train, and support women who can defeat anti-choice Republicans up and down the ballot. Our goal is 25,000 new members activated this week to elect fierce women who can restore reproductive freedom nationwide — and I'm counting on you to be one of them. Donate $15 or more right now to become one of the 2023 EMILYs List members we need in the coming months ahead, and receive your personalized membership card in the mail: Thank you for your incredible support. We couldn't have gotten this far without you. Ellen R. Malcolm Founder and Chair Emerita, EMILYs List \--- If you've donated recently, with a different email address, or offline to become a 2023 member, thank you! It can take several days to process memberships, but don't worry, we have it recorded. | ---|---|--- EMILYs List is a community of over five million members that helps elect Democratic pro-choice women to office. | Paid for by EMILYs List and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. EMILY's List P.O. Box 96612 Washington, DC 20077 United States Thank you for being a supporter of EMILYs List. This email was sent to: dpwillis67@gmail.com. Inbox overcrowded? body:
Folks, let's look at the results. Two years ago, the economy was reeling. Since then, we’re fought to make sure our economy works for everyone. | |
---
When I stood in front of Congress and the American people, I said that we were readying the next chapter in the great American story -- a story of progress and resilience. Two years ago, the economy was reeling. Since then, we’ve fought to make sure our economy works for everyone. We've helped create 12 million new jobs. Because of you all, because of the American people. Folks, let's look at the results. The unemployment rate is at a 50-year low. We've funded thousands of projects that are going to put thousands of people to work rebuilding our highways and bridges all across America. We capped the cost of insulin at $35 a month for seniors on Medicare. We’ve made a lot of progress together. But we're not finished yet by any stretch of the imagination. **And we need to elect more Democrats to get more done. Now it’s time to _finish the job_ , Derek.** **Will you chip in $7 to the Democratic National Committee? That money goes straight to electing Democrats in all parts of this great nation -- Democrats who will deliver for the American people and rebuild our country.**

I’ve never been more optimistic about the future of America, Derek. I mean it. We’re a nation with a strong soul, a strong backbone, and a strong people. We just have to remember this and remember who we are. There is nothing beyond our capacity if we do it together. If we join together to build an economy for working people, cap the cost of insulin for everybody, and stop the attacks by Republicans to cut Social Security and Medicare, we can finish the job and build a better nation. **We have more to do, but I know we can get it done if we support our party and elect more Democratic leaders who are committed to progress.** **[We need to get this done. clean_body: Folks, let's look at the results. Two years ago, the economy was reeling. Since then, we’re fought to make sure our economy works for everyone. | | When I stood in front of Congress and the American people, I said that we were readying the next chapter in the great American story -- a story of progress and resilience. Two years ago, the economy was reeling. Since then, we’ve fought to make sure our economy works for everyone. We've helped create 12 million new jobs. Because of you all, because of the American people. Folks, let's look at the results. The unemployment rate is at a 50-year low. We've funded thousands of projects that are going to put thousands of people to work rebuilding our highways and bridges all across America. We capped the cost of insulin at $35 a month for seniors on Medicare. We’ve made a lot of progress together. But we're not finished yet by any stretch of the imagination. And we need to elect more Democrats to get more done. Now it’s time to finish the job , Derek. Will you chip in $7 to the Democratic National Committee? That money goes straight to electing Democrats in all parts of this great nation -- Democrats who will deliver for the American people and rebuild our country. I’ve never been more optimistic about the future of America, Derek. I mean it. We’re a nation with a strong soul, a strong backbone, and a strong people. We just have to remember this and remember who we are. There is nothing beyond our capacity if we do it together. If we join together to build an economy for working people, cap the cost of insulin for everybody, and stop the attacks by Republicans to cut Social Security and Medicare, we can finish the job and build a better nation. We have more to do, but I know we can get it done if we support our party and elect more Democratic leaders who are committed to progress. This is our moment, Derek. I’m really counting on you. name: Eric (personal)
subject: working for you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Swalwell For Congress
body:
I wasn’t elected to sit in Washington and let others do my job. I was elected for affordable healthcare, common-sense gun control, and defending our Constitution.. I’m proud to say, over the past ten years, I have been hard at work and have already sponsored or co-sponsored over 2,600 pieces of legislation. Kevin McCarthy thinks stripping me of my committees is going to stop me, but he’s wrong.
Friend,
Over the years, one thing has helped me stay focused and dedicated to what I was elected to do: fighting for working families and our democracy.
I don’t take my job lightly. I wasn’t elected to sit in Washington and let others do my job. I was elected for affordable healthcare, common-sense gun control, and defending our Constitution. I’m proud to say, over the past ten years, I have been hard at work and have already sponsored or co-sponsored over 2,600 pieces of legislation. Kevin McCarthy thinks stripping me of my committees is going to stop me, but he’s wrong.
But I couldn’t do it without your help, friend. Without the grassroots support of folks chipping in $14 or whatever they can afford, I wouldn’t have the opportunity to fight MAGA extremists. I wouldn’t have the opportunity to work for a better America.
Will you donate $14 today towards our mid-month goal to help me make sure I can continue to do good work for California? Here's my personal link you can use: [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ESCA-14-Email-Feb2023-FR-February?refcode=EricPersonal](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58832839/392372312/1324349186?refcode=E20315-20230216-MM2-SL-DeadlineOther-PlainText-NA-NA&amount=14&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS85MDcyNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMzI3NzQ5Yi00ZWFlLWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=TH21GH_tMMQJZevXFl4a3SqAvohitDP4s4futF1QVbA=)
Thank you,
Eric

Paid for by Swalwell For Congress

name: The Warrior Fund
subject: URGENT: an American Hero needs YOU
disclaimer_text: Paid for by United American Patriots |
body:
Help us fight for this patriot who sacrificed so much for our nation

| | | [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z1s2s1930tt8hgf14bf3mkmsv8eblmsqd56vts28_rp22sh2s8i66pr3clge1ob5c1h2bs)
---
Friend, America’s Warriors write a blank check for our freedoms. They’re willing to go to war and face unimaginable odds to defend freedom and liberty. And how do we repay these Heroes? _By charging them, like the three below, with bogus crimes they didn’t commit._
---
[](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zfek7q53av3fvqasr63cgljq2clt9chlu2o6l918_rp22sh2s8i66pr3clge1ob5c1h2bs)
---
Here’s what happened to the **MARSOC 3 Raiders** ... On New Year’s Eve in 2018, Chief Petty Officer Eric Gilmet and Gunnery Sergeants Danny Draher and Josh Negron were assaulted while trying to take a much-needed break on deployment at a local bar in Erbil, Iraq. All was well until Gilmet, Draher, and Negron decided to go home for the evening and a contractor outside the bar confronted them. Despite trying to avoid a confrontation with him, the contractor struck one of the Warriors twice in the face and was in the process of throwing a third punch. In defense of his Marine brother, one of the men struck the contractor - just once - and sent him to the ground. The Marines stayed with the man for _hours_ , even bringing him back to base for medical care throughout the night after his “friends” abandoned him. The contractor tragically passed due to complications from his intoxicated state. Soon after the man’s death, the MARSOC 3 were charged with manslaughter, sending a tragic blow to their livelihoods and families. What followed was one of the most unjust trials our military justice system has ever seen. _Friend, the MARSOC 3 faced 25 years in prison for crimes they didn’t commit. They fought against bias, unlawful command influence, and intense intimidation tactics._ **With the help of United American Patriots, we were able to help secure justice for two of the Raiders!** GySgt Draher and GySgt Negron were recently found **NOT GUILTY** by a jury for negligent homicide and involuntary manslaughter. **But our work is far from over. Eric Gilmet is still facing 25 years in prison.**
---
[](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zmf8e85br84bfe27iaqe13k6pvtun0qi52vuc44o_rp22sh2s8i66pr3clge1ob5c1h2bs)
---
This is where you come in, friend.
We’re asking Americans like you to step up and contribute to **UAP’s Warrior Fund** to clear Chief Petty Officer Eric Gilmet’s name.
---
[**CONTRIBUTE: $100**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z1le4oamk6bb2qkqb7tgvr8iktgor6550fochf4o_rp22sh2s8i66pr3clge1ob5c1h2bs)
---
[**CONTRIBUTE: $75**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2ztnde0ml0ck95dpc94m2bro7k3mai2ejdq528iqg_rp22sh2s8i66pr3clge1ob5c1h2bs)
---
[**CONTRIBUTE: $50**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z1fgncc40rh3ssqig39r1va8u10o825r71p7a6vg_rp22sh2s8i66pr3clge1ob5c1h2bs)
---
[**CONTRIBUTE: $35**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zqvgkreon3monni0ku2opgi04nrd7ff630pe0ctg_rp22sh2s8i66pr3clge1ob5c1h2bs)
---
[**CONTRIBUTE: OTHER**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zff3e45d64babi17e3036doefkm903mp4dmue3b8_rp22sh2s8i66pr3clge1ob5c1h2bs)
---
Your contribution helps us support our Hero’s legal fees and expenses, investigators, and media experts. **If you can, friend, please chip in and help us clear Eric Gilmet’s name. ** Thank you in advance for your support. Semper Fi’
---
[](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zihjnso6ikenn4ibbqpd8ohqgcub15dsl6q3rhfo_rp22sh2s8i66pr3clge1ob5c1h2bs)
---

---
**David “Bull” Gurfein****LtCol., USMCR (Ret.)** CEO, United American Patriots

name: Candace Owens
subject: Do you know what month it is?
body:
It's Black History Month. . . The month when a bunch of people who know nothing about black history take the time to celebrate people like Frederick Douglas -- but have never read any of his works.

[](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=99fedcd26c9d4fbab152572a1b20e2a6&_e=24zF8D_1mL5RCMU8JtjJC_vdVT5FpYxewYab8gPRE1-9-OKvxApWrJKmhQX1Y-XgBMXZxP7onSb-aVdOQoQbccLFKyfTLlgN45L6wp1hPTouTrfsevWvaY-ZS07rPfIgg-7TRt074H_iKTEGfol1rg9cNBX2L-llH9dBabjOKlGr5SkLJhOBtFLe6EF6LRb_RaWMIA0fBzYpIAABpRaaugGQN-sl1k5fsYSt_5x41eRvtFtCqarTdp970QJni_UCegKTvP5tHSQK8_CKbZ1YDgl0FjW1fUqB1uPMT1OQd-Q%3D)

Friend,

It's Black History Month. . . The month when a bunch of people who know nothing about black history take the time to celebrate people like Frederick Douglas -- but have never read any of his works.

Black History Month isn't about celebrating the Black men and women who've changed the world for the better.

It's nothing more than a way for woke radicals to push identity politics and glorify division in America.

I don't want a Black History Month, and I can't say "why" better than Morgan Freeman did:

_" You're going to relegate my history to a month? **Black history is American history.** "_

My name is Candace Owens, and I am a co-founder of the BLEXIT Foundation. One of the reasons I helped found BLEXIT was to teach REAL history to Black and minority communities.

To teach true American history -- _and not the socialist, woke version that 's pushed today_ -- I've set a goal to raise $50,000 this month.

[_**Will you join me in the push for TRUE history, Friend, by sending a gift of $10, $35, $50, or any amount? Click here to show your support >>>**_](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=99fedcd26c9d4fbab152572a1b20e2a6&_e=24zF8D_1mL5RCMU8JtjJC_vdVT5FpYxewYab8gPRE1-9-OKvxApWrJKmhQX1Y-XgBMXZxP7onSb-aVdOQoQbccLFKyfTLlgN45L6wp1hPTouTrfsevWvaY-ZS07rPfIgg-7TRt074H_iKTEGfol1rnYvDGCSEMnYUjmiAo1viZGxZzeZYA_sgr4MQcidDmpHDc4AMGo9RjLvN0ABTXUq6Vi3BaaR_3Tai_uXQlmsoPPQQsgoLYWT0DZtwdijyPw7dWeX05Xmldj564yuVcTpUAEHSEVK0K1kXsVAQvnvG28%3D)

BLEXIT honors independent black voices like. . .

. . . Thomas Sowell, a well-known American conservative and is considered one of the most influential black conservatives who has authored over 40 books.

. . . Clarence Thomas, a Constitutional originalist and Associate Justice of the Supreme Court of the United States.

. . . Walter Williams, an American economist, commentator, author, and academic and former John M. Olin Distinguished Professor of Economics at George Mason University.

That's why I hope you'll join me in our effort to celebrate Black Excellence and work to build a better future for Black and minority communities. [_**Click here to send a gift of $10, $35, $50, or any amount >>>**_](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=99fedcd26c9d4fbab152572a1b20e2a6&_e=24zF8D_1mL5RCMU8JtjJC_vdVT5FpYxewYab8gPRE1-9-OKvxApWrJKmhQX1Y-XgBMXZxP7onSb-aVdOQoQbccLFKyfTLlgN45L6wp1hPTouTrfsevWvaY-ZS07rPfIgg-7TRt074H_iKTEGfol1rnn3aFvOeMSTIcM_79yo2NZNPgiQRrSSYRX0aLbWCEF6ghqaf-R6cMoGvVH2VYo2FYPz_IPOWwPJUC1KLGkE9dMLldlN4NXm4TNZRnkiMAvw4ltcU4t_uXyKaUDQ7VVkFMAx7TOga72VK_cEGW-A1xY%3D)

Here's how we're reaching Black and minority communities with American history:

**BLEXIT 's Liberation Camps** provide an American History curriculum to children in Kindergarten through 8th grade who live in low-income communities. We also teach key life skills and character development.

The children experience 18 weeks of after-school programming, six weeks of full-day summer camp programming, 25 full-day programs when schools had in-service days, and 20 parents-night-out programs and field trips.

**And through our 43 State Chapters made up of more than 14,000 volunteers! **

Our chapter members bring BLEXIT's five pillars to life through events and outreach efforts to places where no other organizations can effectively reach to combat the victimhood mentality.
1. **Advocating** for School Choice.
2. **Promoting** criminal justice reform by developing positive relationships between police and minority communities.
3. **Championing** entrepreneurship and free enterprise.
4. **Developing** history programs that will inspire minority children.

Presenting the message of BLEXIT through art and live experiences.

BLEXIT State Chapter members work within their local communities to help change the narrative that surrounds America's minority communities.

Friend, can you help us reach our goal of raising $50,000 this month? **Click below to send your support.**

[_**Donate $10 >>>**_](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=99fedcd26c9d4fbab152572a1b20e2a6&_e=24zF8D_1mL5RCMU8JtjJC_vdVT5FpYxewYab8gPRE1-9-OKvxApWrJKmhQX1Y-XgBMXZxP7onSb-aVdOQoQbccLFKyfTLlgN45L6wp1hPTouTrfsevWvaY-ZS07rPfIg7rPCIg5XYjENrwmj_mILG1-x-tDJ_8waDhxvzjUfocX7-_JADEaAPylJIJi4BtLbXDjGPK1ifat4Pm0dSrKyO9WYimn0e217alEyYutCYH4IvOJrYgRwHLLo8xa57ZUi3scNAcgOygyHKHj2W_cQevpPEgVDCUOiQ9vJUfFcIwc%3D)

clean_body: It's Black History Month. . . The month when a bunch of people who know nothing about black history take the time to celebrate people like Frederick Douglas -- but have never read any of his works. Friend, It's Black History Month. . . The month when a bunch of people who know nothing about black history take the time to celebrate people like Frederick Douglas -- but have never read any of his works. Black History Month isn't about celebrating the Black men and women who've changed the world for the better. It's nothing more than a way for woke radicals to push identity politics and glorify division in America. I don't want a Black History Month, and I can't say "why" better than Morgan Freeman did: " You're going to relegate my history to a month? Black history is American history. " My name is Candace Owens, and I am a co-founder of the BLEXIT Foundation. One of the reasons I helped found BLEXIT was to teach REAL history to Black and minority communities. To teach true American history -- and not the socialist, woke version that 's pushed today -- I've set a goal to raise $50,000 this month. BLEXIT honors independent black voices like. . . . . . Thomas Sowell, a well-known American conservative and is considered one of the most influential black conservatives who has authored over 40 books. . . . Clarence Thomas, a Constitutional originalist and Associate Justice of the Supreme Court of the United States. . . . Walter Williams, an American economist, commentator, author, and academic and former John M. Olin Distinguished Professor of Economics at George Mason University. That's why I hope you'll join me in our effort to celebrate Black Excellence and work to build a better future for Black and minority communities. Here's how we're reaching Black and minority communities with American history: BLEXIT 's Liberation Camps provide an American History curriculum to children in Kindergarten through 8th grade who live in low-income communities. We also teach key life skills and character development. The children experience 18 weeks of after-school programming, six weeks of full-day summer camp programming, 25 full-day programs when schools had in-service days, and 20 parents-night-out programs and field trips. And through our 43 State Chapters made up of more than 14,000 volunteers! Our chapter members bring BLEXIT's five pillars to life through events and outreach efforts to places where no other organizations can effectively reach to combat the victimhood mentality. 1. Advocating for School Choice. 2. Promoting criminal justice reform by developing positive relationships between police and minority communities. 3. Championing entrepreneurship and free enterprise. 4. Developing history programs that will inspire minority children. Presenting the message of BLEXIT through art and live experiences. BLEXIT State Chapter members work within their local communities to help change the narrative that surrounds America's minority communities. Friend, can you help us reach our goal of raising $50,000 this month? Click below to send your support. Thank you, Candace Owens President BLEXIT Foundation BLEXIT is a 501(c)3 tax-exempt organization. All contributions are tax-deductible to the extent provided by law. Sent to Freedom Nation Today subscribers. 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

Peter, America’s Warriors write a blank check for our freedoms. They’re willing to go to war and face unimaginable odds to defend freedom and liberty. And how do we repay these Heroes? _By charging them, like the three below, with bogus crimes they didn’t commit._

[](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=8268d44e3f624392ada8266a0bd58323&_e=X4PdjS1Nxy3YBnIjoDcQhN2f9XceI5qTHSkTP000NcPbFRIUT_NSSzkWusJRM13a68YRLfPpcAvmemK4kiUY095dUTKy8OqkCJjvYfOjEJgraxrNOcwefhGCigN_wioF78FLsbZxl71ZDIqCdgJNMYRcFWBuNY54IOz3a87TcAv9MXkdyS6UBfXNv038HJWAFUcRTa1Hhj5Cwb2Thrflq8Ts0G-sxRLHBIb-07Tf4NmYrsQAF9jc4iUnXh3uUlGNjBjHAX2A62br10j02fGmDwi4aMYaxyHEOq93aad0lvELW6CUTJ-TQPhXEu3od1p4jzL3ko4Ork6GwvQZINJilHn1MCFLuDbe0ftgvtm1REsfXmL8PiHzvEsGUUhaY4TVlVXE5zvDi5y5942VgFDnagqR4u5DKfrGCe8_2L2XpC7K-WL2lp40QdpxtcoWRD35wLhPZ4wUyoD14WZF2XK3_w%3D%3D)

Here’s what happened to the **MARSOC 3 Raiders** ... On New Year’s Eve in 2018, Chief Petty Officer Eric Gilmet and Gunnery Sergeants Danny Draher and Josh Negron were assaulted while trying to take a much-needed break on deployment at a local bar in Erbil, Iraq. All was well until Gilmet, Draher, and Negron decided to go home for the evening and a contractor outside the bar confronted them. Despite trying to avoid a confrontation with him, the contractor struck one of the Warriors twice in the face and was in the process of throwing a third punch. In defense of his Marine brother, one of the men struck the contractor - just once - and sent him to the ground. The Marines stayed with the man for _hours_ , even bringing him back to base for medical care throughout the night after his “friends” abandoned him. The contractor tragically passed due to complications from his intoxicated state. Soon after the man’s death, the MARSOC 3 were charged with manslaughter, sending a tragic blow to their livelihoods and families. What followed was one of the most unjust trials our military justice system has ever seen. _Peter, the MARSOC 3 faced 25 years in prison for crimes they didn’t commit. clean_body: Help us fight for this patriot who sacrificed so much for our nation.| | | Peter, America’s Warriors write a blank check for our freedoms. They’re willing to go to war and face unimaginable odds to defend freedom and liberty. And how do we repay these Heroes? By charging them, like the three below, with bogus crimes they didn’t commit. Here’s what happened to the MARSOC 3 Raiders ... On New Year’s Eve in 2018, Chief Petty Officer Eric Gilmet and Gunnery Sergeants Danny Draher and Josh Negron were assaulted while trying to take a much-needed break on deployment at a local bar in Erbil, Iraq. All was well until Gilmet, Draher, and Negron decided to go home for the evening and a contractor outside the bar confronted them. Despite trying to avoid a confrontation with him, the contractor struck one of the Warriors twice in the face and was in the process of throwing a third punch. In defense of his Marine brother, one of the men struck the contractor - just once - and sent him to the ground. The Marines stayed with the man for hours , even bringing him back to base for medical care throughout the night after his “friends” abandoned him. The contractor tragically passed due to complications from his intoxicated state. Soon after the man’s death, the MARSOC 3 were charged with manslaughter, sending a tragic blow to their livelihoods and families. What followed was one of the most unjust trials our military justice system has ever seen. Peter, the MARSOC 3 faced 25 years in prison for crimes they didn’t commit. They fought against bias, unlawful command influence, and intense intimidation tactics. With the help of United American Patriots, we were able to help secure justice for two of the Raiders! GySgt Draher and GySgt Negron were recently found NOT GUILTY by a jury for negligent homicide and involuntary manslaughter. But our work is far from over. Eric Gilmet is still facing 25 years in prison. This is where you come in, Peter. We’re asking Americans like you to step up and contribute to UAP’s Warrior Fund to clear Chief Petty Officer Eric Gilmet’s name. Your contribution helps us support our Hero’s legal fees and expenses, investigators, and media experts. If you can, Peter, please chip in and help us clear Eric Gilmet’s name. Thank you in advance for your support. Semper Fi’ David “Bull” GurfeinLtCol., USMCR (Ret.) CEO, United American Patriots | | | | | ---|--- UAP, Inc. is a 501(c)(3) non-profit organization. Donations are tax deductible. I just read the urgent letter signed by 34 innocent Americans, jailed in Washington, D.C for peacefully protesting the stolen 2020 presidential election.

**Patriot, what 's being done to them is so demonic, so foul, that they're BEGGING to be transferred to Guantanamo Bay, Cuba...where vicious, America-hating terrorists get better treatment!**

I'm heartsick and deeply angry about what's being done to our fellow patriots.

Their letter reads like an appeal from dissidents in the Soviet Union.

Here are just a few examples of what they're enduring (I quote directly from their letter, published by Gateway Pundit):

* Begging for Help / Water / Medical Aid / Mercy through a 4-inch by 10-inch window of cold metal doors
* No visits from family, friends, lawyers, or clergy
* No Mass or Sunday worship service
* Laundry returning with brown stains, pubic hair, and or reeking of ripe urine
* Broken toilets that either wont flush or repeatedly explode in Cells
* Stuck in Cells for 9 days without a shower
* Solitary Confinement for 25 1⁄2 hours or more at a time

Outrageously, there's more.

**Guards deny them hot water and keep them from attending court. They severely beat, mace, harass, insult, and even sexually assault them.**

Their food is so disgusting and so low in nutrition, that some prisoners are losing their eyesight, their hair, and getting scurvy (from Vitamin C deficiency).

There's much, much more...all of it horrifying.

And this has been going on for up to a year and a half...in AMERICA.

**They conclude their letter by pleading to be transferred to Guantanamo Bay, Cuba, where the Taliban, al-Qaeda, and ISIS terrorists get better treatment!**

This can't go on. I won't allow it.

I'm Larry Klayman, the founder ofstrong Judicial Watch and founder and General Counsel of Freedom Watch.

I'm a former federal prosecutor and trial lawyer who's fought for the American people for 45 years.

You've seen me on cable news outlets and heard me on radio talk shows. I'm proud to say I am the first lawyer to EVER obtain a court ruling that an American president committed a crime when I won my case against Bill Clinton.

I worked closely with Congressman Bob Barr and other impeachment managers to IMPEACH criminal Bill Clinton.

And I SUCCESSFULLY represented the victims of other Clinton scandals, like Filegate, Travelgate, IRS Gate, Chinagate, and many others.

Not to mention that I also enjoined Obama's corrupt NSA from mass surveillance on hundreds of millions of Americans and killed Obama's illegal amnesty for over 5 million illegal aliens, a case that went all the way to the Supreme Court!

**I know what it takes to take on federal agencies, politicians, even presidents - AND WIN!**

And now I'm pursuing two class action lawsuits and other important legal actions to get justice for the January 6 Protesters and take on Joe Biden's rotten regime in court.

**Nobody else is doing what I 'm doing in court to get justice for these poor people.**

Patriot, please say a pray for the January 6 Prisoners. Their temptation to despair, to give up, must be enormous.

[Then I beg you to help me fight for them with your very best gift now of $10, $25, $50, $100, or even more. If you've given before, please give again. If you can, give more than you've ever given to Freedom Watch.](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=5110ec8aed3840f1bd837bd85da456ad&_e=tVrbze7oTcrwLsNxTnXXIB9yKJSdW69FhSgyLp5W2PsKW1DO8vaxgnQ363SQ2i_ejUl9PzPWqsZ2ADhpUfjn-vsYLAlQuapXj_zcjn9dlBZD_HjYd305qFKGHjTLvFumRuVaktAxCljOJGbvRI5rPnXh0lCQ57_-wnUVqsrgLjqIZQCnBfya0g6ggm0veBI3ZazzbiQTmKNUyW9_7QB45CFOMmFX8HTDX1VBWLjiHDZEsVxSBSGcx-PBOlA8c3wBGn7oDb1yzZgGvix8gLbCkjBA4TLVtVCrvKIhRlL7mcuAdYMvlzYUFTgwHD21XAFz)

I can't do it without you, Patriot.

Thank you for doing whatever you can now.

Sincerely,

Larry Klayman
Founder of both Judicial Watch and Freedom Watch
Current Chairman and General Counsel of Freedom Watch, Inc.

P.S. Patriot, I'm heartbroken after reading that powerful letter from our fellow patriots who are rotting in jail in Washington, D.C. **These are innocent men and women, tortured and abused like they were political prisoners in a Third World dictatorship!**

[Please give what you can right now to help me fight to set them free. $5, $10, $25, $50, even more...whatever you can spare at this very moment. Each dollar counts.](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=5110ec8aed3840f1bd837bd85da456ad&_e=tVrbze7oTcrwLsNxTnXXIB9yKJSdW69FhSgyLp5W2PsKW1DO8vaxgnQ363SQ2i_ejUl9PzPWqsZ2ADhpUfjn-vsYLAlQuapXj_zcjn9dlBZD_HjYd305qFKGHjTLvFumRuVaktAxCljOJGbvRI5rPnXh0lCQ57_-wnUVqsrgLjqdORtzqkzneq_K0bsCptOXxmmR8x5myM2wfbsIiOSaXQYxDssXFP-XSc7fcpE0bFZ-Ld40by8MG5fGjf2LhpmwG9ch3SRNoKwFK9_1MQidNmCj72H-hrN9Oejjl3-9YObtvafMzDLJCw2LGM8p1uWT)

**Free the January 6 Protestors!
**
Right now, un-American politicians and corrupt members of the Department of Justice are keeping innocent Americans in jail without due process...they're often abused and beaten...they're blocked from seeing their wives and children...and kept from seeing their lawyers and clergy!

At least one January 6 protestor has already died.

And another protester, a patriot grandma with cancer, just finished serving 60 days in federal prison for a crime she didn't commit.

[But there's something you can do about it ...you can donate immediately to Freedom Watch's critically important lawsuit to HELP FREE the rest of these persecuted patriots with your crucial gift today.](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=5110ec8aed3840f1bd837bd85da456ad&_e=tVrbze7oTcrwLsNxTnXXIB9yKJSdW69FhSgyLp5W2PsKW1DO8vaxgnQ363SQ2i_ejUl9PzPWqsZ2ADhpUfjn-vsYLAlQuapXj_zcjn9dlBZD_HjYd305qFKGHjTLvFumRuVaktAxCljOJGbvRI5rPnXh0lCQ57_-wnUVqsrgLjrPfcrhl8Xa-Rue5aaZte9HlcdrMl7P9nM75JtW5YIoKeOpD2iubjiyVLC-4yP2TviL4Iw1aM-NEVxnfXsxbyveXcL9P5qK0bMCF94wTKXi6wJvoOKm2cE1ccehRH04ju7-DW11G3bMBULnIYDlCY9H)

| | Peter, the people of Washington, D.C. have been fighting for statehood for over _200 years_ — **so why is D.C. still not a state?**

**_We know why._**
| IT’S NOT A COINCIDENCE THAT D.C. HAS A HIGHER PERCENTAGE OF BLACK RESIDENTS THAN ANY OF THE 50 STATES AND IS THE ONLY CAPITAL OF A DEMOCRATIC NATION WHOSE RESIDENTS DO NOT HAVE A VOTE IN THE FEDERAL LEGISLATURE.

[THIS BLACK HISTORY MONTH, WE NEED YOU TO STAND WITH US IN DEMANDING THAT WASHINGTON, D.C. BE GRANTED STATEHOOD. The population of D.C. is over 700,000, greater than both Wyoming and Vermont. **That’s 700,000 taxpaying Americans whose voices aren’t being heard in the federal legislature — and almost half of those voices are Black.**

[THAT’S UNACCEPTABLE, Peter. ADD YOUR NAME TO OUR PETITION RIGHT NOW AND VOICE YOUR SUPPORT FOR THE HUNDREDS OF THOUSANDS OF BLACK AMERICANS LIVING AND PAYING TAXES IN D.C. | | Dear Friend, Dave Walker needs your help to win his seat! We have several door launches, phone banks, and other activities where you can help get Dave elected!
* Saturday, 2/18, 10am: Super Saturday Door Launch, meeting at 59 Brock St. Rochester
* Sunday, 2/19, 12pm: Door Knocking, meeting at 59 Brock St. Rochester
* Monday, 2/20, 12pm: President's Day Door Launch and Phone Bank, meeting at 120 Washington St. Rochester

We also need volunteers on Election Day, Tuesday, 2/21, between 7 am and 7 pm to make phone calls and drive voters to the polls. We will be meeting at 120 Washington St. Rochester. If you plan on attending a door launch, be sure to bring your phone. If you are attending our phone banks bring your phone, phone charger, and laptop if you have one! If you are able to attend any or all of these events please email me at jgagnon@nhrsc.com.
---
| | Thank you!Joe GagnonHouse Caucus Director

| | By a vote of 52-46, the U.S. Senate has confirmed Adrienne Nelson to the U.S. District Court for Oregon, elevating her from the Oregon Supreme Court. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58820025/392335771/1700990217?refcode=2023-02-16-nelson&recurring=0&amount=11&amounts=10,30,50,100,200&refcode2=57831303-29ae-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDEvMS84OTMyNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1NzgzMTMwMy0yOWFlLWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=OxeIuuB1qvv9tHfnGAxQQQygvbdRZIXxuBF95UBGKIA=)Nelson will be the first Black woman to serve as a federal judge in Oregon. **This is one of the untold stories of President Biden's presidency.** Of the 103 federal judges appointed by Biden and confirmed by the Senate, 79 are women, and of those, 51 are women of color. Not only that, but Biden has nominated dozens of judges – including Adrienne Nelson – who have experience as public defenders and public sector lawyers. And dozens, like Nelson, who attended law school outside elite and Ivy League schools. **Of course, this is only happening because Democrats have a majority in the Senate.** If Mitch McConnell were running things, most of these judges would never get a hearing, much less a vote on the Senate floor. In 2024, we have a tough uphill battle to retain control of the Senate. name: Andrew Hughes
subject: Should Dr. Ben Carson Be Canceled?
body:
Dr. Carson asked me to reach out to Americans who want what's best for our country, to help him take a stand against "cancel culture."

|
---
| | | [](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=9626a11350304a6d8c18955c892e08a5&_e=oRr-GLHOLG8WTuUhSsBwj_yLJlnWPqbE6JCyZwkVZY5-48--lJL_WnTxQBXWZvXDHZ4y7mV5iCZDmRIZE3tMtuHYdzpOE4F8P8FkDZrtqgfhRB3ZNreoUnl-l7TQZ3Cbam--ElNagS7HeNZy0iNX8fzqXq6DuUeYaFT0SHf43XBperp9whSgZlLfck-jjSHdha8KaPa7Cya4tdyHfeihVpluB_FVD49Vk27HmRHQjLGfA0IWmqTbQPD8mZHsfVoIHPI-h-g7-Y3bP_sA8JTup6xDGkdGKLSU_3M4tCtLRfWNw_lnPw3gDPxDmNrjJqfpfCAaccI2LuTf4avtfFBE9dWcJRfXEFOx3sh4KYINc7Ov2HNNnGCQPwrui75LOg6OjIqgyFQIqTGyl-lRVx2KhTw6CdRZG1_quHCfH-jt3UU%3D)
---
| Fellow Patriot,

Dr. Carson asked me to reach out to Americans who want what's best for our country, to help him take a stand against "cancel culture." It's tearing our country apart and needs to be stopped.

This is something he has experienced firsthand.

As you may have heard, this past November the Detroit School Board voted to change the name of the Benjamin Carson High School of Science and Medicine. Why? Because the School Board was mad that Dr. Carson was part of the Trump Administration!

These educational leaders - who should be acting as role models for our kids - instead decided to create a huge political spectacle by "canceling" Dr. Carson and trying to erase his amazing achievements as a doctor, as a leader, and as a citizen. It's really outrageous.

Dr. Carson is disappointed by this - not because he wants any glory but because it sets a bad example ... for the kids at this school, and for the entire country.

"Cancel culture" tells young people and all Americans that you shouldn't listen to those with whom you disagree and try to find common ground; you should just stigmatize them and erase them.

The Left probably expected Dr. Carson to lash out at the Detroit School Board and his political opponents - hurl some insults, call people names, keep the fight going.

But instead, Dr. Carson said to our team here at the American Cornerstone Institute (ACI):

_" What if we use this as an opportunity to rally people across the country to speak out against cancel culture? To show America that we have a better path forward for our country than hate and division?"_

And that's exactly what we're doing. It's why Dr. Carson launched ACI in the first place - to lead the way for what's best for our country.

And we've created a way for you to stand with Dr. Carson and make your voice heard. Just click the link below; it will take you to our **National Statement Against Cancel Culture** that you can review and then co-sign.

[https://offers.americancornerstone.org/cancel-culture-pledge](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=9626a11350304a6d8c18955c892e08a5&_e=oRr-GLHOLG8WTuUhSsBwj_yLJlnWPqbE6JCyZwkVZY5-48--lJL_WnTxQBXWZvXDHZ4y7mV5iCZDmRIZE3tMtuHYdzpOE4F8P8FkDZrtqgfhRB3ZNreoUnl-l7TQZ3Cbam--ElNagS7HeNZy0iNX8fzqXq6DuUeYaFT0SHf43XBperp9whSgZlLfck-jjSHdha8KaPa7Cya4tdyHfeihVpluB_FVD49Vk27HmRHQjLGfA0IWmqTbQPD8mZHsfVoIHPI-h-g7-Y3bP_sA8JTupz205Fxyir-VGyriWpHieUUzmCNbFa2GTqMVNtCNSgcGywyk2kIeOn2-Z49VZS0VSUAXfMxxpEK0vkvMGPlMHlayZh9ah2ji486N6wGENn9QpItAxl9jh1uxmpXCi-KRbf5uxrFAUBvGoUxMVSi9N4A%3D)

Dr. Carson is getting asked about the Detroit school incident quite a bit, and when he answers he wants to speak for Americans who are heartbroken by what cancel culture is doing to our country - who want this divisiveness and vitriol to end! I think you're just such an American.

And when you and thousands of concerned citizens like you sign this Statement, Dr. Carson will be able to keep speaking from the heart against cancel culture - knowing that he's broadcasting a message that is important to his fellow Americans.

He can say ... "Enough is enough! I'm fed up with cancel culture, and so are folks everywhere who love America and want what's best for the country."

If that's a message you want Dr. Carson to share on your behalf, please take a moment now to be part of ACI's **National Statement Against Cancel Culture**. Here's the link again for you:

[https://offers.americancornerstone.org/cancel-culture-pledge](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=9626a11350304a6d8c18955c892e08a5&_e=oRr-GLHOLG8WTuUhSsBwj_yLJlnWPqbE6JCyZwkVZY5-48--lJL_WnTxQBXWZvXDHZ4y7mV5iCZDmRIZE3tMtuHYdzpOE4F8P8FkDZrtqgfhRB3ZNreoUnl-l7TQZ3Cbam--ElNagS7HeNZy0iNX8fzqXq6DuUeYaFT0SHf43XBperp9whSgZlLfck-jjSHdha8KaPa7Cya4tdyHfeihVpluB_FVD49Vk27HmRHQjLGfA0IWmqTbQPD8mZHsfVoIHPI-h-g7-Y3bP_sA8JTup5bywJnfUyWAn56_Ca3ieY10uAkCc0COtVv_Wh5DafyJsVE2fkG8Phq-ULF72v7HxQimGWQSJg9qPGHrOigWTuN3XeL7ruLMJ8oB175awLdUqulvM3fGy3fHN8kIf-gF4B6YNSnhxBqVYVyCcGoxyRE%3D)

Amid all the divisiveness and polarization that has been injected into our policy debates, Dr. Carson is proud of the work ACI is doing to encourage Americans to come together despite our differences and find ways to take on the challenges that face our country.

I hope you'll join Dr. Carson in this important work. Thank you!

Sincerely,

Andrew D. Hughes
Executive Director & CEO
American Cornerstone Institute

Because the School Board was mad that Dr. Carson was part of the Trump Administration! These educational leaders - who should be acting as role models for our kids - instead decided to create a huge political spectacle by "canceling" Dr. Carson and trying to erase his amazing achievements as a doctor, as a leader, and as a citizen. It's really outrageous. Dr. Carson is disappointed by this - not because he wants any glory but because it sets a bad example ... for the kids at this school, and for the entire country. "Cancel culture" tells young people and all Americans that you shouldn't listen to those with whom you disagree and try to find common ground; you should just stigmatize them and erase them. The Left probably expected Dr. Carson to lash out at the Detroit School Board and his political opponents - hurl some insults, call people names, keep the fight going. [Please give a crucial $10, $25, $50, $100, or more IMMEDIATELY to fully fund my two critical, class action lawsuits and hard-hitting legal actions to FREE ALL JANUARY 6 PROTESTERS!](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=4dcfc02e66e6455ea4c898994f5bd2db&_e=gbRFoH9uXgLOk0Otwx2nCMSUOMr1bqvAdHBaWpeHWE4ZVRHaTodcdhH8OePtl1h3kUMeyH_S9V8q5sYzjOzO0R1_4ryaO5LPbII5CCQrPshB9SChAwrvxniBhY2zlW4JY9kdgLy0WbZZDQ-pE2OmW-qUhP99HaA7JZGOd-HrnOGwKgfO2yK6OfjdpwI9-IXir92_OU_OHVTq4ncL8ikNsuA_jeJ18f56Tk3RbK1xO5ifEqvwIPeO4w8M8xZSdPpHAnL9bOu6CH_kpQRoASmdkua8oWtbE9aSb6EZDNN42fOmPV6UcR9QqSU7T0o3Qf66)

I just read the urgent letter signed by 34 innocent Americans, jailed in Washington, D.C for peacefully protesting the stolen 2020 presidential election.

**Patriot, what 's being done to them is so demonic, so foul, that they're BEGGING to be transferred to Guantanamo Bay, Cuba...where vicious, America-hating terrorists get better treatment!**

I'm heartsick and deeply angry about what's being done to our fellow patriots.

Their letter reads like an appeal from dissidents in the Soviet Union.

Here are just a few examples of what they're enduring (I quote directly from their letter, published by Gateway Pundit):

* Begging for Help / Water / Medical Aid / Mercy through a 4-inch by 10-inch window of cold metal doors
* No visits from family, friends, lawyers, or clergy
* No Mass or Sunday worship service
* Laundry returning with brown stains, pubic hair, and or reeking of ripe urine
* Broken toilets that either wont flush or repeatedly explode in Cells
* Stuck in Cells for 9 days without a shower
* Solitary Confinement for 25 1⁄2 hours or more at a time

Outrageously, there's more.

**Guards deny them hot water and keep them from attending court. They severely beat, mace, harass, insult, and even sexually assault them.**

Their food is so disgusting and so low in nutrition, that some prisoners are losing their eyesight, their hair, and getting scurvy (from Vitamin C deficiency).

There's much, much more...all of it horrifying.

And this has been going on for up to a year and a half...in AMERICA.

**They conclude their letter by pleading to be transferred to Guantanamo Bay, Cuba, where the Taliban, al-Qaeda, and ISIS terrorists get better treatment!**

This can't go on. I won't allow it.

I'm Larry Klayman, the founder ofstrong Judicial Watch and founder and General Counsel of Freedom Watch.

And now I'm pursuing two class action lawsuits and other important legal actions to get justice for the January 6 Protesters and take on Joe Biden's rotten regime in court.

We need to work just as hard to elect pro-voter Secretaries of State across the country. DASS is the one group solely dedicated to electing Democratic Secretaries of State who will protect your right to vote. And we need your help.**= = = = = = = = Team DASS Thank you for your dedicated support of The Democratic Association of Secretaries of State. We're the ONLY national organization dedicated to electing these state-level voting rights champions. = | =

subject: The latest news for you

| For Immediate Release: February 16, 2023 | [press@DolanForOhio.com](mailto:press@DolanForOhio.com)
---
| Matt Dolan Launches "Blind Loyalty Brown" Digital Ad Campaign
---
| Cleveland, OH: U.S. Senate candidate Matt Dolan launched a digital ad campaign Thursday highlighting Sherrod Brown's blind loyalty to his party. Despite the recent assertions of left-wing PACs and Ohio Democrats, [analysts have found](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001zvKD_MxIjOPjj1Wfd7oI4ndfa_QbhchT8jk78jPJV_r8EHsNQFYuMh8HYXSAZQVrZ4mdWWAzc5rUIi551TOfZ3UdncxWV5JgfpMjNCX-FgtspIqFe911lm88GO1JykZrQ3vXUE7VSUPMJ3eTyM-K6r64T7iy8LSsYn_xWCKif_FjEE_7DVCtig==&c=mMb5b-L3_vixaKkXT4sQsibT0iM-ZR7_dY4W7enXlKWDgR_PkY6udQ==&ch=dNYAzmIJEnIJdUphPfulXchyJi9k27CPOUvlcPpHwpmHqg6esjXa_g==) that Brown votes with Joe Biden 98.5% of the time. The ad campaign, running on digital platforms, calls on Ohio voters to visit [BlindLoyaltyBrown.com](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001zvKD_MxIjOPjj1Wfd7oI4ndfa_QbhchT8jk78jPJV_r8EHsNQFYuMh8HYXSAZQVrH2e-l3jNbBmGqembKAmI_Ae2DqJXa2H_MDjqHTHY167iJe4My8lPkONmjAsd_WT0Knigno_I3_1oPd-zD6mG3fBweRHvYCJj1yUeQ7bZkswWry6gTxjU2g==&c=mMb5b-L3_vixaKkXT4sQsibT0iM-ZR7_dY4W7enXlKWDgR_PkY6udQ==&ch=dNYAzmIJEnIJdUphPfulXchyJi9k27CPOUvlcPpHwpmHqg6esjXa_g==) and sign a petition to "send a message to Sherrod Brown's liberal, out-of-state allies that anyone who votes with Joe Biden more than 98% of the time is no 'independent."
"Liberal PACs and partisan left-wing organizations are smearing me and fellow conservatives in Ohio because they cannot defend Sherrod Brown's liberal record. They claim there's no proof that Sherrod Brown is blindly loyal to his party. Well, we have the receipts," Matt Dolan said. "For years, Sherrod Brown has said one thing to Ohioans and then voted against our interests in the U.S. Senate. He claims to be a champion of workers, but he votes in lockstep with Joe Biden more than 98% of the time to undermine the national security of our nation and the financial security of working families. Sherrod Brown doesn't understand that Ohioans want security, not a federal government that opens our borders, contributes to inflation and demonizes our police. Enough is enough, I'm running for Senate to confront the big challenges Sherrod Brown and Joe Biden have kicked down the road for a generation. I have a proven conservative record of success that has yielded results for Ohio families, workers and businesses."
On Feb. 8, Welcome PAC, a liberal special interest group organized and funded from outside Ohio, attacked Matt Dolan in a [Columbus Dispatch op-ed](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001zvKD_MxIjOPjj1Wfd7oI4ndfa_QbhchT8jk78jPJV_r8EHsNQFYuMh8HYXSAZQVr4l9ZX0vxMM2o-daXphe3SSIsmOV2hRBdP3z5qurrono9KpN5MxwQA3Z1r_ePm3r95GRrD_eiKyP9Suo_vZtPwUF0PIADX0r0Adc52lvygxY2fxQMZOyqhern5Zsf8l0GT4GJAnm5JmYl4zZwUjUpBMiEvj9wNI3EUaJrAHsE0yuwo9wYp89pEnWiO0ijOwff2gAJSF5yCVurJx7tHnYK6K08VT3SoIqg7ly8UkD6fftNasCH1WAnfUTBu7B79ITBFm5PlmdsCzQrojFBLz8FytlBon79XXna9AW2NKBidsHFyHFCrq-XEj_3HMYOYEx5p3bGGDp1s3r4SObOEwUl1YLxSzpXQBiN&c=mMb5b-L3_vixaKkXT4sQsibT0iM-ZR7_dY4W7enXlKWDgR_PkY6udQ==&ch=dNYAzmIJEnIJdUphPfulXchyJi9k27CPOUvlcPpHwpmHqg6esjXa_g==)[.](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001zvKD_MxIjOPjj1Wfd7oI4ndfa_QbhchT8jk78jPJV_r8EHsNQFYuMh8HYXSAZQVr4l9ZX0vxMM2o-daXphe3SSIsmOV2hRBdP3z5qurrono9KpN5MxwQA3Z1r_ePm3r95GRrD_eiKyP9Suo_vZtPwUF0PIADX0r0Adc52lvygxY2fxQMZOyqhern5Zsf8l0GT4GJAnm5JmYl4zZwUjUpBMiEvj9wNI3EUaJrAHsE0yuwo9wYp89pEnWiO0ijOwff2gAJSF5yCVurJx7tHnYK6K08VT3SoIqg7ly8UkD6fftNasCH1WAnfUTBu7B79ITBFm5PlmdsCzQrojFBLz8FytlBon79XXna9AW2NKBidsHFyHFCrq-XEj_3HMYOYEx5p3bGGDp1s3r4SObOEwUl1YLxSzpXQBiN&c=mMb5b-L3_vixaKkXT4sQsibT0iM-ZR7_dY4W7enXlKWDgR_PkY6udQ==&ch=dNYAzmIJEnIJdUphPfulXchyJi9k27CPOUvlcPpHwpmHqg6esjXa_g==) In it, they describe Sherrod Brown as an "independent Democrat," and said that there was no proof that Sherrod Brown had "blind loyalty" to his party.
[BlindLoyaltyBrown.com](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001zvKD_MxIjOPjj1Wfd7oI4ndfa_QbhchT8jk78jPJV_r8EHsNQFYuMh8HYXSAZQVrgWuxBRng1nF7-kiXeINyNsOTfucgmHSMiYoU2LRJvLy4epOXp6m4C5zPtZJLgBrCFdxWIgzXFFLlx5XQRWhRbQ==&c=mMb5b-L3_vixaKkXT4sQsibT0iM-ZR7_dY4W7enXlKWDgR_PkY6udQ==&ch=dNYAzmIJEnIJdUphPfulXchyJi9k27CPOUvlcPpHwpmHqg6esjXa_g==) includes recently documented instances of Sherrod Brown placing party loyalty before Ohio's interests. Whether floating his name for president or running for reelection in Ohio, Brown has stated publicly that he wants to end the filibuster and potentially increase the number of seats on the Supreme Court to remove any restraints on his far-left, radical policy agenda.
***** The Sherrod "Blind Loyalty" Brown Facts:
Sherrod Brown votes with Joe Biden 98.5% of the time. ([FiveThirty](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001zvKD_MxIjOPjj1Wfd7oI4ndfa_QbhchT8jk78jPJV_r8EHsNQFYuMh8HYXSAZQVr02QVMOwJi5WbU3TW8XZcumbqXSqIRj2B5iX2TLRpupw_-TmDdfUjbqx559YJINVe3n_i-s39UntHTvHxMFp5dX64X65cNcHKAxgCXxdZ5RZbmJjJcK9-IyHlD3XX84qL&c=mMb5b-L3_vixaKkXT4sQsibT0iM-ZR7_dY4W7enXlKWDgR_PkY6udQ==&ch=dNYAzmIJEnIJdUphPfulXchyJi9k27CPOUvlcPpHwpmHqg6esjXa_g==)[Eight](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001zvKD_MxIjOPjj1Wfd7oI4ndfa_QbhchT8jk78jPJV_r8EHsNQFYuMh8HYXSAZQVr02QVMOwJi5WbU3TW8XZcumbqXSqIRj2B5iX2TLRpupw_-TmDdfUjbqx559YJINVe3n_i-s39UntHTvHxMFp5dX64X65cNcHKAxgCXxdZ5RZbmJjJcK9-IyHlD3XX84qL&c=mMb5b-L3_vixaKkXT4sQsibT0iM-ZR7_dY4W7enXlKWDgR_PkY6udQ==&ch=dNYAzmIJEnIJdUphPfulXchyJi9k27CPOUvlcPpHwpmHqg6esjXa_g==)[,](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001zvKD_MxIjOPjj1Wfd7oI4ndfa_QbhchT8jk78jPJV_r8EHsNQFYuMh8HYXSAZQVr02QVMOwJi5WbU3TW8XZcumbqXSqIRj2B5iX2TLRpupw_-TmDdfUjbqx559YJINVe3n_i-s39UntHTvHxMFp5dX64X65cNcHKAxgCXxdZ5RZbmJjJcK9-IyHlD3XX84qL&c=mMb5b-L3_vixaKkXT4sQsibT0iM-ZR7_dY4W7enXlKWDgR_PkY6udQ==&ch=dNYAzmIJEnIJdUphPfulXchyJi9k27CPOUvlcPpHwpmHqg6esjXa_g==) Senate Scorecard, Accessed 2/10/23)
Sherrod Brown wants to "end the filibuster" to ram his party's radical agenda through the U.S. Senate. ([SherrodBrown.com Website,](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001zvKD_MxIjOPjj1Wfd7oI4ndfa_QbhchT8jk78jPJV_r8EHsNQFYuMh8HYXSAZQVr7-qlxqyJPzGmHnw4okukz6290iiUKpoLOtPl6o25Dt2fYMwSnzDpufpYjHUC4HNkFkQtQyvbs_Awj4BOtMfz7p64ZPNrcdzCx4Uzs4tNHBlJUyw2wm2O8C1BefUgGJUE&c=mMb5b-L3_vixaKkXT4sQsibT0iM-ZR7_dY4W7enXlKWDgR_PkY6udQ==&ch=dNYAzmIJEnIJdUphPfulXchyJi9k27CPOUvlcPpHwpmHqg6esjXa_g==) Accessed 2/10/23)
To advance his party's far-left policies, Sherrod Brown is open to expanding the size of the Supreme Court to install far-left activist judges. ([MSNBC ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001zvKD_MxIjOPjj1Wfd7oI4ndfa_QbhchT8jk78jPJV_r8EHsNQFYuMh8HYXSAZQVr9CIdgKRR9MyKu420SuUsqv3GTRMZWHxiSGrVsHpI1wtGYO8iMHdgHkScO_FJ68eMBHxigIdj1EkYS78aJ9_FTHVjqDvt1D70jWwOoiV0qHkOSQwGPtw-9w==&c=mMb5b-L3_vixaKkXT4sQsibT0iM-ZR7_dY4W7enXlKWDgR_PkY6udQ==&ch=dNYAzmIJEnIJdUphPfulXchyJi9k27CPOUvlcPpHwpmHqg6esjXa_g==)Interview, 10/26/2020)
Sherrod Brown is ignorant to the chaos and security crisis at America's southern border caused by Joe Biden's policy agenda. He claims that border security is a "far-right" issue. ([NBC Meet the Press](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001zvKD_MxIjOPjj1Wfd7oI4ndfa_QbhchT8jk78jPJV_r8EHsNQFYuMh8HYXSAZQVrT4GmQp17bZoQnAZvy5IX7p1RRE3iEjB4oxFuIe5_4vwFyzAHWE3YZh_PXPHm6vyRyPHzGedS9huB1kU34D8mMzyqf2WcTj-y4BA2hjXPzL1-9YqmYKx-kVJs7bjhPXl6&c=mMb5b-L3_vixaKkXT4sQsibT0iM-ZR7_dY4W7enXlKWDgR_PkY6udQ==&ch=dNYAzmIJEnIJdUphPfulXchyJi9k27CPOUvlcPpHwpmHqg6esjXa_g==) Interview, 12/18/22)
Sherrod Brown blindly supports Kamala Harris's reckless proposal to socialize our health care system through the elimination of private health insurance. ([MSNBC](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001zvKD_MxIjOPjj1Wfd7oI4ndfa_QbhchT8jk78jPJV_r8EHsNQFYuMh8HYXSAZQVrv5Q9RMpfUePDTb9N6ZQcLLwtQiQhYixCld61E-4KwL7cmzhcYx0H9D79O_qO2ddbzwmGF6h6qjZ-s35Ev7YtbYKP02C8jZPi4BfjC4-_akDTOSB7laN8bQ==&c=mMb5b-L3_vixaKkXT4sQsibT0iM-ZR7_dY4W7enXlKWDgR_PkY6udQ==&ch=dNYAzmIJEnIJdUphPfulXchyJi9k27CPOUvlcPpHwpmHqg6esjXa_g==) Interview, 1/29/2019)
Sherrod Brown wants to undermine American energy independence and Ohio energy jobs. ([CNN ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001zvKD_MxIjOPjj1Wfd7oI4ndfa_QbhchT8jk78jPJV_r8EHsNQFYuMh8HYXSAZQVrT7jNWc9pdZzIkH9kv1WpjZw3ysxOoXzVxATXwz0y4Bf09TAjrBGVBJhrm_emcWBRAqTpCNkd3S8CpB4ZXff4DuCo3EweMarLnK7k5eaETYhFh2dKa15OUQ==&c=mMb5b-L3_vixaKkXT4sQsibT0iM-ZR7_dY4W7enXlKWDgR_PkY6udQ==&ch=dNYAzmIJEnIJdUphPfulXchyJi9k27CPOUvlcPpHwpmHqg6esjXa_g==)[Interview](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001zvKD_MxIjOPjj1Wfd7oI4ndfa_QbhchT8jk78jPJV_r8EHsNQFYuMh8HYXSAZQVrXUpBuCQfCSn0aM2Ylkr2gtWShfQZ4Jvi4kWC9DJU1LmrEtgAT2VHZtaTGs8b9dl1-8kJNT5u0D-KGN3qy9z_G6qVckLON__-2PZ0BQdrpTu0L75y1l2IDg==&c=mMb5b-L3_vixaKkXT4sQsibT0iM-ZR7_dY4W7enXlKWDgR_PkY6udQ==&ch=dNYAzmIJEnIJdUphPfulXchyJi9k27CPOUvlcPpHwpmHqg6esjXa_g==),10/30/2020)
Brown criticized the influence of corporate PACs, rejecting the notion of accepting their money. Now he's taking millions of dollars in corporate PAC money to fund his Senate campaign. ([Daily Beast](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001zvKD_MxIjOPjj1Wfd7oI4ndfa_QbhchT8jk78jPJV_r8EHsNQFYuMh8HYXSAZQVrF5loJuWnfeWldPE6BiwVX4AbQa-Xe13nUyHkV4B534V66joc7Yh3jkc1e7achqVvAUXI5uL9i1fKJZ2ZlIzY3O0DuNtlX22guwA1CjWGAr_sU28F76zWq0uPWcLowo4EUK3hXJS4JyfCYFMwZIPwCtOETmqP24dyYYwDApbs8KUOhXa8LDW1Hw==&c=mMb5b-L3_vixaKkXT4sQsibT0iM-ZR7_dY4W7enXlKWDgR_PkY6udQ==&ch=dNYAzmIJEnIJdUphPfulXchyJi9k27CPOUvlcPpHwpmHqg6esjXa_g==), 2/6/2023)

name: Sara Jacobs
subject: Asking for $5 - and yes, this makes a difference
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Sara Jacobs for Congress
body:
Friends - I’m hoping you’ll make a donation to my re-election campaign [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sjj-em?refcode=20230216_em_sjj_representation] of whatever amount feels meaningful to you, whether that’s $5 or $50. Here’s why:
The 118th Congress is historic - more millennials (and Gen Z!) members are serving than ever before with millennials making up about 10% of all members and women making up 28%.
That’s exciting - it’s a big deal, and it represents progress in representation. But let’s get real for a second.
More than half of all Americans are now millennials or younger, and more than half of all Americans identify as women. (And women also vote at consistently higher turnout rates than men!)
So when we talk about the numbers of representation, we need to recognize that by and large, Congress remains a very male, and not-so-very-young legislative body (not to mention very white and very cisgender!).
And that matters - because the lived experiences we bring with us to the halls of the Capitol inform every vote we take and every piece of legislation we write.
I once heard a male politician (a Democrat, by the way) say that we need to stop talking about wedge issues that divide people, and instead focus on things that affect people’s everyday lives. He said we need to stop talking about issues like abortion, and instead focus on things like infrastructure and health care - as if reproductive care isn’t the main health care so many of us regularly use and need!
I’m going to keep using my time in Congress to prioritize legislation that impacts all Americans - from addressing the opioid epidemic, expanding access to mental health care, reducing gun violence, and yes, ensuring everyone’s right to make safe and legal reproductive health care choices.
But the reality of being in the House is that if I want to stay here, my re-election campaign needs to get going, like, yesterday.
I’m already working with my team to map out all our plans for making sure I can keep representing Californians and help support my fellow millennials who will be on the ballot as well. And of course, those plans require resources - so today I’m asking for your grassroots support.
It would mean the world to me if you’d consider chipping in as we get going on this re-election work. With your help, we can keep improving representation in Congress and keep fighting for legislation that helps ALL people, not just a few. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sjj-em?refcode=20230216_em_sjj_representation]
If you’ve saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately.Donate $5 👉 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sjj-em?express_lane=true&amount=5&refcode=20230216_em_sjj_representation]
Donate $20 👉 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sjj-em?express_lane=true&amount=20&refcode=20230216_em_sjj_representation]
Donate $100 👉 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sjj-em?express_lane=true&amount=100&refcode=20230216_em_sjj_representation]
Donate another amount 👉 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sjj-em?refcode=20230216_em_sjj_representation]
One more thing: These fundraising emails are going to hit your inbox every so often, because raising resources is a sometimes uncomfortable but necessary part of holding elected office. I know that not everyone can give to every email, and I totally understand. Whether or not donating works for you, I hope you’ll keep reading what I have to say, because I really value this relationship.
Thank you so much.
-Sara
Congresswoman Sara Jacobs
California’s 51st District

name: CoriBush.org
subject: re: the latest environmental injustice
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cori Bush for Congress
body:
Cori is taking action on the ground in St. Louis and in the halls of Congress to fight for environmental justice for the communities who need it most.
#
We need environmental justice now.
**This week’s train derailment in East Palestine, Ohio is an environmental and ecological crisis.** With dead fish floating atop nearby streams, family pets dying, and residents reporting an uptick in symptoms associated with exposure to toxic chemicals, the harmful impact of this event won’t be known for years to come.
Let us be clear: **We cannot go on like this.**
Cori’s doing the work on Capitol Hill and on the ground in our community to understand first-hand what we need in order to deliver environmental justice — and there _is_ a way forward.
We need investments in infrastructure like comprehensive lead pipe replacement, restoration efforts to declining habitats in wetlands and water sources, and new programs to make the efficient energy we have more affordable. We need to ensure that corporations stop prioritizing profits over our safety — _especially_ in our frontline communities and workplaces.
**Environmental justice is racial justice,** and Cori is in this fight for environmental justice for the communities who need it most. **[If you're with us, will you make a contribution and help us amplify Cori’s voice on environmental issues and help bring climate action and environmental justice to our communities?](https://act.coribush.org/go/238?c0=cori-em-20230216.wt6RFj&amount=5&refcode=em20230216-2186&t=1&akid=2186%2E1082990%2E98fsw8)**
**Especially in Black, brown, and indigenous communities, the effects of environmental injustice and racism are felt every single day.** In St. Louis, Black children are hospitalized with asthma at 10x the rate of white children, our walls are more likely to be lined with lead paint, and our neighborhoods can even be flooded with water from radioactive creeks.
**The concurrent climate crises we experience every day are of great magnitude, and that's why Cori is so dedicated to proposing bold solutions in Congress like:**
* **The Environmental Justice Mapping and Data Collection Act** to bring the fight to end environmental injustice to communities like St. Louis. The bill would create and fund a committee to develop detailed neighborhood maps of environmental risk factors including air quality, fossil fuel infrastructure, and police violence.
* **The Green New Deal for Cities** to fund an expansive array of climate and environmental justice jobs and projects including wind power procurement, clean water infrastructure, and air quality monitoring.

[**Our whole future is at stake. Will you share your strength with a contribution today? Together, we can ensure Cori's call for swift and bold action to protect our aging infrastructure, uplift environmental justice, and protect our communities from environmental racism is heard!**](https://act.coribush.org/go/238?c0=cori-em-20230216.wt6RFj&refcode=em20230216-2186&t=2&akid=2186%2E1082990%2E98fsw8)
**[Donate $5 »](https://act.coribush.org/go/238?c0=cori-em-20230216.wt6RFj&amount=5&refcode=em20230216-2186&t=21&akid=2186%2E1082990%2E98fsw8)**
In solidarity,
Team Cori

**[Contribute ››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cori-em-20230216?refcode=em20230216-2186-footer&t=22&refcode2=2186_1082990_98fsw8&akid=2186%2E1082990%2E98fsw8) **
---
Follow us on **[Facebook](https://www.facebook.com/VoteCoriBush/)** , **[Twitter](https://twitter.com/CoriBush)** , **[Instagram](https://www.instagram.com/coribush/)** , and **[visit our website](https://coribush.org/)**. This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Mail us: Cori Bush for Congress, 75 North Oaks Plaza, St. Louis, MO 63121.

name: Josh Gottheimer
subject: it’s been a second
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JOSH GOTTHEIMER FOR CONGRESS
body:
---
| | Team,

We are only two months into 2023, but it has already been made abundantly clear that the new Congress is divided.

Despite the dysfunction, I am still working tirelessly to create bipartisan solutions, and uplift Jersey Values in Congress. Getting effective work done in Congress is no easy task, but I have committed myself to ensure the needs of the people of NJ-05 are met, and real changes are made.

However, we’re about to face our **_biggest_** challenge yet. The NRCC has set up its 2024 strategy and has already raised hundreds of thousands of dollars to unseat frontline candidates like me. three things you need to know:
| **Folks, there’s three things you need to know:** 1️⃣ Ron DeSantis went after African American History – seeking to whitewash the state’s curriculum.

2️⃣ Now, he’s suggesting that Florida gets rid of Advanced Placement classes ENTIRELY – depriving students of education and opportunity for college credit.

3️⃣ And it’s obvious why he’s doing this: He’s waging “culture wars” to distract from the fact that he’s not helping Floridians – _**he’s more interested in national press coverage to bolster his future presidential run.**_ [](https://act.ronbegone.com/go/15600?t=6&akid=1688%2E564421%2EUpyDvT) | [$10,000 GOAL: HELP US STOP RON DeSANTIS IN HIS TRACKS, CHIP IN $3 BEFORE OUR MIDNIGHT DEADLINE »](https://act.ronbegone.com/go/15602?t=8&akid=1688%2E564421%2EUpyDvT)

body:

---
Hi friend,

Can we get your input on something? Our campaign is working our message for the upcoming Primary Election, but one major piece is missing: _**YOU**_. We want to know what issues keep you up at night and how we can better address the challenges that are unique to your family. There is no singular Virginia experience, friend. Each one of us holds an individual story and perspective --_and those differences matter to our campaign._ [**If you have a second, will you take a moment to answer our issues survey and provide us with any feedback?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58826609/392345572/-1223579767?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTAxOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1YmIwZTljYS0zM2FlLWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=p4A8beTB5hDH6ED-T1IClVmf3NxYCmmB5Tec2ZdE1Ak=&emci=d6968d88-1fae-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&emdi=5bb0e9ca-33ae-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&ceid=29045629) We’re eager to hear from you!
