subject: Just 2 Days of Early Voting Left!
disclaimer_text: Paid for and Authorized by Friends of Leon Benjamin, inc
body:
Have you gone to the polls yet? | | | |
---
| | | [Contribute](https://benjamin4congress.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=bf85a44dd108635a55466e64b&id=f18a3d1d67&e=3cd8121505 "Contribute")
---
|
#### We are making big waves in the 4th district
# Last Call for Early Voting!
---
|
---
|
---
|
---
|
### Early Voting is Almost Over
As many of you know, Virginia has 45 days of early voting. While I wish I could change the law, those are the rules made by the state. If you haven't already, please make sure to head to the polls before early voting is over on February 18.

Tuesday, February 21, is election day, and we need a big showing!

I am counting on Patriots like you to get me across the finish line. If you haven't voted yet, make sure to invite five friends to head to the polls with you and vote for Leon Benjamin.

We have all the momentum we need to win; it's just about getting the conservatives to the polls now.

The numbers are there, but we need to get the word out because this is a special election.

We have been posting on social media and running non-stop ads to inform voters about election day. It would be greatly appreciated if you could call up your conservative friends and let them know.

However, that's not the only way we are trying to get the word out about the vote! We are still door-knocking and making phone calls. If you can help us get out the vote for election day, please email us at info@benjamin4congress.com.

I want to thank you all for helping us get to this point, but the fight isn't over until February 21. We will turn this district Red. If we can just get the Republican vote to turn out, there is no stopping us!

We would also like to invite you again to our Get Out the Vote Rally. Kim Klacik will be our guest speaker, and we NEED our base energized to head to the polls. **Click the image for the rally to sign up, or sign up here:**** **[https://www.eventbrite.com/e/lets-go-vote-tickets-545420065097](https://benjamin4congress.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=bf85a44dd108635a55466e64b&id=8b389a1562&e=3cd8121505)

---
| [ ](https://benjamin4congress.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=bf85a44dd108635a55466e64b&id=95a861bb17&e=3cd8121505)
---
|
---
---
|
---
---
| This week we also rolled out an impressive list of endorsements.

Diante Johnson for Black Conservative Federation
Dr. Carol Swain
Congressman Rob Wittman
Carla Spalding

All endorsed our campaign this week.

Follow us on social media for the next slate of endorsements.
---
| [ ](https://benjamin4congress.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=bf85a44dd108635a55466e64b&id=f3673be6b6&e=3cd8121505)
---
| **Check your voting location by clicking the "Vote Now" button.**

All we need is for each of our supporters to bring five friends to the polls with them to vote, and we will win.

It is crunch time, and we can't do it without you!
---

name: Speaker Kevin McCarthy
subject: Omar- FIRED. Swalwell- FIRED. Schiff- FIRED.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by McCarthy for Congress
body:
I promised you that if we took back the majority, I would bring decency and justice to the people’s House. | |

| Let's set the record straight.

I fired Ilhan Omar because she was hurling anti-semitic and anti-American Remarks across social media. This is UNACCEPTABLE behavior for a member of a committee representing America on the world stage.

I fired Eric Swalwell from the intelligence committee because he became entangled with a spy for the Chinese Communist party. I do not have to explain to you why this would be a conflict of interest for someone sitting on the Intelligence Committee.

I fired Adam Schiff from the Intelligence Committee because he spread lies about Donald Trump's supposed involvement with Russia despite knowing them to be untrue at the time.

I promised you that if we took back the majority, I would bring decency and justice to the people's House.

---

Even now, Omar, Schiff, and Swalell are raising MILLIONS off their terminations. They will not stop until they return to power.

We cannot let this happen. I promise to fight with everything I have to stop this from happening, and with your support, we will succeed.

body:
MAGA Republicans are OVERJOYED

name: Maggie Hassan
subject: our (victorious!) campaign is in debt, and I need your help
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Maggie for NH |
body:
New Hampshire is known for our close elections, and ahead of the election there was no indication that 2022 would be any different.
| | |
---
Look, New Hampshire is known for our close elections, and ahead of last year’s midterms, there was no indication that 2022 would be any different.

Polls tightened significantly in the final days, and political experts doubted whether we could win. The good news is that our campaign was victorious. The bad news is that, in order to win, we took on a bit of debt.

We’ve made progress retiring that debt, but we’ve still got a ways to go. **I’d really like to erase this deficit.**

You’re one of my most important supporters, so I am coming to you with this important ask: **[Please chip in $3 or as much as you can so that our (victorious!) campaign can eliminate our debt once and for all and I can continue to focus on serving Granite Staters in the Senate.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58827169/392349200/-947982778?amounts=3,10,25,50,100&refcode=mh-jtk2204-fr-nd&recurring=0&amount=3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkOTdlNGU3Yi0zNGFlLWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=AdrAcg2ndPg5MDkHBdmMGWMLFfyrAULop3UkYXKWoS0=) **

I’m proud of the work that this team put in to hold on to New Hampshire’s Senate seat. We were scrappy, we didn’t take anything for granted, and we connected with voters in every corner of the state.

I hate sending emails like this one, but the reality is that we left it all on the field. Fortunately it paid off – now we just have to wrap up this one final piece.

If you can, please chip in $3 right now to help eliminate this debt: **[https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/hassan_email_mw](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58827175/392349214/-947982778?amounts=3,10,25,50,100&refcode=mh-jtk2204-fr-nd&recurring=0&amount=3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkOTdlNGU3Yi0zNGFlLWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=AdrAcg2ndPg5MDkHBdmMGWMLFfyrAULop3UkYXKWoS0=)**

Maggie Hassan

name: Gisele Barreto Fetterman
subject: An update on John
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
# [](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/388?refcode=em20230216-8248-header&t=1&akid=8248%2E434096%2EFZiUnB)
Friends,
Some of you may have already heard the news, and some of you may be hearing now for the first time.
Either way, I want you to hear it from me: Last night, John checked himself into Walter Reed Medical Center to seek care for clinical depression.
After what he’s been through in the past year, there’s probably no one on earth who wants to talk about his health less than John. And it’s not easy for _anyone_ to be open about mental health challenges. But I am so proud of him for asking for help and taking steps to get the care he needs.
Anyone who has experienced depression — or loved someone experiencing depression — knows that this is a heartbreaking disease. Our family is in for some difficult days ahead, and we ask for your compassion on the path to recovery. For us, the kids will always come first.
I’m never one to cover up my emotions, and today is no exception. I’m sad, and worried, as any wife and mother would be.
But at the end of the day, I know John is strong. He’s tough and he’s human. He is still the fun, loving, caring, compassionate man I fell in love with so many years ago. My grandmother Bibi used to say João had to be made so tall because it was the only way to fit his whole heart ❤️. It’s true — and he’s going to get the care he needs to continue sharing his heart with the world.
Please be kind to each other and to yourselves. For anyone out there who might be struggling right now: I promise, it does get better. Hold your loved ones close; you are not alone.
Love,
Gisele
_If you or someone you know is in crisis, reach out for help at one of the following resources:_
Call 911: If someone is in immediate danger, call 911.
Call 988: Get connected to the National Suicide Prevention Lifeline by dialing 988.
Crisis Text Line: Get 24/7 help from the [Crisis Text Line](http://act.johnfetterman.com/go/49678?t=2&akid=8248%2E434096%2EFZiUnB). Text PA to 741741 to start the conversation.
PA Crisis Hotlines: Find a crisis line in [your county](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/49679?t=3&akid=8248%2E434096%2EFZiUnB).

[](https://www.facebook.com/JohnFettermanPA/) | [](https://twitter.com/johnfetterman) | [](https://www.instagram.com/johnfetterman/)
---|---|---
Email us: info@johnfetterman.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Fetterman for PA, PO Box 6061, Pittsburgh PA 15211.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.johnfetterman.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.johnfetterman.com/sign/personal_info/?t=4&akid=8248%2E434096%2EFZiUnB)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.johnfetterman.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=5&akid=8248%2E434096%2EFZiUnB)

Paid for by Fetterman for PA.

name: Senator Katie Britt
subject: The American Dream:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Britt for Alabama, Inc
body:
Is Biden killing it? | | |
---
[](http://links.katiebrittforsenate.com/u/click?_t=64058844820c43dab0e6ed55204bc487&_m=913d572d0be04477a38ca36adb84c878&_e=R4YLp79loIZzat829F5DnZeVLVJ9xdzpNnwBFF70v7ohjyl6x7ue1hpKCLOzU2nt6ftabHsE8oersJU5rsuUHoe3QMwLsiaUfaU0BkLUc6-lZOQV0uRzCZeGbWx1t5fCyPlcqEdYmqW2ozYuUVYoeB0n2UCib0OJY3TYYiCZSujakBspMLNIl2Wy57MyN2posogSUwAnGE0RiUZIlA46YoojQIlA54UsfhVy5Rv7rUkKb3rlQ2jz5-AL6ylKTDpIvcbiraos2Nu6qx4tz2y-mI-VY9LkrJqE7apV9DNktqor97yaXahclguxcaxldr8cKpOCLUYwBcgg_pKYQ1YxLml37By8du3w6JI6KbMBLC7KXdVXzfhDBBTUFhdCFEKeKyNaFNWP_OCgLl_ow9j6c-J16HWi4zrTq2NvP4pGSp1z6GW7XXqww18bKVx5nf0k)
---
Peter, Last week, President Biden told the world that under his administration, our Country is in a better place. She worked hard, earned her law degree, and was offered a seat on the court. Only then, her family's disapproval stopped her from taking it.

Because of her belief in the American Dream, Raj and her husband, Ajit, immigrated to America and settled in Bamberg, South Carolina where they had and raised their children to have faith in God and love their country.

**They would never have guessed everything their daughter, Nikki Haley, would do with the risk they took to achieve the American Dream.**

At age 12, Nikki started working in her mother's dress shop and learned the hard work behind every dollar earned.

When she learned it was too easy for the government to take and spend that dollar without accountability, she ran for the South Carolina state legislature.

She stood up to corrupt Republicans and insiders in her state that wanted to spend taxpayer dollars on their pet projects without any accountability. She championed a law forcing them to be on the record for every single spending bill. They tried to punish her by taking her spot in Republican leadership for it.

But she kept fighting. She never lost a race. And went on to serve two terms as South Carolina's governor until Trump called on her to stand for America as the U.S. Ambassador to the United Nations.

Nikki's story is an American story. In just one generation, she pulled herself up through hard work and determination.

She didn't blame America when the going got tough. She knows it's America's unique promise of freedom and opportunity that made her story possible in the first place.

_**Now, she 's running for president to protect the American Dream and stop the Left from erasing our country's fundamental values with their woke, socialist agenda.**_

body:
[ stdin# ][IMG]

Peter Willis,

The train derailment in Ohio, where toxic
chemicals are spewing into the air and water, was preventable and is the
latest example of the horrific pain caused by corporate greed and
corporate control of our media and political system.

Norfolk-Southern, the company responsible for the spill, has silenced
whistleblowers, refused to take basic safety measures, slashed staffing to
a bare minimum, denied their workers the dignity of sick days, and even
authorized a $10 billion stock buyback giveaway to shareholders while
neglecting to do desperately needed maintenance.

Of course, it's not the billionaire shareholders, but working families
facing the horrific consequences of their failure — and Norfolk Southern
can count on a complicit corporate media primarily owned by the same banks
to shield them from meaningful consequences.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8331?source=EM_NBI_OR_20230216_FR_CorporateCapture_0_3MO_OurRevolution_NA_NA_CorporateCapture&t=1008&akid=4026%2E5885482%2ET8QJMQ ]That's why Our Revolution is standing up to corporate greed, standing
with workers, and supporting progressive candidates who aren’t owned by
big money. Pitch in here to help us hold bad corporate actors accountable!

If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation to
Our Revolution will process immediately.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8332?refcode=EM_NBI_OR_20230216_FR_CorporateCapture_0_3MO_OurRevolution_NA_NA_CorporateCapture&t=1009&akid=4026%2E5885482%2ET8QJMQ ]CHIP IN $10 NOW » [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8333?refcode=EM_NBI_OR_20230216_FR_CorporateCapture_0_3MO_OurRevolution_NA_NA_CorporateCapture&t=1010&akid=4026%2E5885482%2ET8QJMQ ]CHIP IN $18 NOW »

This train derailment is a symptom of a larger problem tearing our country
apart.

Amazon and Starbucks continue to violate labor laws with despicable
union-busting tactics, and big pharma causes thousands of deaths each year
through price-gouging.

The wealth and political inequality has gotten so bad that Republicans,
the party that calls itself "pro-life" and "pro-children," have introduced
a plan to bring back child labor in dangerous industries.

We need our Representatives and Government officials in DC to be a bulwark
against corporate greed. If they aren't up to the job, we WILL replace

clean_body: The next three months will fly by. Let’s make the most of them for our democracy. = | Today makes it official, fellow activist — there are only three months left until Pennsylvania’s 2023 municipal/judicial/local primary elections. That might seem like a lot of time, but it’s going to fly by. Civically engaging, registering, and mobilizing Pennsylvania’s voters takes a lot of time, energy, and money. All of these efforts are essential to expanding our electorate and ensuring Pennsylvania has a more reflective democracy. = = The primary election is just around the corner, and before we know it, we will be heading into the election in November! Our organization continues to be one of the only organizations on the ground year-round, consistently conducting voter registration in the communities we center. The time to protect our democracy is now. Not only are our local, municipal and judicial elections crucial for our democracy; engaging voters now also sets us up for success in the future. Every voter we mobilize this election helps to create super voters who will make their voices heard in every single election. The more voters we mobilize in our communities, the more candidates will realize they need to pay attention to the needs of our communities. And the more candidates pay attention to the needs of our communities, the easier it becomes to civically engage them in the first place. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately. = = = = In solidarity, Kadida Kenner Chief Executive Officer The New Pennsylvania Project = | The New Pennsylvania Project was founded in May 2021 to expand Pennsylvania’s electorate, so it reflects the Commonwealth’s demographically changing population. In the next four years, NPP will engage and empower young residents and those living in underrepresented immigrant communities and communities of color. We register communities to vote, provide civic education about the issues that matter in their neighborhoods, and mobilize Pennsylvanians to vote in every election. = PA ELECTION DATES : Municipal Primary: May 16, 2023 Last day to =: May 1, 2023 Last day to =: May 9, 2023 Municipal Election: November 7, 2023 Last day to =: October 23, 2023 Last day to =: October 31, 2023 || || || New Pennsylvania Project PO Box 443 West Chester, PA 19381 United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please. to receive fewer emails from us. to stop receiving any fundraising emails from us. name: Replace Sinema
subject: Sign our petition: tell Sinema to confirm Biden’sFCC nominee
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Change for Arizona 2024 PAC
body:
| |
---
Peter – Last year, Kyrsten Sinema blocked one of President Biden’s nominees on behalf of big monied interests. That time, it was because Uber and big restaurant franchises didn’t want someone who would stand up for gig workers. Now, it looks like Sinema might once again do corporations’ bidding to block another nominee. This time, it’s Comcast and other big telecoms who want to stop President Biden’s nomination of Gigi Sohn to the Federal Communications Commission – because Ms. Sohn will look out for consumers, not for telecoms’ bottom line. Sinema, of course, has not yet announced her vote on the nomination – but she reportedly helped block Sohn from being confirmed previously. [](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zJ5XI6YHChR2bS-m44B_fcoP8caCwJUBLaPXs3nZCAKZC5Ch04_JFgwGG8jfH5-KwSEwN-IjldzjbQ1gsvCPr6cDP6qczra8ioxbg6Y2J5lT3CUPFydiLlZnOGBC3vKRihaNoSr2LK7_KB4wUjWzV4CbIgl9Lf74Z7Z6JoaOB9FWAsONFjDeHArz2nau0O3qdhWNAcIWgEKzqgOZ5TnF7ZphSf1V0Rol9HvsEsCLFBGD3OZ-O96weukMDD8-HjZU5cX332yz0tFve6OVvGmqy8rSC7j3SaS7uOqY2r4lYEu0gGLlBlG9w6a5BIFDxaM_Mc51ttvCe-8me6CbhBIjGw/3tr/iFOZmoTeQEe9jmwo4Dt8oQ/h0/V4-y5pU8126pcx1tN0ChIZQCkRj69X7rh7_VgSs5oOE) Comcast is trying to torpedo the nomination, and just hired one of Sinema’s former colleagues (her friend!) to be their lobbyist in charge of talking to Senators about the FCC nomination! On top of that, a Comcast lobbyist also ran a dark money group – one that’s opposed to several Democratic tax and prescription drug policies – that has run ads on behalf of Kyrsten Sinema. Since 2017, Kyrsten **Sinema has raked in over $150,000 from telecom companies** like Comcast and Verizon. At the end of the day, it’s the same story every time. She’s always going to put her corporate donors ahead of her constituents. **Sinema has proven time and again she sold out.[Will you add your name to our petition to tell Senator Sinema to confirm President Biden’s nominee?](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnkd9OMAk9omA_9FkVRYGSEhL-yFwM0YbZZZ1JynV6CWm4FTfjh-Bw0mF3qY-yNPPDfxblHJk_Jy9lXhul32iUVEfjL7jDLUB7CVXMZqdpZeW2hSswCANAS2iBuHvYtmGtd2wSvMlYAQaU9nJe10QDbgY4ZZoKuBqKDHQKNAReP4-WMz3JNhciqswC9OWTVXngYPP_U0cJOdbd32LMlrVCA7fRll-Qm-oS4kWdSGhERWrrStN44FaOZnLNzxY-VODUkmFO3TkYFB6LhzZt57O7fEjF_tEi0vbEzhRdGfbHxVnRfD64Rgv3vCeEdtcjHTXUA/3tr/iFOZmoTeQEe9jmwo4Dt8oQ/h1/DUyBVkpoMPAbmWovCFZF5rYFAJQcbLW1EPy6sR-LPpw) >> ** [ADD YOUR NAME](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnkd9OMAk9omA_9FkVRYGSEhL-yFwM0YbZZZ1JynV6CWm4FTfjh-Bw0mF3qY-yNPPDfxblHJk_Jy9lXhul32iUVEfjL7jDLUB7CVXMZqdpZeW848ogRNNizYU1qtHcCbdDaEGRdTH4SJo1lRGJH5nZ8O2U5tINiF3zYbpih5cVO6L51VsOGio_B_F25aaoIkwpAEbwCMgBPUchb9juOqB5qTGzXvbiZ4JvJck-GAm1QT3lFCjhX4NHsfLWRc_XpI8Mlkm2nG9Kw15cVktKtj42mm_DmNbnzE13L9VcgNtaL3OH0Y9d-Z6hKQu2k8AseQA4w/3tr/iFOZmoTeQEe9jmwo4Dt8oQ/h2/JD6jygUF4At18o4FvEZOYLM0uFfnWV2GqhC1gdzJTnw) Gigi Sohn will make an excellent FCC Commissioner. But she needs to be confirmed first. And we aren’t going to let Kyrsten Sinema block her without a fight. Thanks for everything you do, -the team at Replace Sinema and Change for Arizona 2024 PAC

Peter – Here are the three things you need to know about the state of our race.
1. **Emilia and this grassroots team defied the odds in 2022.** Thanks to the generosity of people like you, our campaign fought back against millions of dollars worth of GOP attacks and sent Emilia to Congress. But we know it’s going to require the full strength of this grassroots team to do it again.

2. Leading non-partisan election forecasters just released their first round of 2024 race ratings, they deemed _**OH-13 as a PURE TOSS UP.**_

3. With **Republicans laser focused on flipping this toss up seat from blue to red**, we know we can’t afford a single misstep from now until Election Day.

But right now, we have **fallen behind with our February fundraising** – and if we don’t make up the difference soon, we could be giving the MAGA Republicans the upper hand heading into 2024.

[**To get back on track, our team set a must-hit goal of raising $3,000 before midnight tomorrow. name: 2A Task Force
subject: The fight isn’t over. The fight has only just begun.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by 2nd Amendment Task Force [2ataskforce
body:
| |
---
|
---
| | Friend, **The fight isn’t over. The fight has only just begun. ** As we welcome the Republican controlled house, we undertake an era of divided government. The Democratic rule is officially over, and house Republicans have promised to hold the out-of-touch Democrats accountable by launching major investigations. YET, this won’t stop the Democratic-controlled Senate from taking advantage of their majority and passing restrictive gun bills that harm law-abiding gun owners like **YOU** – as they continue to do nothing to prevent the rising crime rates facing our major cities.

name: Protect Innocent Warriors
subject: URGENT: an American Hero needs YOU
disclaimer_text: Paid for by United American Patriots |
body:
Help us fight for this patriot who sacrificed so much for our nation.

| | | [](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=a7ae51315bba4cdd8f9bf00d3f10e773&_e=RhzopcwO3Q-GBx4TQBX858aIgpO0uFB9VGLFFSGTKuw5WNFZn-LQGQvAH84u7Jon9WuCQzIc5POlfhlLmpn-GKWgDfsQ7OYfvR-S7_ASKW_F-xsFXVyPH1IHNpzjfQ3assMR0NUw7u1nIgc_7nYq2X55Vn1NnnbO8WQSjfIbMRZEdtCQN2ScA5lwvsopLEPPgi0xHUK4990Odl-gbBkiZAoWGFNCeiyazF2kIFBzvxeyEtGTdW362URLaTEKViNxFVjD8YJRSdc_P4cWz0HH7AgzQfIIZ_fRA6SbyTCHWGMM300r6jjSuglaCj9Y1IPX1UyhkgpK6uQ0rV9AGCKew2pTGG0qPo8fDJ7svMwWwCFy1_046BPIvn-06pMP90BW)
---
Friend, America's Warriors write a blank check for our freedoms. They're willing to go to war and face unimaginable odds to defend freedom and liberty. And how do we repay these Heroes? _By charging them, like the three below, with bogus crimes they didn 't commit. _
---
[](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=a7ae51315bba4cdd8f9bf00d3f10e773&_e=RhzopcwO3Q-GBx4TQBX858aIgpO0uFB9VGLFFSGTKuw5WNFZn-LQGQvAH84u7Jon9WuCQzIc5POlfhlLmpn-GKWgDfsQ7OYfvR-S7_ASKW_F-xsFXVyPH1IHNpzjfQ3assMR0NUw7u1nIgc_7nYq2X55Vn1NnnbO8WQSjfIbMRZEdtCQN2ScA5lwvsopLEPPgi0xHUK4990Odl-gbBkiZAoWGFNCeiyazF2kIFBzvxfCCX_quyT8svHfWJpLCblxCEh6DRVlXllad8akOPSfi8TRd0JqYJdukcpKDE6lQCg-K2CedjajPDf24q33MPTuxwGSE8VmPKZ0Ogb34WiMx6jLtpx_PIpgE_edxbFjiLkliZZVq4efiMcs-UrU5Ru-)
---
Here's what happened to the **MARSOC 3 Raiders** ... On New Year's Eve in 2018, Chief Petty Officer Eric Gilmet and Gunnery Sergeants Danny Draher and Josh Negron were assaulted while trying to take a much-needed break on deployment at a local bar in Erbil, Iraq. All was well until Gilmet, Draher, and Negron decided to go home for the evening and a contractor outside the bar confronted them. Despite trying to avoid a confrontation with him, the contractor struck one of the Warriors twice in the face and was in the process of throwing a third punch. In defense of his Marine brother, one of the men struck the contractor - just once - and sent him to the ground. The Marines stayed with the man for _hours_ , even bringing him back to base for medical care throughout the night after his "friends" abandoned him. clean_body: Help us fight for this patriot who sacrificed so much for our nation. | | | Friend, America's Warriors write a blank check for our freedoms. They're willing to go to war and face unimaginable odds to defend freedom and liberty. And how do we repay these Heroes? By charging them, like the three below, with bogus crimes they didn 't commit. - Here's what happened to the MARSOC 3 Raiders ... On New Year's Eve in 2018, Chief Petty Officer Eric Gilmet and Gunnery Sergeants Danny Draher and Josh Negron were assaulted while trying to take a much-needed break on deployment at a local bar in Erbil, Iraq. All was well until Gilmet, Draher, and Negron decided to go home for the evening and a contractor outside the bar confronted them. Despite trying to avoid a confrontation with him, the contractor struck one of the Warriors twice in the face and was in the process of throwing a third punch. In defense of his Marine brother, one of the men struck the contractor - just once - and sent him to the ground. The Marines stayed with the man for hours , even bringing him back to base for medical care throughout the night after his "friends" abandoned him. The contractor tragically passed due to complications from his intoxicated state. Soon after the man's death, the MARSOC 3 were charged with manslaughter, sending a tragic blow to their livelihoods and families. What followed was one of the most unjust trials our military justice system has ever seen. Friend, the MARSOC 3 faced 25 years in prison for crimes they didn 't commit. They fought against bias, unlawful command influence, and intense intimidation tactics. With the help of United American Patriots, we were able to help secure justice for two of the Raiders! GySgt Draher and GySgt Negron were recently found NOT GUILTY by a jury for negligent homicide and involuntary manslaughter. But our work is far from over. Eric Gilmet is still facing 25 years in prison. This is where you come in, Friend. We're asking Americans like you to step up and contribute to UAP 's Warrior Fund to clear Chief Petty Officer Eric Gilmet's name. Your contribution helps us support our Hero's legal fees and expenses, investigators, and media experts. If you can, Friend, please chip in and help us clear Eric Gilmet 's name. Thank you in advance for your support. Semper Fi' David "Bull" Gurfein LtCol., USMCR (Ret.) CEO, United American Patriots | | | | | ---|--- UAP, Inc. is a 501(c)(3) non-profit organization. Donations are tax deductible. Peter,

We can't afford to mess around. Kevin McCarthy is raking it in as Speaker of the House, and I'm certain he'll be doing everything in his power to expand the GOP's majority in 2024.

McCarthy knows the key to holding the House majority is by investing early in districts across the country to make sure his candidates are positioned to win their elections – and that includes the Central Valley. As one of the most winnable districts in our entire nation, we can't afford to lose. **That's why it's so important we start this campaign off strong, too.**

**[Peter, ensure the success of this grassroots campaign by donating $5 – or anything you can. name: Giffords
subject: We need you in the fight to help pass universal background checks legislation
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
This is commonsense legislation that will save lives
#

Friends -
Today, the Background Check Expansion Act was introduced in the U.S. Senate.
Sponsored by Senator Chris Murphy, this legislation would require a background check for all gun sales and transfers, with reasonable exceptions for self-defense, law enforcement, hunting or target shooting, and exchanges between family members.
Since our founding ten years ago, one of our top priorities at Giffords has been working towards a future with universal background checks. Requiring a background check before the sale of a gun is the most effective way to ensure that people who are prohibited from possessing guns cannot acquire them.
In the past decade, 29 states have passed 71 significant background check laws. While this is great progress, it’s long past time to make universal background checks law at the federal level.
But with a narrowly divided Senate and a Republican majority in the House of Representatives, this won’t be easy. That’s why we’re counting on you.
[**Will you make a contribution to Giffords PAC if you support passing the Background Check Expansion Act? This is commonsense legislation that will save lives.**](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-feb23.wLJBGg&refcode=em230216-1-15&t=1&akid=4274%2E3935704%2EGmHfdi)

name: Tammy Baldwin
subject: My pre-existing condition
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Democratic Party of Georgia
body:
|
---

[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58831806/392368474/227139380?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTA4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmZjNkY2MwNS00OWFlLWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=e6iIPQ7cpzjxeZBT9xNdfiL36LWVr3vXBwv233kATXA=&emci=bcc54a48-07ae-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&emdi=ff3dcc05-49ae-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&ceid=43566853)

| | Hi Peter — Senator Tammy Baldwin here! If you have a minute or two today, I wanted to take a moment to tell you a little more about myself, why I ran for U.S. Senate, and why our campaign in Wisconsin is so important.

When I was a child, I was diagnosed with a serious illness and spent three months in the hospital. When I got better, my grandparents who raised me began to look for an insurance policy that would cover me in the future.

However, because of my previous illness, they couldn’t find such a policy. Not from any insurer. Not at any price. They had to pay for my health care out of pocket — and they had to make enormous sacrifices to do so — all because I was a child who had been labeled with those words: **“pre-existing condition.”**

Peter, I got into public service because I saw my grandparents stay up late at night, worried sick that I would fall ill again and they wouldn't be able to afford my care. No one should ever have to go through that.

**Like 133 million Americans, I know what it's like to have the label "pre-existing condition" attached to my care — and before the _Affordable Care Act_ was passed, many of us could be denied coverage.**

Today, insurance companies can no longer discriminate against someone based on their pre-existing condition. I championed that health reform and fought to allow young people to stay on their parent’s insurance plans up to age 26. These policy changes have led to millions more Americans getting the health insurance they need.

So, you can imagine my frustration whenever Republicans launch a new attack on our health care or threaten protections for folks with pre-existing conditions. They’ve spent years playing politics with people’s lives. **And if Mitch McConnell and his Republican mega-donors take hold of the Senate majority next election, and if the GOP flips the White House, countless Americans could find themselves in a place where insurance companies, once again, write all the rules.**

I’ll never back down, Peter, but we’ve got a tough fight ahead of us to protect this seat and hold Wisconsin and Georgia, so we need your support every step of the way.

[**_Will you split a donation today between my campaign in Wisconsin and the Democratic Party of Georgia? I’ll never stop fighting to ensure every American has access to quality, affordable health care — regardless of whether or not they have a pre-existing condition — and it’d mean a lot to me to have your support in that fight._**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58831807/392368475/2063583167?refcode=20230216.2_TB_2AG&amount=15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTA4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmZjNkY2MwNS00OWFlLWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=e6iIPQ7cpzjxeZBT9xNdfiL36LWVr3vXBwv233kATXA=) | _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_

[Donate another amount >>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58831813/392368481/2063583167?refcode=20230216.2_TB_2AG&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTA4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmZjNkY2MwNS00OWFlLWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=e6iIPQ7cpzjxeZBT9xNdfiL36LWVr3vXBwv233kATXA=)
I am not going to let anyone make me forget where I came from or why I got into public service in the first place. My own personal experience has always inspired my work to do everything I can to make sure that every American has quality, affordable health care coverage, and stand up against those who want to take it away.

Thank you for reading, and thanks for your support today.

— Tammy

name: Tammy Baldwin
subject: I’ll be honest
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TAMMY BALDWIN FOR SENATE
body:
|
#
I’ll be honest, Peter: **In a moment, I'm going to ask you to contribute to help us reach our mid-quarter fundraising goal.** But first, I want to take a moment to explain why your support is so important, especially today. Although next year’s elections might seem far away, election forecasters are all signaling that 2024 is going to be incredibly challenging for Democrats. We’re defending 23 Senate seats, including some in very competitive states (like Wisconsin!). Not only that, Peter, but Republicans only need to flip _two_ seats to regain control of the majority. So much of what we’ve accomplished over the past two years could be at risk if Mitch McConnell and Senate Republicans take control. Just recently, some Republican senators threatened to make cuts to Social Security — and we don’t want to think about all the other things they’ll do when they’re in power. To prepare for the tough election ahead, my team set an ambitious mid-quarter fundraising goal, and it’s really important to me that we hit our target. Early investments now will prepare us for what will end up being an incredibly expensive campaign down the road. But to tell you the truth, fundraising has been particularly slow this month and right now, we’re tracking behind on hitting our target. So, I’m personally reaching out to ask for your support: **[Will you pitch a contribution of any amount to help us hit our goal before our mid-quarter deadline expires tomorrow night?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58831820/392368490/-1998320847?refcode=AU_STB_FR_GEN_MMG_AC_20230216_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83Njk1MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzOWZmMjAyMi00OWFlLWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=q1u1IcuoGc8YVYXKV6iNPIJZjgFPvaH4_nc0i0dwXRY=) ** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | | [Chip in $5 now ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58831821/392368491/321909845?amount=5&express_lane=true&refcode=AU_STB_FR_GEN_MMG_AC_20230216_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83Njk1MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzOWZmMjAyMi00OWFlLWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=q1u1IcuoGc8YVYXKV6iNPIJZjgFPvaH4_nc0i0dwXRY=)

clean_body: | I’ll be honest, Peter: In a moment, I'm going to ask you to contribute to help us reach our mid-quarter fundraising goal. But first, I want to take a moment to explain why your support is so important, especially today. Although next year’s elections might seem far away, election forecasters are all signaling that 2024 is going to be incredibly challenging for Democrats. We’re defending 23 Senate seats, including some in very competitive states (like Wisconsin!). Not only that, Peter, but Republicans only need to flip two seats to regain control of the majority. So much of what we’ve accomplished over the past two years could be at risk if Mitch McConnell and Senate Republicans take control. Just recently, some Republican senators threatened to make cuts to Social Security — and we don’t want to think about all the other things they’ll do when they’re in power. To prepare for the tough election ahead, my team set an ambitious mid-quarter fundraising goal, and it’s really important to me that we hit our target. Early investments now will prepare us for what will end up being an incredibly expensive campaign down the road. But to tell you the truth, fundraising has been particularly slow this month and right now, we’re tracking behind on hitting our target. So, I’m personally reaching out to ask for your support: = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | = | = | | = | = | | = | = Thank you for your support, — Tammy PAID FOR BY TAMMY BALDWIN FOR SENATE Tammy Baldwin for Senate P.O. name: Luke Thomas, Digital Director
subject: He’s checked every box
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE INDIANA REPUBLICAN STATE COMMITTEE
body:
Credit where credit is due. Read more >>
| | | [](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/f7f15e9875c39250df60ac364a9f256a/40313/d7acfceb5e8916e1/d4eb1a005efdd7b1c3d6b838967d376c/40313)
---
Hoosier Republican, Joe Biden loves to brag about “getting things done” for the American people. What exactly has he done? Here are just a few things. 👎 He turned the **Afghanistan withdrawal** into an embarrassing disaster. 👎He implemented executive actions that weakened our southern border and led to more than **4 million illegal border crossings**. 👎 He declared war on American energy producers and workers, promising to shut them down and eliminate tens of thousands of jobs. 👎 He’s taken a weak stance on **Communist China**. 👎 He **signed the** American Rescue Plan that sent inflation **skyrocketing** and doubled down on his big government spending with the so-called Inflation Reduction Act.
---
[](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/f7f15e9875c39250df60ac364a9f256a/40313/d7acfceb5e8916e1/b1d61100f3be1700c3d6b838967d376c/40313)
---
Biden has checked one box too many and we need your help to prevent him from checking any more. [**Please rush back a small donation to help us hit our mid-month fundraising goal of $2,000 before tonight’s midnight deadline as we prepare for the fight ahead in 2024!**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/f7f15e9875c39250df60ac364a9f256a/40313/d7acfceb5e8916e1/3f166eeec6843735c3d6b838967d376c/40313)

name: Jayapal HQ
subject: We extended our mid-month deadline >>
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pramila for Congress
body:
#
Peter,
Earlier this week, Pramila reached out to you about our mid-month deadline -- the goal we set that will ensure we stay on track for this month AND set ourselves up for success for the rest of the cycle.
**Here’s the news: we didn’t reach our goal.** But we did decide to extend it by a few days, to give our base of grassroots supporters -- that’s you! -- time to step up and help us reach this goal. If we get just 50 more donors to chip in, we’ll reach our target in no time. **We’re asking for your support before midnight tomorrow.**
[**Your donations are crucial for Pramila right now, and won’t go unnoticed. We’re counting on you to be one of our final 50 donors to help us close the gap and reach our goal. Will you chip in, Peter?**](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/35768?refcode=em20230216-2178&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=2178%2E420207%2EjpR4ej)**
**[Contribute $3](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/35768?refcode=em20230216-2178&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=2178%2E420207%2EjpR4ej)**
_\---------- Forwarded message ---------
From: **Pramila Jayapal** [info@pramilaforcongress.com]
Date: Monday, Feb 13, 2023
Subject: Falling short
To: Peter [dpwillis67@gmail.com]_
Peter,
With February being the shortest month of the year, we don't have a lot of time left to reach our end of month projections — and my team has told me that we're $6k behind our mid-month fundraising goal.
In staying true to upholding the progressive values that unite our grassroots movement, **_I have never accepted a dime in corporate money.**_ Our movement's work is wholly fueled by the generosity of our grassroots supporters. [**So today I'm asking: can you be one of the 200 supporters we need to fuel our people-powered movement before tomorrow?**](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/35768?refcode=em20230216-2178&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=3&akid=2178%2E420207%2EjpR4ej)**
**[Pitch in $3](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/35768?refcode=em20230216-2178&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=22&akid=2178%2E420207%2EjpR4ej)**
Our movement is invested in improving the lives of working class people across the country. We know what is possible when we're able to effectively organize and mobilize around the issues that impact our communities the most. Every donation is **_key**_ in our efforts to build a new political consensus that is working toward the bold solutions we need to solve these issues.
Our movement has come a long way, and we will not allow the hard-fought progress we've made to be reversed by the **_narrow**_ Republican majority in the House.
[**And that's why we're asking: can you chip in to our progressive movement today to keep us fighting for progress?**](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/35768?refcode=em20230216-2178&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=23&akid=2178%2E420207%2EjpR4ej)
**[Chip in $3](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/35768?refcode=em20230216-2178&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=24&akid=2178%2E420207%2EjpR4ej)**
In solidarity,
Pramila

**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-footer?refcode=em20230216-2178-footer&t=25&refcode2=2178_420207_jpR4ej&akid=2178%2E420207%2EjpR4ej)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/pramila.jayapal) | [](https://twitter.com/pramilajayapal) | [](https://www.instagram.com/pramilajayapal/)
Email us: info@pramilaforcongress.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, and small-dollar contributions sustain our movement for transformative change. To contribute by check, please address to Pramila for Congress, PO Box 21912, Seattle, WA 98111.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/did-your-info-change/?t=26&akid=2178%2E420207%2EjpR4ej)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=27&akid=2178%2E420207%2EjpR4ej)

Paid for by Pramila for Congress

name: Fiorella Bini, Team AOC
subject: We'd love to hear what inspired you to support our campaign
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress
body:
As someone who has helped grow our movement, we’d love to hear what inspired you to join our campaign.
# [](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/143?refcode=em20230216-3902-header&t=1&akid=3902%2E2526796%2ExLCn1-)
My name is Fiorella, and I’m the Political Organizing Director for Team AOC. On behalf of our entire team, we want to extend our deep gratitude to you for being a dedicated supporter of our movement.
Your support since you joined this movement in 2021— whether that’s volunteering, amplifying our messages on social media, or voicing your support for our legislative priorities — has helped strengthen our movement, and we’ve accomplished so much with your help.
Thank you, thank you, _thank you_ for being here.
[We’d love to hear what inspired you to join our campaign. Can you please fill out this quick survey to share the reasons why you support Alexandria and our movement?](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/survey/23-feb-supporter-survey/?source=em20230216-3902-P_ENG_SUR_GFM&t=2&akid=3902%2E2526796%2ExLCn1-)
**[Start Your Supporter Survey](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/survey/23-feb-supporter-survey/?source=em20230216-3902-P_ENG_SUR_GFM&t=3&akid=3902%2E2526796%2ExLCn1-)**
Together our movement is fighting for a livable climate, health care for all, making the rich pay their fair share, dignity for working people, and so much more — and we couldn’t do this without you.
We’re grateful to have you in this fight,
Fiorella Bini
Political Organizing Director
Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress

name: Vic Barreras Torres
subject: Hey there – I’d like to introduce myself
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the National Democratic Redistricting Committee, Kelly Burton, President
body:
As the NDRC’s new senior mobilization strategist, I’m excited to join a leading organization in the fight for a more true and representative democracy.
|
---

Hey there, team – I’m Vic, the NDRC’s new senior mobilization strategist! I’d like to take a moment to introduce myself.

**I’m pumped to be working with a leading organization in the fight for a more true and representative democracy. In my role, I’m helping to power the NDRC’s ongoing work by cultivating one of our most valuable resources: This grassroots team!

[_Grassroots supporters like you are the lifeblood of the NDRC’s fight to end gerrymandering, defend every American's right to vote, and safeguard our democracy for generations to come. If you’re able, will you pitch in today to help us continue our critical work?_](https://click.everyaction.com/k/58832607/392371440/-1795600110?amount=30&refcode=EM_RTI_20230216_FR_2G_redlight922_527&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjAwZmEzNmExLTRkYWUtZWQxMS05OTRkLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=2bf5wbLNawvC2t1dPSV2YJ0roX_AsxY_P1fF3z_2IeA=)** | [Donate to the NDRC](https://click.everyaction.com/k/58832609/392371442/-1795600110?amount=30&refcode=EM_RTI_20230216_FR_2G_redlight922_527&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjAwZmEzNmExLTRkYWUtZWQxMS05OTRkLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=2bf5wbLNawvC2t1dPSV2YJ0roX_AsxY_P1fF3z_2IeA=)
---
Since the NDRC’s founding, people like you have helped us achieve some incredible victories.

For instance, last year’s elections took place on what _The New York Times_ called “the fairest House map of the last 40 years.” That accomplishment was only possible thanks to years of organizing, mobilizing communities, and advocating for fair redistricting reforms.

**Still, our work is far from over. As Attorney General Eric Holder said, “Fighting for fair maps helped save our democracy. But this is not a one and done effort.”**

He’s right. According to our research, about a **quarter of maps across the country are still unfairly drawn.** And Republican lawmakers in swing states, like my home state of Ohio, are actively working to implement new voting restrictions ahead of 2024. There’s a lot of work to do – and I’m excited to take it on.

**But I also know the NDRC never would have made it this far without grassroots supporters like you, and now we need you by our side during this next phase of our work.[_I hope you’ll consider making a quick contribution today to help us continue fighting for free and fair elections._](https://click.everyaction.com/k/58832610/392371444/-1795600110?amount=30&refcode=EM_RTI_20230216_FR_2G_redlight922_527&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjAwZmEzNmExLTRkYWUtZWQxMS05OTRkLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=2bf5wbLNawvC2t1dPSV2YJ0roX_AsxY_P1fF3z_2IeA=)**
_If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_

Vic Barreras Torres

clean_body: As the NDRC’s new senior mobilization strategist, I’m excited to join a leading organization in the fight for a more true and representative democracy. | Hey there, team – I’m Vic, the NDRC’s new senior mobilization strategist! I’d like to take a moment to introduce myself. I’m pumped to be working with a leading organization in the fight for a more true and representative democracy. In my role, I’m helping to power the NDRC’s ongoing work by cultivating one of our most valuable resources: This grassroots team! = | = Since the NDRC’s founding, people like you have helped us achieve some incredible victories. For instance, last year’s elections took place on what The New York Times called “the fairest House map of the last 40 years.” That accomplishment was only possible thanks to years of organizing, mobilizing communities, and advocating for fair redistricting reforms. Still, our work is far from over. As Attorney General Eric Holder said, “Fighting for fair maps helped save our democracy. But this is not a one and done effort.” He’s right. According to our research, about a quarter of maps across the country are still unfairly drawn. And Republican lawmakers in swing states, like my home state of Ohio, are actively working to implement new voting restrictions ahead of 2024. There’s a lot of work to do – and I’m excited to take it on. But I also know the NDRC never would have made it this far without grassroots supporters like you, and now we need you by our side during this next phase of our work.= If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = | = = | = = | = Thanks, team – I’m looking forward to working together! Vic Barreras Torres = = Since 2017, the NDRC has executed a comprehensive redistricting strategy that shifts the redistricting power, creating fair districts where Democrats can compete. Our victories have been made possible by our strong community of grassroots supporters. = If you want to receive periodic updates from the NDRC on our fight for fair maps, text MAPS to 36787. Text HELP for help, STOP to end. Msg & Data rates may apply. We know we send a lot of emails, but we think it's important to keep you updated with the latest information on Republican gerrymandering and voter suppression and how we're fighting back -- regardless of whether you choose to donate. = to make a donation. name: Katie Porter for California
subject: The GOP is weaponizing the debt ceiling
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Katie Porter for Senate
body:
The debt ceiling explained.
# [](https://act.katieporter.com/go/14558?t=1&akid=17827%2E3422442%2EaqF-GR)
If you’ve been following the news and wondering what the “debt ceiling” even is and why it’s important, you’re not alone. That’s why today, we’re going to borrow Katie’s whiteboard and explain the basics.
**[But first—if you can afford to make a donation to support our campaign, please consider making a contribution today. Katie Porter will be a warrior for all working people in the Senate and stand up against extremist Republicans.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-20230216-1?refcode=em20230216-1&refcode2=17827_3422442_aqF-GR&akid=17827%2E3422442%2EaqF-GR)**

**What is the debt ceiling? How is debt accrued?**
The debt ceiling is the _maximum_ amount of money the U.S. government is authorized to borrow in order to pay its bills. The United States’ “bills” include all sorts of things—from paying our military service members to sending you a tax refund.
---

**Why is the debt ceiling in the news right now?**
Last month, the U.S. government hit the debt ceiling. That means, until the debt ceiling is raised by Congress, the federal government can’t borrow any more money. Bills are being paid right now by Treasury Secretary Janet Yellen, who has taken “extraordinary measures,” such as suspending new investments in government retirement funds in order to do so. But even then, she said that she will only be able to do this until June if Congress does not raise the debt ceiling.
---

**So why hasn't Congress raised the debt ceiling yet?**
Extremist Republicans are blaming Democrats and President Biden for the country hitting the debt ceiling. You may remember some of them suggested cuts to vital programs like Medicare and Social Security, even though, by law, **Social Security adds $0 to our national debt.**
---
**Here’s the truth, Derek:** Both parties have raised the debt ceiling and accrued debt. This isn’t a matter of partisan politics—it’s a matter of whether or not our country can pay its bills.
If Republicans refuse to raise the debt ceiling in an attempt to score political points, we could default on our debts, which would be disastrous for our economy and government programs.
**[Consider chipping in to help send Katie to the U.S. Senate, where she’ll fight back against extremist Republicans and petty partisan politics.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-20230216-1?refcode=em20230216-1&refcode2=17827_3422442_aqF-GR&akid=17827%2E3422442%2EaqF-GR)**
**[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-20230216-1?amount=5&refcode=EMAF16_1_DEB_20230216_V1_F&refcode2=17827_3422442_aqF-GR&akid=17827%2E3422442%2EaqF-GR)**
We hope this explainer helped. We’ll keep you updated as this continues to unfold.
—Katie Porter for California

Katie is running for the U.S. Senate because Californians deserve a warrior fighting for them in Washington. clean_body: The debt ceiling explained. If you’ve been following the news and wondering what the “debt ceiling” even is and why it’s important, you’re not alone. That’s why today, we’re going to borrow Katie’s whiteboard and explain the basics. What is the debt ceiling? How is debt accrued? The debt ceiling is the maximum amount of money the U.S. government is authorized to borrow in order to pay its bills. The United States’ “bills” include all sorts of things—from paying our military service members to sending you a tax refund. Why is the debt ceiling in the news right now? Last month, the U.S. government hit the debt ceiling. That means, until the debt ceiling is raised by Congress, the federal government can’t borrow any more money. Bills are being paid right now by Treasury Secretary Janet Yellen, who has taken “extraordinary measures,” such as suspending new investments in government retirement funds in order to do so. But even then, she said that she will only be able to do this until June if Congress does not raise the debt ceiling. So why hasn't Congress raised the debt ceiling yet? Extremist Republicans are blaming Democrats and President Biden for the country hitting the debt ceiling. You may remember some of them suggested cuts to vital programs like Medicare and Social Security, even though, by law, Social Security adds $0 to our national debt. Here’s the truth, Derek: Both parties have raised the debt ceiling and accrued debt. This isn’t a matter of partisan politics—it’s a matter of whether or not our country can pay its bills. If Republicans refuse to raise the debt ceiling in an attempt to score political points, we could default on our debts, which would be disastrous for our economy and government programs. We hope this explainer helped. We’ll keep you updated as this continues to unfold. —Katie Porter for California Katie is running for the U.S. Senate because Californians deserve a warrior fighting for them in Washington. Our campaign is people-powered, we don’t take a dime from corporate PACs, federal lobbyists, or executives from Big Oil or Big Pharma.

name: Susie Lee
subject: Reaching out as a concerned mother
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Susie Lee for Congress
body:
|
---
[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58833347/392374286/-1839819742?refcode=lee_headerlogo&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MjA5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMGYyNDYxYy01MmFlLWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=bxQiCKbTpRJEvZH_VogCH0XLfnz6CX8LXZh3eH4Cr50=)

| | Folks — I often ask you: “What issues keep you and your family up at night?” or “What issues are top of mind for you?” But, for a moment, I’d like to share what issues resonate with me as a mother of two kids. This will be a longer email so if you’re crunched for time, [**all that I ask is you chip in to help me fight in Congress for the best possible future for our kids.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58833348/392374287/-1907207781?refcode=EM_BS_LEE_230216_FR_MM2_A0_NA_U1_X1_M1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MjA5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMGYyNDYxYy01MmFlLWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=bxQiCKbTpRJEvZH_VogCH0XLfnz6CX8LXZh3eH4Cr50=) | | | [Chip in >>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58833349/392374288/-1907207781?refcode=EM_BS_LEE_230216_FR_MM2_A0_NA_U1_X1_M1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MjA5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMGYyNDYxYy01MmFlLWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=bxQiCKbTpRJEvZH_VogCH0XLfnz6CX8LXZh3eH4Cr50=)
---
* * *
I have a daughter, Nevada, who will soon graduate college, and I am determined to make the change that she wishes to see in our country. But, one thing I didn’t anticipate is that she would graduate with fewer rights than I had in college.
With _Roe v. Wade_ having been overturned by the far-right Supreme Court, **I’m more determined than ever to protect reproductive rights from Republicans’ continued attacks.** The government has no place controlling women’s bodies, and the next generation of women need to know that we won’t stand for it.
I also have a son, Cody, whose high school graduation is coming far too fast for my liking! I want him to be able to pursue his dreams and get a well-paying job with good benefits.
As a strong education advocate, it’s why **I’ve supported expanding opportunities for apprenticeships and trade schools.** The next generation of workers should feel confident entering the workforce knowing that reliable, good-paying jobs are accessible no matter if they have a bachelor’s degree or a trade certificate.
And one lingering existential threat puts at risk everything we care about: climate change.
We’ve seen it here in Nevada with Lake Mead’s historic drought. And those thunderstorms that have become more intense and frequent across the region aren’t a coincidence. _They are symptoms of our warming climate._
**My work on climate change in Congress has been two-fold: preventing its most devastating impacts, and helping communities adapt by shoring up their access to clean water.** Left unchecked, Nevada could be one of the states hardest-hit by climate change. I refuse to leave our children a home that’s less livable than the one we have today.
* * *
There’s so much work left to be done to ensure that we’ve set the next generation up for success.
Unfortunately, Republicans are working around the clock to obstruct our progress in the House. But I won’t let that stop me, and I hope you’ll join me in fighting back.
[**If you’re with me, I’m asking you to please chip in as much as you can afford today. Your contribution will help me reach my mid-month goal and continue the fight for the next generation in Congress.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58833350/392374289/-1907207781?refcode=EM_BS_LEE_230216_FR_MM2_A0_NA_U1_X1_M1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MjA5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMGYyNDYxYy01MmFlLWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=bxQiCKbTpRJEvZH_VogCH0XLfnz6CX8LXZh3eH4Cr50=)
_If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_

clean_body: | = | | Folks — I often ask you: “What issues keep you and your family up at night?” or “What issues are top of mind for you?” But, for a moment, I’d like to share what issues resonate with me as a mother of two kids. This will be a longer email so if you’re crunched for time, = | | | = I have a daughter, Nevada, who will soon graduate college, and I am determined to make the change that she wishes to see in our country. But, one thing I didn’t anticipate is that she would graduate with fewer rights than I had in college. With Roe v. Wade having been overturned by the far-right Supreme Court, I’m more determined than ever to protect reproductive rights from Republicans’ continued attacks. The government has no place controlling women’s bodies, and the next generation of women need to know that we won’t stand for it. I also have a son, Cody, whose high school graduation is coming far too fast for my liking! I want him to be able to pursue his dreams and get a well-paying job with good benefits. As a strong education advocate, it’s why I’ve supported expanding opportunities for apprenticeships and trade schools. The next generation of workers should feel confident entering the workforce knowing that reliable, good-paying jobs are accessible no matter if they have a bachelor’s degree or a trade certificate. And one lingering existential threat puts at risk everything we care about: climate change. We’ve seen it here in Nevada with Lake Mead’s historic drought. And those thunderstorms that have become more intense and frequent across the region aren’t a coincidence. They are symptoms of our warming climate. My work on climate change in Congress has been two-fold: preventing its most devastating impacts, and helping communities adapt by shoring up their access to clean water. Left unchecked, Nevada could be one of the states hardest-hit by climate change. I refuse to leave our children a home that’s less livable than the one we have today. There’s so much work left to be done to ensure that we’ve set the next generation up for success. Unfortunately, Republicans are working around the clock to obstruct our progress in the House. But I won’t let that stop me, and I hope you’ll join me in fighting back. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = | | = | | = | | = | | = | | = I’m greatly appreciative of your support. Susie Lee | | = We believe that emails are the best way for our organization to stay in touch with supporters like you. But if you'd like to receive fewer emails, . clean_body: We're just being honest | Peter, We're reaching out because we are giving JD an update tomorrow morning, and between you and us, it's not looking good. In fact, it's looking really bad. JD's currently about 17% of the way to his Mid-Month goal, and we need to cover some SERIOUS GROUND before midnight tonight, so it's not a disaster when we update him tomorrow morning. THIS IS A CODE RED ALERT, and we need YOUR HELP. | Vance Finance Team Conservative Outsider. Marine. Businessman. Author. Ohio needs a true conservative in the U.S. Senate. It needs someone who understands how our economic and government leaders conspire to make life harder for normal Americans. Ohio needs JD Vance. If you'd like to support our campaign, you can click below to make a donation. | | ---|---|--- Paid for by Vance Victory JD Vance for Senate Inc., P.O. Box 6564 Cincinnati, OH 45206 Copyright (C) 2022 JD Vance for US Senate, All rights reserved.

name: CaucusRoom
subject: It's Always Trump's Fault
body:
It's been 12 days, where is Biden? No images? [Click here](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-e-qhhjhx-trhiujldw-g/) [](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-qhhjhx-trhiujldw-r/)
## **Happy Thursday! It has been 12 days since the Chinese Spy Balloon was shot down and Biden has not addressed the American people.**
## **Here are some recent articles shared by CaucusRoom members. **
[](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-qhhjhx-trhiujldw-y/) [Schedule a CaucusRoom Live demo today!](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-qhhjhx-trhiujldw-j/) **Why Did They Wait?** The Chinese spy balloon was launched from its base on Hainan Island in the South China Sea. [**And our defense personnel tracked it for nearly a week --and did nothing.**](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-qhhjhx-trhiujldw-t/) **Blaming Trump** Buttigieg is **[blaming the train derailments around the country on Trump](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-qhhjhx-trhiujldw-i/)** for hampering rail safety. **Felony Charge Dropped**
## A woke prosecutor **[refused to jail or even ban the MSU shooter](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-qhhjhx-trhiujldw-d/)** from buying a gun after his 2019 felony weapons charge.
**No Audit Boost** IRS Nominee says **[he will commit to not increasing tax audits](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-qhhjhx-trhiujldw-h/)** on businesses and households making less than $400,000 a year. Do you believe him? **Anyone But Biden** **[Biden is a distant second to 'don't know'](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-qhhjhx-trhiujldw-k/)** in an open-ended poll question asking Democrats who they want to lead their party. **Haley for President** Former South Carolina governor and UN Ambassador[ ](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-qhhjhx-trhiujldw-u/)[**Nikki Haley announced Tuesday that she is running for president**](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-qhhjhx-trhiujldw-o/)[,](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-qhhjhx-trhiujldw-x/) seeking the Republican nomination for the 2024 election. If you are a fan, you can join the **[Nikki Haley for President group.](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-qhhjhx-trhiujldw-m/)**

**Let****'s[ have a good laugh](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-qhhjhx-trhiujldw-c/)!**
* He **[has a point](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-qhhjhx-trhiujldw-q/)**.
* A new **[children's book](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-qhhjhx-trhiujldw-a/)**.
* Things are **[so great](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-qhhjhx-trhiujldw-f/)**.

[](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-qhhjhx-trhiujldw-z/)[](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-qhhjhx-trhiujldw-v/)[](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-qhhjhx-trhiujldw-e/) [](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-qhhjhx-trhiujldw-s/) | CaucusRoom, LLC
